perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women, one in a black tiered dress and one in a light grey dress with a bucket hat, stand in front of a supermarket display filled with giant Cup Noodles models. (2) The woman in grey turns around to reveal she is wearing a giant Cup Noodles-shaped backpack, while the woman in black gestures toward it with a smile. (3) They remove the backpack and open the top zipper, showing a large quantity of stacked cup noodles inside. (4) The camera provides close-up shots of different noodle flavors being handled by their hands, showing the packaging details. (5) The video concludes with a static shot of the giant backpack displayed on a shelf surrounded by smaller cup noodles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo J-Pop style track with synthesizers and a driving percussion beat begins. Two energetic female voices are heard speaking enthusiastically. (2) The voices continue as they describe the 'huge backpack' they found, with the background music maintaining a consistent, high energy level. (3) A voiceover lists the specific noodle contents including 'chicken white soup' and 'pork bone' flavors while the music continues. (4) The track remains consistent in volume and tempo until the end, finishing with a final enthusiastic spoken prompt.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '肚子餓' (Hungry) - decorative hook text. (2) '來一個' (Have one) - decorative sticker. (3) '日清泡麵' (Nissin Instant Noodles) - brand label. (4) '巨大背包' (Giant Backpack) - descriptive text. (5) '唐吉訶德限定' (Don Quijote Limited Edition) - promotional hook. (6) '999元' (999 Dollars) - functional price text. (7) '你覺得值得嗎' (Do you think it's worth it?) - engagement hook text. (8) Functional traditional Chinese subtitles transcribe the dialogue throughout the duration.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing inside a brightly lit toy store; the woman on the right in a blue beret gestures energetically while the woman on the left in a black dress looks on. (2) They stand behind three large pink 'Mega Space Molly' boxes, pointing at them with smiles and high energy. (3) The camera focuses on a lottery board; a hand uses a coin to scratch off a circle, revealing the number 20. (4) The women are shown in a different part of the store with gashapon machines behind them, holding one of the large boxes and waving enthusiastically toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, excited tone in Mandarin. (2) The vocals continue with high density, explaining the rules of the lottery and the value of the prizes. (3) A sharp 'ding' sound effect occurs when the scratch-off number is revealed. (4) The music remains upbeat as the two women bid farewell, their voices overlapping with laughter and excitement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我竟然中大獎！' (I actually won the big prize!) - Hook/Excited tone. (2) '史上最狂 8880元盲盒' (Craziest 8880 yuan blind box in history) - Functional/Descriptive. (3) '1抽650元的刮刮樂' (650 yuan per scratch-off) - Functional/Informative. (4) '20' with star graphics - Decorative/Impact. (5) '一定要記得看我們YouTube長片' (Be sure to watch our long YouTube video) - Call to Action/Neutral.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two women, one in a black beret and dress and another in a grey coat, entering a brightly colored room themed after 'Ojamajo Doremi'. (2) They transition through various exhibition zones: posing with a giant green plush character, looking at character sketches on a yellow wall, and standing beside life-sized character cutouts. (3) The woman in the black dress poses in different character-specific booths (pink, blue, purple, yellow). (4) They stand on a 'Magical Stage' with a group standee and interact with a giant interactive book. (5) A detailed showcase follows, focusing on a life-sized figure of the character Hana-chan and walls of transformation costumes. (6) The video concludes with a tour of the merchandise area, displaying bags, plushies, and themed red envelopes, ending with a projection of the characters as adults.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo anime-style background music starts immediately, featuring a electronic remix of a familiar theme song. (2) An enthusiastic male voice-over provides a continuous narration, describing the exhibition's features. (3) Occasional 'twinkling' or 'magic' sound effects are played during visual transitions. (4) Towards the end, the music shifts to a more sentimental, orchestral piano version of the main theme while the narrator speaks in a more emotional tone. (5) Faint ambient sounds of an indoor public space are occasionally audible beneath the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '歡迎來到魔法堂' (Welcome to Mahodo) - Excited tone. (2) '小魔女DoReMi 25周年展' (Ojamajo Doremi 25th Anniversary Exhibition) - Informative title. (3) '超級大的魔女莉卡' (Super big Majorika) - Hook for the giant plush. (4) '手稿就在這裡' (Sketches are right here) - Guiding the viewer. (5) '你還相信魔法嗎?' (Do you still believe in magic?) - Emotional quote from the movie. (6) '非常推薦大家進來採購一番' (Highly recommend everyone come and shop) - Persuasive call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a white lace-sleeved top holds a red mesh bag of sweet potatoes in a Costco warehouse, speaking enthusiastically to the camera. (2) She points to a price tag showing $175 for 2.8kg of sweet potatoes. (3) The scene transitions to a home kitchen where the sweet potatoes are washed in a sink, then wrapped individually in aluminum foil and placed on a baking tray. (4) The tray is inserted into a white SMEG brand oven. (5) Close-ups of the oven dials show settings for 190 degrees and 60 minutes. (6) The final shot shows a roasted sweet potato split open on a green plate, revealing steaming, bright yellow-orange flesh.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately with a female voice speaking in a high-pitched, excited tone. (2) A repetitive, rhythmic chant or jingle about 'roasted sweet potatoes' plays in the background behind the main speech. (3) Faint sound of rushing water is heard during the washing segment. (4) A mechanical 'click' and 'whirring' sound accompanies the oven dial being turned. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Costco Wholesale logo at the top. (2) Hook text: '好市多最便宜 省錢!烤地瓜' (Costco's cheapest, save money! Roasted sweet potatoes). (3) Functional text: 'OK 175元' indicating the price. (4) Sequential instructions: '一次水洗好' (Wash them all at once), '包上一層薄薄的鋁箔紙' (Wrap in a thin layer of foil), '放入烤箱' (Put in oven), '低溫烤25分鐘' (Low temperature for 25 mins), '接下來190度60分鐘' (Next 190 degrees for 60 mins). (5) Closing text: '漂亮的烤地瓜 烤好囉' (Beautiful roasted sweet potatoes are ready).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a shot of warehouse shelves stocked with large yellow and blue bags of Minions-themed gummy candy under a Costco logo overlay. (2) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top and a necklace, enters the frame and picks up one of the large bags. Suddenly, another bag is thrown at her from off-camera, hitting her in the head. (3) She reacts with a surprised expression and then smiles broadly, laughing while holding two large bags of candy against her chest. (4) The scene transitions to close-up shots of the individual small packets inside the large bag and a shot of the nutritional information label on the back, highlighting the '1kg' weight.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-pitched, and energetic background music starts immediately with rhythmic electronic beats. (2) A female voice begins speaking in an excited and fast-paced tone, narrating her discovery and reaction to the product. (3) Sound effects like a 'bonk' sound play when she is hit by the bag, followed by the sound of laughter and playful banter. (4) The music remains constant until the end, maintaining a fast and cheerful atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) '大包到受傷 小小兵軟糖' (So big it hurts, Minions gummy) - a humorous hook text in colorful font. (3) '哦妹妹' (Oh sister/little girl) - decorative text appearing during the interaction. (4) '買兩包 送你兩包' (Buy two, give you two) - promotional hook text. (5) '超多袋的小軟糖' (So many bags of small gummies) - functional description. (6) '重量竟然有 一公斤!' (The weight is actually one kilogram!) - emphatic text highlighting the product's size.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long hair wearing a pink sweater and a camouflage bucket hat stands in a strawberry greenhouse. She holds a blue basket and small red scissors, pointing towards the ground near a strawberry row. (2) Close-up shots of strawberries being clipped from the vine. The woman holds a strawberry up to the camera, smiling and gesturing. A small white dog in a pink and grey sweater appears. (3) Transitions to the woman sitting on the ground showing the dog a strawberry, then standing to show a large, red strawberry. (4) Scene shifts to a dimly lit outdoor path at dusk where the woman follows a person in a pink jacket towards a storage room. (5) Inside a storage room, a hand in a pink glove points at various containers and bags of organic farming materials on shelves. (6) Back in the greenhouse/store area, close-ups of baskets filled with strawberries and a counter displaying various digital payment stickers. (7) A man’s hands in purple gloves are seen weighing the strawberries on a digital scale and packing them into a cardboard box. (8) Final scene shows two women playing with a large blue exercise ball in an outdoor grassy field at night, with the white dog running around them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched and energetic female voice begins speaking over an upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic pop background track. She mentions the 'boss lady' and 'hot spring water'. (2) Sounds of metal scissors clipping stems are audible. The woman and a companion laugh and joke about the shape of a strawberry. (3) Ambient farm noise is minimal, dominated by the narration and background music. (4) An older female voice (the boss lady) joins, explaining the organic materials being used, such as camphor oil and bacterial cultures. Her tone is informative. (5) Sound of a digital scale beeping and the rustling of cardboard and paper packaging. (6) Loud, joyful shouting and laughter as the women play outside; the sound of the large ball hitting the ground and the dog yapping occasionally.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '老闆娘說這邊' (The boss lady said here), '下面是溫泉水' (Below is hot spring water) - Informative tone. (2) Decorative Hook: '吃溫泉長大的超乾淨草莓園' (Ultra-clean strawberry garden grown on hot springs) - Enthusiastic tone. (3) Functional Text: '哇這顆長得好像奶頭喂~' (Wow this one looks like a nipple~) - Humorous/teasing tone. (4) Decorative Text: '環境真的很乾淨' (The environment is really clean), '這裡超級大的' (This place is super big) - Impressed tone. (5) Decorative Text: '寵物友善' (Pet friendly) - Welcoming tone. (6) Decorative Text: '又尖又紅' (Pointy and red), '又大又圓' (Big and round) - Descriptive tone. (7) Functional Text: '結帳方式超方便的' (Checkout method is super convenient) - Practical tone. (8) Decorative Text: '寵物小孩遊戲區' (Pet and child play area) - Fun tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a title screen featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and text overlay indicating a weekly special report for Feb 3rd to Feb 9th over a pile of Sanrio plush toys. (2) A rapid montage follows, showcasing various products on store shelves, each with a text box displaying the product name, original price, discount amount, and final sale price. Products range from household items like Kleenex toilet paper and Tide pods to snacks like Nestle cereal, Pringles, and Snickers. (3) The sequence continues through a wide variety of grocery items including milk, chocolate, seafood, meat, and fresh fruit like mangoes and grapes. (4) The video concludes after showing several more health supplements and food products, maintaining the same fast-paced display style throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic music with a steady rhythmic beat begins immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice introduces the Costco weekly special report. (2) As the visuals cut between products, the narrator rapidly speaks in Mandarin, reading out the names of the products and their discounted prices. (3) The music remains at a consistent volume and tempo, providing a high-energy backdrop to the fast-paced narration. (4) The narration and music continue without interruption until the end of the video, maintaining a sense of urgency and excitement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE 好市多 每週特價速報 02/03-02/09 記得追蹤我們 - Title and date info (Excited hook). (2) SANRIO 18吋趴趴絨毛玩偶 原價789 -190 特價599 - Product name and price (Functional). (3) 舒潔三層抽取式衛生紙 原價419 -84 特價335 - Product name and price (Functional). (4) 限時特價桃園南崁店 - Location specific tag for certain items (Functional). (5) Numerous other product names including Nestlé, Glico, Pringles, Snickers, Philips, Tide, Starbucks, etc., with their respective prices (Functional).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands inside a bright Costco warehouse, holding a large, vacuum-packed piece of raw beef. She smiles and gestures enthusiastically toward the camera. (2) Close-up shots show the meat display in the refrigerated section and the price tag indicating a discount. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen where the woman is wearing plastic gloves and handling the raw beef on a cutting board lined with paper towels. (4) She uses a knife to trim the silver skin and fat, then slices the large block into steaks and smaller strips. (5) She displays different plates filled with portioned meat, including steaks and scraps for stir-frying. (6) The final shot shows the cooked steak served on a sizzling plate with bell peppers, accompanied by a bowl of fresh lettuce.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop track with a steady drum beat plays throughout the video. (2) A woman's voice provides energetic and high-pitched narration in Mandarin Chinese, expressing excitement about the purchase. (3) Occasional subtle sound effects like plastic rustling and knife-on-board sounds are heard beneath the music. (4) The audio maintains a consistent high-energy flow until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. '美國頂級嫩肩里肌牛肉盲包' (US Prime Top Blade Vacuum Pack) identifies the product. '$489/KG' indicates the price. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '開箱' (Unboxing) in a red bubble. '這個也折太多了吧' (This discount is too much) with fire emojis. '頂級 Prime!' in red 3D text. '筋很漂亮' (The tendon is very beautiful) and '非常推薦給大家' (Highly recommended to everyone) are used to emphasize quality. (3) Narrative Text: '1526元的肉總共分出這些小牛排' (Total 1526 dollars of meat divided into these steaks) summarizes the result.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black mesh top, is looking at refrigerated meat packages. She points to a specific package of ginger duck. (2) She picks up the package to show the contents, which include large pieces of duck meat and a soup base. The camera pans across other meat products like duck legs and breasts. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor dining room. Two women are seated at a table with a large blue pot of steaming ginger duck soup. One woman wears a white sweater and a black beret, while the other wears a black top. (4) They are seen eating, gesturing enthusiastically with their hands, and showing close-ups of the duck meat and broth. The video ends with a thumbs-up gesture from the woman in the beret.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-pitched female voice speaks quickly and excitedly about finding ginger duck at Costco. Fast-paced, cheerful background music starts immediately. (2) As the visuals show the meat, the narrator's voice remains energetic, mentioning the price and the components of the kit. Subtle ambient supermarket noise is occasionally heard beneath the music. (3) The audio shifts to a conversation between two women. Both speak in enthusiastic tones, with one woman providing most of the descriptive commentary about the 'layers of flavor' and 'freshness.' (4) Occasional sound effects (SFX) like sparkles or chimes accompany the appearance of high-score graphics. The music maintains a constant, energetic tempo until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is displayed prominently at the top. (2) Hook Text: '討論度爆高! 薑母鴨只要 569元' (Highly discussed! Ginger duck only 569 yuan) in red and yellow bold letters. (3) Decorative Text: '廚娘請問這個薑母鴨可以嗎?' (Chef, is this ginger duck okay?) in white and blue. (4) Decorative Text: '薑母鴨初體驗' (First ginger duck experience). (5) Decorative Text: '1-10分我給 100分' (1-10 points, I give 100 points) in large yellow numbers for emphasis. (6) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue into Traditional Chinese.

(2) The camera zooms in on her as she holds the toy close, then switches to a close-up of her face as she continues speaking and smiling. (3) The shot changes to show the woman standing back in the aisle, gesturing towards the toy. (4) A male hand enters the frame, pointing at various plush toys on a shelf, including brown and grey teddy bears. (5) The woman holds the red triceratops and compares its softness to the other toys. (6) Finally, she picks up two more red triceratops toys and walks away from the camera down the aisle, waving goodbye.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Light, upbeat, and bouncy acoustic background music starts immediately. A female voice is heard laughing and speaking in a playful, high-pitched tone. (2) A male voice responds off-camera with a friendly and conversational tone. The two engage in a dialogue with overlapping laughter. (3) The acoustic BGM continues at a steady tempo throughout the conversation. (4) Minimal ambient warehouse noise is present but heavily suppressed by the dialogue and music. (5) The music stays consistent until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 妹妹想買的玩具 (Functional: The toy sister wants to buy; Tone: Informative). (2) 你要幾次 (Functional: How many times do you want?; Tone: Questioning). (3) 到成功為止 (Functional: Until I succeed; Tone: Determined/Playful). (4) 哈哈哈 你問我能不能買 (Functional: Hahaha, you ask me if I can buy it; Tone: Humorous). (5) 他會跟我說不行 (Functional: He will tell me no; Tone: Explanatory). (6) 對啊 你也知道答案的 (Functional: Right, you know the answer too; Tone: Teasing). (7) 對啊 太大了 (Functional: Right, it's too big; Tone: Reasoning). (8) 你是要帶上床自己用是不是 (Functional: Are you taking it to bed for yourself?; Tone: Joking). (9) 尺寸太尷尬 (Functional: The size is too awkward; Tone: Critique). (10) 而且牙齒都很軟 (Functional: And the teeth are very soft; Tone: Pointing out a feature). (11) 你信不信 我跟你賭 (Functional: Believe it or not, I'll bet you; Tone: Challenging). (12) 再見 拜拜 (Functional: Goodbye, bye-bye; Tone: Closing).

(3) By 0:15, the woman in black reveals her plush toy, which is a green pig in a bear-like costume. The camera zooms in on the plush. (4) At 0:24, the woman in blue reveals her pull, which is a dark grey/blue 'hidden' version of the plush. She reacts with extreme excitement, jumping and showing the toy to the camera. The video ends with her holding the 'Naughty Teddy' plush close to the lens.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with upbeat, high-tempo pop music featuring a female vocal track. Two female voices are heard speaking enthusiastically and rapidly in Mandarin. (2) As the unboxing begins around 0:10, the sound of cardboard tearing and plastic rustling is audible over the background music. (3) At 0:24, a loud, high-pitched scream of excitement and a 'Wow!' from one of the women dominates the audio as the rare item is revealed. (4) The music continues at a consistent high energy until the end, with the women's voices remaining excited and fast-paced.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '抽到隱藏款 LULU豬糖膠娃' - Hook text in yellow and red, indicating they want to pull a hidden version. (2) '一個只要360元' - Functional text regarding the price. (3) '你最想要哪一個' - Hook question asking the audience's preference. (4) '封面款' - Label indicating the desired cover model. (5) '勇敢小豬' - Descriptive text for the first green plush. (6) '大隱藏！' - Large, high-energy text for the rare reveal. (7) '超低機率 1/96' - Informational text highlighting the rarity. (8) '調皮泰迪' - Name of the specific plush character. (9) '想不到吧' - Playful hook text. (10) '按下愛心得好運' - Call to action for engagement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a person wearing a large, colorful lion dance head pillow performing an energetic dance in a warehouse aisle. (3) The rhythmic percussion music continues in the background throughout the rest of the video, interspersed with cartoonish 'pop' and 'ting' sound effects that coincide with on-screen text appearances. (4) Ambient warehouse noise is minimal and suppressed by the studio-quality vocal recording and BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo; '醒獅抱枕 699元' (Lion Dance Pillow 699 NTD); '一個金 一個紅' (One gold, one red); '699元1個'. (So prosperous/hot!); '觸感也滿好的' (The feel is also quite good); '突然就想要跳醒獅' (Suddenly want to do a lion dance); '適合拜年' (Suitable for New Year greetings); '給我紅包!' (Give me red envelopes!).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman standing in a brightly lit toy store filled with gachapon machines. She points to a yellow Chiikawa-themed machine. (2) She attempts to handle coins but accidentally drops them, causing her to bend down and search the floor while laughing. (3) She proceeds to kneel on the ground in a prayer-like gesture in front of the machine, then turns the green handle. (4) A pink gachapon ball is dispensed, which she retrieves with a hopeful expression. (5) The shot changes to her kneeling on the floor, displaying several pink and one blue Chiikawa character stamps in her palms to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, whimsical electronic music plays. A female voice speaks excitedly while a male voice off-camera responds in a playful tone. (2) Sound of coins clinking on a hard floor is heard, accompanied by laughter from both speakers. (3) The woman chants the name 'Chiikawa' in a high-pitched, pleading tone. The sound of the gachapon's mechanical dial clicking is prominent. (4) A plastic ball is heard rolling down the internal chute. The speakers cheer with anticipation. (5) A repetitive, silly 'pa-pa-pa' musical jingle replaces the previous BGM as the woman explains her haul.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '吉伊卡哇印章扭蛋' (Chiikawa Stamp Gachapon) - Exciting hook. (2) '一抽150元' (150 NTD per draw) - Functional price info. (3) '妹妹最喜歡誰' (Who does sister like most?) - Engaging question. (4) '掉進去了啊' (It fell inside!) - Reaction to dropping coins. (5) '最想要的是吉伊卡哇' (I want Chiikawa the most) - Stating preference. (6) '跪地求蛋' (Kneeling to beg for the egg) - Describing her humorous action. (7) '我有三個一樣的小八' (I have three of the same Hachiware) - Revealing the result with a humorous tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Mishap (dropped coins) -> Ritual (kneeling) -> Result -> Collection Reveal

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Struggle -> Ritual -> Outcome
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video's core objective is to entertain through the relatable and slightly comedic experience of playing a gachapon machine for a popular character (Chiikawa). It emphasizes the performer's 'desperation' to get a specific item, using the 'kneeling' ritual as a humorous hook for fellow fans of gacha culture.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video lacks a direct call to purchase from a specific retailer or brand, focusing instead on personal hobbyist experience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Dynamic banter between an onscreen female and offscreen male; large, colorful variety-show style captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video taps into the massive popularity of the Chiikawa IP in East Asia. The kneeling action is a common meme in the gaming/gacha community representing a plea for better luck (RNG).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a Costco warehouse aisle with several people walking by; a large Costco logo and a cartoon character (Wreck-It Ralph) are overlaid on the screen with promotional text. (2) A rapid series of cuts follows, each showcasing a specific product on a shelf or in a refrigerated case. Products include large boxes of MamyPoko diapers, bottles of vitamins and supplements, containers of laundry pods, packs of beer, bags of chocolates, snacks, and fresh meat/seafood packages. (3) Each product shot features a consistent graphic overlay showing the brand, original price, discount amount, and final special price. (4) The final shot shows a very large pink Disney Lotso plush bear sitting in a bin.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music with a steady rhythm begins immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) An energetic male voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing the weekly Costco specials and quickly narrating the names of the products and their discounted prices as they appear on screen. (3) No significant ambient noise or sound effects are heard over the loud BGM and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the narrator's speech. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large colorful titles at the start read 'Costco Weekly Specials Report', '02/25~03/02', and 'Remember to follow us'. (3) Content Text: Each product has a dedicated overlay with its name (e.g., 'MAMY POKO', 'ONE A DAY', 'Tide'), 'Original Price', 'Discount', and 'Special Price' in bold numbers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product showcase with pricing -> Brief Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: A few shoppers are seen in the background of the intro and some hands are visible reaching for products.

By combining visual proof of the discounts with an energetic narration, the content aims to drive foot traffic to the store and increase social media engagement for the 'Bill Special Envoy' (比爾特派員) brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear showcase of products with prices and explicit 'Special Price' labels.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a purple sweater and a camo bucket hat stands in a Costco freezer aisle, excitedly pointing at a product. (2) She opens the freezer door and retrieves a large white bag of 'Via Emilia Gnocchi Four Cheese', displaying it to the camera with a cheerful expression. (3) Scene shifts to an indoor table where she and another woman in a black dress show the four individual plastic bags of gnocchi contained within the main packaging. (4) A close-up shot shows the gnocchi being cooked in a pan with a creamy white sauce bubbling. (5) Both women are seen eating the finished dish with chopsticks, reacting with exaggerated facial expressions of delight and nodding.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin. (2) Sound of a freezer door opening and the rustling of plastic bags. (3) Transition to sizzling sounds as the food cooks in the pan. (4) The female vocals continue with an excited tone, interspersed with 'Mmm' sounds and laughter during the tasting segment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '來自義大利 四種起司的麵疙瘩' (Gnocchi with four types of cheese from Italy). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '我找到了' (I found it!) appearing inside lantern-style graphic overlays. (3) Functional Text: '399元' indicating the price. (4) Decorative/Effect Text: '超級好吃' (Super delicious) and 'Q彈' (Chewy/Springy) emphasizing the food's texture and taste.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Discovery in store -> Product details and pricing -> Cooking demonstration -> Final tasting and review.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a colorful, submarine-themed gachapon (capsule toy) machine. A hand inserts coins and pulls the red lever repeatedly. (2) The scene shifts to a montage of capsules rolling out of the machine and the main character, a young woman in a black off-shoulder top, reacting with a mix of excitement and playful frustration as she checks the contents of numerous capsules. (3) The character is seen standing inside a crowded store environment and then outdoors, holding a capsule and pouting at the camera. (4) Finally, the video shows several Disney-themed eco-bags in different colors (yellow, light blue, dark blue) being held up against a backdrop of Tokyo Disneyland's outdoor scenery including a lamp post and trees.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, whimsical music plays with a fast tempo. A young female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, explaining that the machine is only at Tokyo Disney. (2) Sound effects like 'ka-ching' and 'boing' are synchronized with coins being inserted and capsules dropping. The narrator's tone becomes more frantic as she continues to roll for a specific color. (3) The music remains constant while the narrator's voice transitions from anticipation to humorous despair as she counts the repeated colors. (4) The audio concludes with a more satisfied tone as she displays the variety of bags collected, with the background music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '只有在東京迪士尼' (Only at Tokyo Disney) - Functional/Location hook. (2) '限定扭蛋機' (Limited Gachapon Machine) - Hook/Description. (3) '一抽400日幣' (400 Yen per draw) - Functional info. (4) '超可愛購物袋' (Super cute shopping bag) - Hook/Emotional. (5) '小賭上癮了' (Addicted to gambling) - Humorous/Hook. (6) '我要粉紅色' (I want pink) - Emotional/Objective. (7) '6顆藍色' (6 blue ones) - Descriptive/Frustrated tone. (8) Color labels: '黃色' (Yellow), '湖水藍' (Lake blue), '深藍' (Dark blue) - Functional identifiers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Limited Item) -> Process (Gachapon Unboxing Montage) -> Result (Displaying the Collection)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a warehouse club setting. A woman wearing a patterned fur hat and purple sweater holds a large transparent box of cherry tomatoes, comparing one tomato's size to her thumb with an excited expression. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting. The same woman, now wearing a black beret and white top, sits at a table with the tomato box and a bag of dried prunes. (3) She uses a knife and scissors to demonstrate cutting the prunes and stuffing them into the sliced cherry tomatoes while wearing plastic gloves. (4) The camera shows a close-up of the finished snacks arranged on a pink plate. (5) She picks one up, eats it, and reacts with a surprised and happy facial expression, covering her mouth as she chews.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat pop music begins immediately. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone with audible background noise typical of a busy warehouse. (2) As the scene changes to the home, the background noise disappears, leaving only the music and the clear, steady narration of the woman explaining the recipe. (3) Occasional sound effects (SFX) like a 'ding' or a 'pop' coincide with text appearances. (4) Sound of the woman chewing and an enthusiastic 'Mmm' vocalization are heard at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '好市多' (Costco), '終於又進小番茄' (Finally cherry tomatoes are back), '225元' (Price). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '跟大拇哥一樣' (Like a thumb) with a hand emoji, '包蜜餞超讚' (Stuffed with prunes is great), '無痛升級' (Painless upgrade), '超好吃' (Super delicious). (3) The tone of the text is enthusiastic and uses large, colorful fonts common in social media short videos.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a pink fuzzy sweater and a grey/black patterned fluffy hat stands in a Costco warehouse, positioned in front of large red product display boxes. She talks enthusiastically to the camera, gesturing with her hands. (2) She picks up a large white and red bag of 'Bee Cheng Hiang Crispy Pulled Pork Twist' and shows both sides of the packaging to the camera. (3) The scene shifts to a home interior. The same woman is now seated at a counter with a friend, wearing a black beret and a white long-sleeved top. They hold the snack bag and smaller individual packets within it. (4) They open the packets and pour the contents onto a light blue plate, revealing thin, crispy pork strands and many small broken pieces. They pick up individual strands to examine and eat them, reacting with varying facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo pop/vlog background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic female voice narrates excitedly about being at Costco and finding a specific pork snack. (2) Ambient sounds of a retail environment are briefly audible but overshadowed by the music and narration. (3) The audio transitions to a quieter room setting with the same background music continuing. Two female voices are heard discussing the price (339 NTD) and the weight of the product. (4) Occasional 'pop' and 'chime' sound effects are used to punctuate the appearance of text on screen or actions like opening the bag. (5) The sound of plastic crinkling and the crunching of the snack is clearly audible during the tasting phase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '豬肉大人來到了' - Hook text indicating the 'Pork Lord' has arrived. (2) '$339元 美珍香 脆烤豬肉絲' - Functional text showing the price and product name. (3) '妹妹特別把我拉過來...' - Functional narration about how they found the product. (4) '值得嗎?' - Hook text questioning if the product is worth the price. (5) '滿滿的空氣' - Decorative text humorously noting the air in the bag. (6) '碎片偏多' - Functional descriptive text noting the amount of broken pieces. (7) '渣渣的感覺' - Descriptive text about the texture.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a white puff-sleeve top stands in a warehouse aisle (Costco), holding a large yellow bottle of Arm & Hammer detergent. (2) Close-ups of the product label highlight '5-in-1 power', 'Oxi Clean', and the 'HE' logo. (3) The scene shifts to the woman in a different outfit (white jacket and beret) holding the detergent next to a shopping cart. (4) A small white dog is shown lying on a brown towel in a home environment. (5) The video ends with a close-up of an Oxi Clean stain remover box.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts. A female voice in Mandarin explains a discount at Costco for Arm & Hammer detergent. (2) The music continues as the speaker describes technical features like the 'HE' logo and low-suds formula. (3) The audio transition is smooth as the speaker's tone becomes more critical, listing reasons why she personally didn't like the product, including scent and harshness. (4) The audio concludes with a recommendation for a related powder product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Large yellow hook text: '限時特價最新 鐵錘牌洗衣精' (Limited time special price, latest Arm & Hammer laundry detergent) with an energetic tone. (2) Functional text displaying the price calculation: '$599 - $130 = $469'. (3) Decorative variety-show style captions like '心中竟然是...?' (What's in my heart...?). (4) Numbered list for the review: '1. 他的檸檬味真的有一點重' (1. The lemon scent is a bit strong) and '2. 是他的清潔力有點太強' (2. The cleaning power is a bit too strong).

(4) The audio concludes with the female voice sounding softer and sleepier, layered over light car engine hums and ambient night sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top; Hook Text: '喝了真的會想睡? 克寧晚安全護奶粉' (Does it really make you sleepy? perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white vest over a blue top and a black beret, is standing in a Costco freezer aisle. She excitedly points at a shelf of pizzas and smiles broadly. (2) Close-ups of the pizza boxes inside the refrigerated display cases. The woman picks up a box, presenting it to the camera with an enthusiastic expression. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor apartment setting. Two young women are sitting at a dining table. One wears a black vest and white top, and the other wears a blue turtleneck. They hold slices of a rectangular pizza topped with minced meat, basil, and cherry tomatoes. (4) Detailed close-ups of the pizza slices, emphasizing the height of the toppings and the texture of the crust. (5) The women take bites of the pizza, look at each other with wide eyes, and give double thumbs-up gestures while nodding and smiling.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop BGM begins immediately. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone in Chinese. Faint background hum of a large retail warehouse is audible. (2) Occasional 'shing' and 'pop' sound effects are heard, synchronized with text appearances on screen. (3) The vocal performance remains continuous and energetic throughout the transition to the home setting. (4) Sounds of light chewing and paper rustling are mixed into the dialogue during the tasting segment. (5) The music continues at a steady volume until a sharp cut-off at the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo; '味道超炸裂!' (Flavor is explosive!) in yellow and red bubble text; '泰式打拋豬風味披薩' (Thai Basil Pork Flavor Pizza) in large bold blue and white characters. (2) Functional Text: White subtitles tracking the spoken Chinese dialogue appear at the bottom center. (3) Functional Text: '$ 249' appears on screen. (4) Decorative Text: '十分 非常值得買' (10 points, very worth buying) with starburst effects. (5) Decorative Text: '味道超乎預期' (Flavor exceeds expectations) in light blue bubbles.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Product Close-up -> Review and tasting at home

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a Costco price tag for 'Alaskan Smoked Sockeye' priced at $500, with a woman's hand pointing at the figure. (2) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and a black vest, picks up two vacuum-sealed packs of smoked salmon and shows them excitedly to the camera. (3) She holds the salmon close to her face while talking and gesturing with her hands. (4) Another hand enters the frame from the left to point at the expiration date on the package. (5) The woman puts the salmon back on the shelf and then points at other products in the refrigerated section of the warehouse club.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice asks a question off-camera, followed by another female voice (the main character) responding with a high-pitched, excited tone about the discount from $799 to $500. (2) Upbeat, rhythmic pop-style background music with a steady beat begins. (3) The main character continues to speak rapidly about the value of the product, with audible sounds of plastic packaging being handled. (4) A second female voice joins the conversation briefly to ask about the expiration date. (5) The audio concludes with the main speaker giving a location recommendation over the music and ambient hum of a commercial refrigerator.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '限時特價 超便宜燻鮭魚' (Limited time special, super cheap smoked salmon) - Hook text with a bold, colorful style. (2) '你是銷售人員嗎' (Are you a sales person?) - Functional dialogue text. (3) '原價799現在只要500塊' (Original price 799 now only 500) - Functional price information. (4) '折了299元' (Discounted by 299 yuan) - Emphasis text. (5) '太便宜了吧' (Too cheap!) - Decorative emotional hook. (6) '我們在桃園南崁店' (We are at the Taoyuan Nankan store) - Functional location information.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Price reveal) -> Product demonstration -> Comparison/Value proof -> Location CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco warehouse setting where a woman wearing a beret and a light-colored vest is holding and demonstrating a light blue hooded outdoor blanket. (2) She unfolds the blanket to show its large size and the hooded feature, wrapping it around herself. (3) She highlights the contrast between the waterproof outer layer and the soft, light-blue fleece interior. (4) She demonstrates how the blanket can be folded and stored into a built-in bag. (5) The camera pans to show shelves filled with the same product in various colors like dark green, purple-blue, and orange-red. (6) Close-ups of the packaging and price tags follow, showing the discount. (7) The woman concludes by posing with the product and a peace sign.

(2) A female voice speaks in an energetic and high-pitched tone, introducing the product and its features. (3) A male voice (off-screen) occasionally chimes in with supportive comments and reactions. (4) Ambient noise of a large retail warehouse (faint chatter, cart movements) is present in the background. (5) The music and dialogue continue throughout without significant shifts in the soundscape.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top of the frame throughout. (2) Hook/Decorative Text: '露營神器！折扣200' (Camping tool! Discount 200) in large, colorful characters at the bottom. (3) Subtitles: '連帽絨毛的' (Hooded fleece), '超厚被被外套' (Super thick blanket jacket), '看起來好溫暖哦' (Looks so warm), '防水' (Waterproof), '刷絨' (Fleece-lined), '袋子可以收進去' (Bag can be tucked in), '折扣200' (Discount 200). perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a POV shot from a moving scooter heading toward a Costco warehouse entrance; large text overlays and a cartoon character (Ralph) are visible. (2) A rapid-fire montage begins, showcasing various grocery products stacked on shelves inside the store. (3) Each product is displayed for approximately 1-2 seconds, including vacuum-packed beef, frozen fish, boxes of snacks, juices, wines, fruits, and household cleaning supplies. (4) The camera pans across aisles and into refrigerators, ending with a shot of pink Care Bears plush toys.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic dance music starts immediately. (2) A male voice speaks in a very fast, rhythmic, and enthusiastic tone, introducing the 'Costco Weekly Special.' (3) Throughout the video, the same male voice rapidly calls out the name of each product and its discounted price in sync with the visual cuts. (4) Background ambient noise of the warehouse is non-existent, replaced entirely by the studio-quality vocal recording and BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 好市多 每週特價速報 03/03~03/09 記得追蹤我們' - Informative and inviting tone. (2) Functional Text: For each item shown, text displays the brand, product name, 'Original Price' (原價), 'Discount' (-金額), and 'Special Price' (特價). (3) Brands mentioned include 美國特選, 萬歲牌, 盛香珍, 義美, POCKY, 明治, 嘉芬娜, 麗滋, RICHY, 樂事, MENAGE A TROIS, 桂格, 樂天, 奇美, UCC, 李施德霖, 吉列, and 善存.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a black safety net on a trampoline inside a warehouse store, featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and large yellow-and-red text. (3) A female character in a black dress and white shirt walks alongside the trampoline to demonstrate its immense size, gesturing with her hands. (4) A close-up shot shows a hand pulling the heavy-duty zipper of the trampoline's mesh enclosure. (5) The female character stands in a Costco aisle lined with various toy boxes, talking directly to the camera with a cheerful and playful expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic guitar and keyboard music begins. A young female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin Chinese. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect plays as the price text appears. (3) The music continues at a steady volume as the female narrator describes the features of the trampoline. (4) Faint ambient sounds of a warehouse environment, including distant chatter and cart movements, are mixed with the music. (5) The female voice shifts to a more whining, playful tone as she expresses a desire to go inside the trampoline.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Huge Trampoline' in large yellow characters with red outlines. (2) Functional Text: '34,999' indicating the price. (3) Functional Text: '10-foot jumping trampoline' and 'comes with basketball hoop' describing product specs. (4) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout translating the spoken dialogue. (5) Decorative Text: 'I really want to go in' in pink and blue stylized text.

(2) The male voice delivers a pun-based punchline about chrysanthemums being 'itchy' (a Mandarin pun on 'easy to raise'). (3) The female voice continues narrating her observations of the cute flower arrangements while the background ambient noise remains consistent. No background music is detected.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video begins with a female host in a warehouse store holding two animal-themed pillows; a Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of a hand with a green ring pointing at embroidered dogs (Schnauzer, Dachshund, French Bulldog) on a blue pillow. (3) The host holds up a pink pillow featuring various cat breeds, smiling and speaking towards the camera while shifting the products. (4) Detailed close-ups highlight the texture of the embroidery on both pillows. (5) The host stands in the aisle holding both pillows simultaneously, looking at the camera with an enthusiastic expression as she compares the 'cat' and 'dog' versions. (6) The video concludes with her displaying the cat pillow while turning her body slightly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, cheerful electronic pop music starts with a fast tempo. An energetic female voice begins speaking immediately, describing the items. (2) Ambient warehouse sounds including distant chatter and mechanical hums are present but kept low in the mix. (3) A calm, off-screen male voice enters the conversation, reacting to the product details and interacting with the female host. (4) The music remains consistent in volume as the dialogue between the two speakers continues through to the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '刺繡的動物' (Embroidered animals) - informative tone. (2) Hook: '刺繡動物抱枕 399元' (Embroidered animal pillow 399 NTD) - promotional tone. (3) Hook: '你是貓控？還是狗控？' (Are you a cat person? Or a dog person?) - engaging tone. (4) Decorative: '好可愛喔' (So cute) - emotional tone. (5) Functional: '雪納瑞做的特別漂亮' (The Schnauzer is made particularly beautiful) - descriptive tone. (6) Hook: '貓派狗派一次滿足' (Cat/Dog factions satisfied at once) - persuasive tone. (7) Functional: '這個是橘貓 因為胖嘟嘟的' (This is an orange cat because it's chubby) - humorous tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in a Costco warehouse, holding a massive, vacuum-sealed slab of raw beef. (3) The scene transitions to a brightly lit kitchen. Hands wearing black nitrile gloves use a professional chef's knife to trim silver skin and slice the large slab of beef on a wooden cutting board. Different cuts and the marbling of the meat are showcased as they are placed into bowls.

Sounds of a busy supermarket environment are faintly audible. (2) The music continues as a dialogue between a man and a woman begins. They discuss the origin and quality of the beef. (3) The rhythmic sound of a sharp knife slicing through meat becomes prominent. The conversation shifts to discussing the performance of the knife being used.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Costco Wholesale logo appears at the top. Subtitles translate the dialogue: '這一個一大塊' (This one is a big piece), '多少錢?' (How much?), '1300元'. (2) Decorative Text: '超值得' (Super worth it), '澳洲嫩肩里肌 399元' (Australian Oyster Blade 399 NTD), '不用特價就很便宜哦' (It's cheap even without a sale). (3) Content/Tone Text: '這一包是美國牛' (This pack is US beef), 'yes it's America貨' (Yes it's an American product), '筋...算蠻少的' (The tendons... are quite few), '新刀刀' (New knife), '小旬切牛刀' (Shun petty knife).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a POV shot of a shopping cart moving through a Costco warehouse, overlaid with a large title card featuring a cartoon character and the text 'Costco Weekly Special Report'. (2) A rapid-fire montage follows, where the camera cuts every 1.5 to 2 seconds to a different product on a shelf, in a refrigerator, or in a display bin. The items shown include stacks of toilet paper, packaged beef, frozen fish, boxes of snacks (Pocky, Meiji), bottles of wine and whiskey, crates of apples, boxes of beer, and various household items like laundry detergent and skincare products. (3) The camera remains in a handheld POV style, often moving slightly towards the products as they are presented, with shoppers and warehouse aisles visible in the background of most shots. (4) The video concludes with a final shot of a laundry detergent product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music track with a strong, rhythmic beat starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male narrator begins speaking in a high-energy, enthusiastic tone, introducing the Costco specials. (3) As the visual montage of products plays, the narrator announces the name and the discounted price of each specific item in a rapid-fire, rhythmic manner that synchronizes with the visual cuts. (4) Ambient warehouse sounds like distant chatter and the rolling of carts are audible in the background but are heavily masked by the music and the prominent narration. (5) No sound effects (SFX) are used beyond the background music and vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '好市多 每週特價速報 03/10~03/16 記得追蹤我們' (Costco Weekly Special Report 03/10~03/16 Remember to follow us) appears at the start in a variety-show style with a cartoon avatar. (2) Functional Text: For every product shown, a large text block appears in the center of the screen listing the brand name, product name, original price, discount amount, and the final 'Special Price' in Traditional Chinese. (3) Emotional Tone: The text is large, colorful (often yellow and pink), and designed to create a sense of urgency and excitement about the deals.

perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic background music starts. A high-pitched, excited female voice begins speaking about a deal. (2) The music continues as the female speaker discusses price and color options. A mechanical tinkling sound of a music box playing 'Winter Wonderland' is heard when the green tin is handled. (3) The upbeat music continues to play through the end of the clip as the speaker's voice fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '一次擁有 音樂盒 + 奶油餅乾' (Own both at once: Music box + Butter cookies) - Enthusiastic hook. (2) '349元 這麼大一桶' (349 yuan, such a big bucket) - Informative. (3) '我覺得藍色很漂亮' (I think the blue one is very pretty) - Subjective opinion. (4) '我來的時候發現他已經被凹爆了' (I found it was already dented when I arrived) - Observation. (5) '小朋友應該會喜歡' (Kids should like it) - Suggestion. (6) '也有餅乾喔' (There are also cookies) - Informative.

(3) Both characters laugh as they spot the Luigi doll; the ambient sound is low, suggesting a relatively quiet store environment. It aims to showcase the cuteness and quality of new Sanrio plush arrivals while using a lighthearted, humorous interaction between a couple to engage the audience. It provides practical information such as price and softness to encourage viewers to purchase the item.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of products with pricing information and positive emotional reaction in a specific store (Costco).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: On-screen/off-screen banter between partners, variety-show style text bubbles.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of text overlays to maintain engagement in a short-form format. The presence of the Luigi plush acts as a 'comedic break' in the middle of a very feminine-coded scene.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a fuzzy grey cardigan and a black dress, stands in a Costco warehouse store. She gestures excitedly toward the bakery section where packages of muffins are stacked. (2) She picks up a clear plastic container containing six large chocolate muffins, showing it to the camera while speaking. The camera focuses on the product and the price tag indicating $135. (3) The scene cuts between her talking and close-up shots of various muffin flavors, including coffee walnut and chocolate chip, as she walks along the aisle. (4) In the final segment, she pushes a red shopping cart, giving a thumbs-up to the camera while finishing her explanation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays immediately. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone, accompanied by occasional interjections from an off-camera male voice. (2) The background features a steady hum of ambient noise typical of a large warehouse store, including the clattering of shopping carts and muffled background conversations. (3) As the woman describes the muffins and the new pricing policy, the music continues at a consistent volume. (4) The vocals remain energetic until the end, concluding with a cheerful sign-off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is persistent at the top. Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the spoken dialogue throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large captions appear frequently, such as '注意新制度 瑪芬可以單買' (Notice the new system, muffins can be bought individually) and '現在可以買一盒' (Now you can buy one box). (3) Content & Tone: Variety-show style text like '21塊' (21 dollars), '超棒' (Awesome), and '保存的問題' (Storage issues) appear in colorful bubbles to emphasize the host's points and create a playful, helpful tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Demonstration -> Price/Benefit Explanation -> CTA/Outro

The host emphasizes the convenience for small households and the low cost per unit to encourage viewers to visit and try the muffins.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young Asian women stand outside the Vieshow Cinemas entrance, smiling and talking directly to the camera. (2) Transition to the inside of a brightly lit yogurt shop called 'YoGo'; one woman in a pink beret points enthusiastically at the counter. (3) Close-up shots of yogurt soft serve being dispensed into cups and topped with chocolate syrup, blueberries, and green grapes. (4) One woman sits at a table and tastes a spoonful of yogurt containing wasabi peas, her expression turning into one of pleasant surprise and satisfaction. (5) The other woman holds up a cup of yogurt with green pea toppings to the camera while talking. (6) Final shots show the women continuing to eat and interact with the camera in the shop.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music begins. Two female voices are heard speaking Mandarin with high-pitched, excited tones. (2) Ambient noise of a public mall and the quiet hum of a shop environment are audible beneath the dialogue. (3) The sound of a spoon clinking against a paper cup and soft crunching noises are heard as the women eat. (4) The music remains consistent in volume as the primary female voice describes the toppings and the taste, with occasional short sound effects like a 'ding' for emphasis.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '跟大家分享一個' - Functional text introducing the topic. (2) '我們超愛吃的' - Decorative hook text expressing love for the food. (3) '復活！優格霜淇淋' - Decorative title highlighting the 'revival' of the yogurt soft serve. (4) '還加了馬修優格' - Functional text identifying the addition of Matthew's Choice yogurt. (5) '神奇配料' - Hook text pointing to unique toppings. (6) '第二杯' / '第五杯' - Decorative text tracking their consumption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at mall entrance -> Discovery of the shop -> Detailed product showcase -> Tasting and review.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a vibrant Costco Wholesale logo and a cartoon character overlay with text announcing weekly specials. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing a different product on Costco's shelves or in coolers, including kitchen towels, character pillows, vacuum-packed beef, snack boxes, nuts, and egg rolls. (3) The items are presented in quick succession, often with hands visible adjusting or presenting the product. (4) The sequence continues through various departments, showing wine, dairy products, seafood, and household goods like sanitary pads and toys. (5) The video concludes with a quick shot of a makeup eraser set.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic male voice immediately begins speaking over an upbeat, fast-paced electronic background track. (2) As the visuals transition between products, the narrator rapidly lists the name and promotional price of each item without pause. (3) The background music maintains a constant, high-energy rhythm throughout the entire video. (4) No ambient store noise is audible; the audio is a clean studio recording of the voiceover and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Costco Weekly Special Report 03/24-03/30' serves as a hook at the start. (2) Functional Text: Each product is accompanied by large, colorful text showing the product name, 'Original Price', 'Discount Amount', and 'Special Price'. (3) Decorative Text: 'Remember to follow us' is consistently displayed at the bottom to encourage viewer engagement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women standing in front of a 'CASETiFY STUDIO' store, gesturing excitedly and jumping slightly. (2) Transitions to an indoor room where one woman in a yellow sweater holds a phone case with Chiikawa characters to her face, posing with wide-eyed expressions. (3) A sequence of close-ups follows, showing Chiikawa plushies, a laptop decorated with 'Chiikawa Airlines' stickers, and various phone cases and card holders featuring animated characters. (4) The women hold up multiple phones with different themed cases to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy J-pop style background music with electronic elements begins immediately. Two female voices are heard shouting excitedly in Mandarin Chinese. (2) The music continues as a female voice rhythmically repeats 'U-wa-wa' sounds, coinciding with the product demonstration. (3) The upbeat BGM remains dominant while occasional high-pitched vocal reactions and descriptions in Mandarin are audible. (4) The audio ends with a bright musical flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'casetify 吉伊卡哇聯名' (Casetify x Chiikawa Collaboration) and '超可愛手機殼' (Super cute phone cases) appear as large, stylized hooks at the start. (2) Functional Text: '屋哇哇屋哇' (U-wa-wa-wa) appears as variety-style captions matching the vocal sounds. (3) Decorative Text: 'Chiikawa AIRLINES' is seen on a laptop decal. (4) Content Text: '草むしり 5級' and '3級' (Weeding level 5/3) appear on card holder products.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a purple cardigan and fuzzy hat is at a Costco warehouse, standing in front of a stack of pink chocolate boxes. She gestures excitedly towards the product. (2) She picks up a box labeled 'Truffettes de France - French Guimauves' and brings it close to the camera, showing a heart-shaped chocolate illustration. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the same woman is joined by another female friend. They have several individually wrapped chocolates spread out on a table. (4) The main character holds a bitten chocolate to the camera to show the white marshmallow and raspberry filling inside. (5) Both women taste the chocolates, reacting with joyful expressions and thumbs-up gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaks quickly in Mandarin about a new product discovery. (2) Sounds of the store environment, such as distant chatter and the rustling of boxes, are faintly audible under the speech. (3) The audio remains consistent as the scene shifts indoors, with the two female voices engaging in a lively dialogue about the flavor and texture of the chocolate. (4) Distinct sounds of biting into a crispy shell and plastic packaging being opened are heard clearly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; '話題新品 不容錯過' (New hot product, don't miss it) and '黑巧克力 覆盆莓棉花糖' (Dark chocolate raspberry marshmallow) in large bubbles. (2) Functional text: '329元 有 510克' (329 NTD for 510g) indicating the price and weight. (3) Effect text: '超乎我的預期' (Exceeded my expectations) and '最厲害是它的棉花糖' (The best part is its marshmallow) appearing with bright colors and stars to emphasize the review points.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping discovery at Costco -> Unboxing and price reveal -> Home tasting and texture review -> Final recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white bucket hat, a denim jumper, and a plaid shirt sits at a restaurant table, smiling and gesturing as she speaks to the camera. (2) She brings out a small cloth bag and a stack of cash, placing them on the table near a green dice bowl. (3) Another woman with long black hair and a lavender top is seen sitting next to her, reacting with excitement. (4) The main woman places a black cup over the dice and shakes it, then reveals the result to the camera. (5) Several rounds of dice rolling follow, with the main woman putting varying amounts of cash into red and colorful envelopes. (6) A small white dog is briefly seen sitting next to the second woman. (7) The video concludes with the main woman holding the cash and making a finger-heart gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music plays continuously throughout. (2) A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone, introducing a game to her 'partners'. (3) The sharp, rhythmic sound of dice rattling inside a plastic cup is heard several times. (4) Multiple voices (male and female) are heard laughing, cheering, and reacting to the dice results. (5) The main speaker counts out loud and describes the prize amounts. (6) Ambient restaurant noise, including the clinking of glassware, is audible in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '獎金自己骰' (Prize money roll it yourself) and '春酒18骰子' (Spring wine 18 dice) appear as large, colorful header text. (2) Functional subtitles follow the dialogue: '我準備了一個小遊戲' (I prepared a small game), '1點就是1,000元獎金' (1 point is 1,000 dollars prize). (3) Large animated numbers like '2,000', '6,000', and '3,000' appear when the dice results are shown. (4) Emotional captions like '加油' (Go for it) and '謝謝老闆' (Thank you boss) appear during the prize distribution.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Game Rules -> Dice Rolling Rounds -> Prize Distribution -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two women sitting at a table in a food court, with a Costco Wholesale logo prominently displayed at the top. (2) There is a close-up of a menu board showing 'Japanese Oden' for 99 NTD, followed by a top-down view of a white bowl containing various oden ingredients. (3) The women systematically lift and display individual items using forks: a large piece of radish, sliced chikuwa, shrimp paste balls, a very large stuffed fish ball, a pork ball, and pieces of tempura. (4) One woman takes a bite of the radish while the other sips the soup from the bowl. (5) They show a close-up of the stuffed fish ball after taking a bite to reveal the inside. (6) The video ends with both women giving a thumbs-up and displaying ratings on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo lo-fi background music plays throughout. (2) Two female voices speak in Mandarin, introducing the Costco item and its price. (3) As each ingredient is shown visually, the voices identify them and describe their texture or size. (4) Ambient sounds of a busy indoor environment, such as distant chatter and mechanical humming, are audible. (5) Short sound effects like 'dings' and 'pops' occur when text overlays appear. (6) The voices express appreciation for the taste, particularly the soup and the large fish ball.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo. (2) Hook Text: '好吃嗎? 好市多關東煮 99元' (Is it delicious? Costco Oden 99 NTD). (3) Ingredient Labels: (1) '首先有蘿蔔' (First there is radish), (2) '半塊的蘿蔔' (Half a radish), (3) '兩個半截的竹輪' (Two halves of chikuwa), (4) '兩塊蝦滑' (Two shrimp paste pieces), (5) '一個超大的包包' (A huge stuffed ball), (6) '貢丸也給的很大顆' (The pork ball is also very large), (7) '兩個半片的甜不辣' (Two half pieces of tempura). (4) Descriptive Text: '吸飽湯汁' (Soaked in soup), '好好吃' (Very delicious), '及格' (Pass), '7.5分' (7.5 points).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Ingredient Showcase -> Tasting -> Verdict

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women standing in front of a Costco warehouse at night. One woman leans on a shopping cart, and both are smiling as they address the camera. Large text overlays dominate the upper and lower portions of the frame. (2) A quick cut shows a close-up of a person's hand scanning a membership card at a red scanning kiosk inside the entrance. (3) The scene returns to the two women outside. One woman holds up a Costco membership card to demonstrate how to scan the barcode. A small circular inset appears showing a close-up of the scanning interface. They continue gesturing and speaking enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice starts speaking in Mandarin Chinese, providing information in a friendly and clear tone. (2) The vocal narration continues smoothly over the music, explaining the new entry procedures. Occasional very low-level background ambient noise from the outdoor setting is audible but suppressed. (3) The music and the energetic vocal delivery remain consistent until the end of the clip, maintaining a lively tempo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' (Logo). (2) Hook Text: '新制上路 掃臉才能入場' (New system implemented, face scan required for entry - Exciting/Urgent tone). (3) Functional Text: '好市多現在進去 都要刷會員卡' (Entering Costco now requires scanning membership card - Informative tone). (4) Functional Text: '或者是手機上的 APP去掃描' (Or use the app on your phone to scan - Instructional tone). (5) Functional Text: '然後他的顯示器 就會有你拍照的臉' (Then the display will show your registered face photo - Explanatory tone). (6) Decorative Text: '也可以用APP刷' (Can also use the app - Reminder tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Demonstration -> Instructional Advice

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a Costco-style setting holding a white takeout bento box of braised pork rice. (2) The camera cuts to close-up shots of the bento, revealing rice topped with minced pork, small sausages, a whole egg, and sliced cucumbers. (3) A shot of the food counter price tag shows '99' dollars. (4) The women take turns eating the various components of the bento, using forks, showing positive facial expressions such as wide eyes and nodding. (5) A packet of Formosa Chang (Hu Xu Zhang) braised pork is briefly shown on screen for comparison. (6) The video ends with the women giving hand gestures indicating a score.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music starts immediately with a fast tempo. (2) An enthusiastic male voiceover provides a fast-paced narration, describing the surprise of finding braised pork rice at Costco. (3) The on-screen women's voices are heard reacting with 'Mmm' and describing the texture of the pork as 'QQ' (chewy) and the sauce as flavorful. (4) Sound effects such as 'ding', 'pop', and 'wow' are layered over key visual highlights. (5) The music remains consistent in volume and energy until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: '好市多竟然有賣滷肉飯?' (Costco actually sells braised pork rice?), '99元吃看看' (99 yuan, let's try it). (2) Decorative/Effect text: '滷肉便當' (Braised pork bento), '一個貢丸' (One meatball), '好香喔' (So fragrant), '滷肉量給的很多' (Lots of braised pork given). (3) Emotional 'hooks': '99塊我究竟是不是盤子呢' (Am I a sucker for 99 yuan?), '我會給他8分' (I'll give it 8 points).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Price/Ingredient Reveal -> Component-by-component Tasting -> Final Verdict

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a white shrug stands in front of a Costco freezer, pointing at boxes of Milo ice cream. (2) The scene shifts to close-ups of the product packaging in the store. (3) Transition to an indoor home setting where two women sit at a table with the product box. (4) One woman holds up an ice cream bar, showing its texture and size compared to her fingers. (5) A close-up shows the ice cream bar bitten in half, with white liquid filling flowing out. (6) Both women eat the ice cream, nodding and showing enthusiastic facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music plays continuously throughout. (2) A male narrator provides a energetic voiceover, describing product details and price. (3) Occasional high-pitched female exclamations and laughter are heard from the onscreen creators. (4) Crisp sound effects (SFX) such as a 'crunch' sound when biting the ice cream and 'pop' sounds for text transitions are audible. (5) Sound of environmental hum at the beginning fades into clear studio-quality dialogue during the review phase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout the intro. (2) Functional Text: '299元 每支24.92' indicates price. (3) Hook Text: '超級黑馬' (Super dark horse) and '冰淇淋' (Ice cream) in colorful floating bubbles. (4) Functional Text: '雀巢美祿的 牛奶流心雪糕' (Nestle Milo Milk Flowing Heart Ice Cream). (5) Descriptive Text: '口感很好' (Texture is good) and '很好吃' (Very delicious) emphasize the taste review. (6) '這是目前的 第三根' (This is our 3rd stick) indicates popularity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product demonstration -> Home tasting and detailed review

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a female hand reaching into a hole in a stacked pink box, grabbing a large stack of cosmetic sample sachets. (2) Two women are standing in a department store in front of a cherry blossom decoration, holding Shu Uemura shopping bags and gesturing towards the camera. (3) On-screen graphics show a promotional poster for a 'Mother's Day' event. (4) One woman demonstrates a 'reverse hand' technique to the camera. (5) The woman in the zebra-patterned hat reaches back into the pink box and pulls out an exceptionally large stack of sachets, which a staff member helps her catch in a bag. (6) The second woman attempts the grab and gets a significantly smaller amount. (7) The woman in the zebra hat is shown sitting at a table completely covered with 230 sample sachets and several full-sized cosmetic bottles, smiling and giving a thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic BGM starts immediately. A female voice exclaims in surprise and excitement about the amount being grabbed. (2) Two female voices engage in a fast-paced, enthusiastic dialogue, explaining the rules of the 'grab' event with professional vlog-style clarity. (3) Occasional 'ding' and 'swish' sound effects accompany the appearance of text and stickers. (4) The BGM continues as a steady, rhythmic background while the women cheer and count the samples. (5) The video ends with a summary spoken in a friendly, high-pitched tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '快要被你拆台了' (You're about to tear the stand down!) - Shocked/Humorous tone. (2) '百貨公司週年慶' (Department store anniversary sale) - Functional info. (3) '2025母親節 百貨限定' (2025 Mother's Day, Dept Store Exclusive) - Promotional hook. (4) '明星正貨一把抓' (Grab star products in one go) - Functional info. (5) '反手' (Reverse hand) - Technique tip. (6) '230包 全部是免費' (230 packs, all free) - Achievement/Excitement tone. (7) '我覺得很好玩' (I think it's very fun) - Personal endorsement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Initial grab) -> Intro/Explanation -> Technique Demo -> Comparison -> Results/Haul summary.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a black top stands in a warehouse aisle, holding a red box containing three plush pet toys. A large Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) Close-up shots of the three toys: a yellow chicken, a white cow, and a green alligator. The toys have exaggerated facial expressions. Hands are shown squeezing the toys to demonstrate their softness and functionality. (3) The camera pans to a price tag on the shelf showing '$579'. (4) The woman holds the alligator toy, comparing it to the size of her hand. (5) Various close-ups of the packaging and the 'Squeaker inside' label are shown while hands interact with the toys. (6) The video ends with the woman holding the full box of toys, looking at the camera and smiling.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic pop background music starts and continues throughout. (2) A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, commenting on the funny faces of the toys. (3) An off-screen male voice joins in, discussing the price and sharing an anecdote about buying similar toys for a pet named 'A-mu'. (4) Frequent high-pitched squeaking sound effects (SFX) are heard whenever the toys are squeezed on screen. (5) The voices maintain a humorous and friendly tone until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo remains at the top. (2) Functional subtitles translate the dialogue in Mandarin. (3) Decorative/Effect text appears throughout: '你那什麼臉' (What's with that face - humorous), '長得那麼可愛' (Looks so cute - admiring), '超便宜的' (Super cheap - hook), '落水雞' (Drowned chicken - humorous nickname), and '推薦' (Recommended - call to action).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Product Demo -> Price Information -> Personal Anecdote -> Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white fluffy jacket over a brown tiered dress, stands in a large warehouse store. She excitedly gestures toward a stack of green and yellow Doritos Dinamita boxes. (2) She picks up a box, turns it around to show the labeling, and points at the shelves. A quick shot shows a shelf price tag for the product. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor room with warmer lighting. Two women sit at a table; the first woman is joined by a friend wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat. (4) They hold a single bag of the snacks, open it to show the rolled chips inside, and begin eating. They use expressive hand gestures and facial expressions, such as wide eyes and nodding, while holding the chips and the bag up to the camera. (5) They continue the tasting, showing a small plate with the chips and pointing at the packaging details.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic, high-pitched female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese. Upbeat, rhythmic pop music with a steady electronic beat plays in the background. Subtle ambient warehouse noise like distant chatter and cart sounds are heard. (2) The sound of plastic crinkling is heard clearly as a snack bag is opened. (3) Loud, crisp crunching sound effects accompany the women biting into the chips. (4) Two female voices engage in a fast-paced, enthusiastic conversation, alternating between speaking and reacting. The music remains consistent in tempo and volume until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Costco Wholesale' logo at the top. (2) Hook Text: '7小時前新上的' (Just arrived 7 hours ago) in yellow. (3) Decorative Text: '多力多滋迷們出動了' (Doritos fans, let's go) with pink heart stickers. (4) Descriptive Text: '超麻超爽 青花椒風味' (Super numbing and cool, Green Peppercorn flavor). (5) Functional Text: '259元', '裡面有8包' (Price: 259, 8 bags inside) describing product details. (6) Subtitles: Chronological transcription of the spoken review focusing on the spicy and numbing taste sensations.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store Discovery -> Price/Packaging Reveal -> Home Unboxing -> Tasting Reaction
