perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a title overlay featuring a plush green dragon toy in a warehouse setting, with the Costco logo and text announcing a special report. (2) The scene cuts rapidly every 1-2 seconds between different product displays on shelves, including a green toy F1 car, Kleenex tissue bundles, and tins of Fernleaf milk powder. (3) The sequence continues through various aisles, showing boxes of Viva snacks, nougat bags, Hershey's chocolate, cheese crackers, and packages of Bee Cheng Hiang pork jerky. (4) Frozen and refrigerated sections are shown, featuring boxes of Cesar dog food, Kid-O biscuits, Oreo packs, and pre-packaged meals like curry and shrimp. (5) The final segments display rows of alcoholic beverages (red wine, beer), household products like Parodontax toothpaste and Alpecin shampoo, and large bottles of Nature Made supplements.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately and remains constant. An energetic male voice provides an enthusiastic introduction. (2) As the visuals cut between products, the male voiceover chronologically lists each item's name and its special price in a rhythmic, sales-oriented tone. (3) The audio remains clear and professionally mixed, with no significant ambient store noise or sound effects, maintaining a consistent high-energy promotional atmosphere until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text appears at the start: "Costco Weekly Special Report 04/07-04/13, Remember to follow us". (2) Functional text overlays every product shot, listing identifying names such as "F1 Children's Electric Toy Car", "Kleenex Three-layer Toilet Paper", and "Fernleaf New Zealand Top Grade Milk Powder". (3) Specific pricing information is provided for every item: "Original Price", "Discount Amount", and "Special Price" (e.g., "Original Price 6599, -1400, Special Price 5199"). (4) Some products include regional functional text like "Limited Special Price Taoyuan Nankan Store".

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid sequential display of discounted products with price overlays -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black vest and white shirt is browsing the refrigerated section of a Costco, picking up a pack of Anne's Table Clam Chowder. (2) The camera zooms in on the product and the price tag on the shelf. (3) The scene shifts to the same woman at home, wearing a blue sweater and pigtails, stirring a thick white soup with a black spoon to show the clams and potatoes inside. (4) She shows the packaging again and then eats the soup by dipping bread into it, making enthusiastic facial expressions. (5) Finally, she and another woman sit at a table, gesturing with their hands as they explain how to eat the soup and what not to add to it.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop music plays throughout. An excited, high-pitched female voice speaks about the product found at Costco. (2) A deep-toned male voice is heard off-screen, contributing to the conversation about the price and the product's origin in Canada. (3) Subtle sound effects like 'pop' and 'ting' sounds occur when text overlays appear. (4) The female voice's tone becomes more exaggerated and loud during the tasting sequence. (5) Towards the end, two distinct female voices engage in a dialogue, providing serving suggestions and warnings about the flavor intensity.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'ANNE'S TABLE CLAM CHOWDER', '$499', '一袋 250 元' (250 yuan per bag). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '小朋友你在拿什麼' (What are you taking, kid?), '成人版的蛤蜊濃湯' (Adult version of clam chowder) in a playful tone. (3) Effect Text: '非常濃郁' (Very rich), '料超級多' (Super many ingredients) emphasizing the quality. (4) Instructional Text: '非常重口味的湯' (Very heavy flavored soup), '適合配麵包' (Suitable with bread), '不要加水' (Do not add water).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping intro -> Product showcase -> Home cooking/tasting -> Final discussion and tips.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women sitting on a leather sofa; one wears a fuzzy grey and black hat and eats chips, while the other wears a white dress and holds a small white dog. (2) The woman in the hat accidentally drops food, leaving a prominent brown stain on her white t-shirt. (3) A transition shows the women in a Costco warehouse, surrounded by stacks of 'Orange House' laundry detergent boxes. (4) They return to an indoor setting, demonstrating the product by holding up orange, leaf-shaped laundry pods and showing the packaging. (5) One woman places a pod into a washing machine with the stained shirt. (6) The video concludes with the woman holding up the now clean, white shirt, and both women posing with the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop background music plays throughout. (2) The sound of laughter and female voices chatting excitedly is heard initially. (3) An enthusiastic male voice-over enters, narrating the events and describing the product features in a promotional tone. (4) Sound effects such as 'ting' for highlights and 'swoosh' for transitions are used to emphasize text and visual changes. (5) Ambient sounds of a laundry machine running and the crinkling of packaging are layered in during the demonstration phases.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text '哈' (Haha) floats on screen during the opening laughter. (2) Hook text '你的衣服哈哈哈' (Your clothes hahaha) appears as the stain occurs. (3) Large branding '橘子工坊' (Orange House) and '好市多獨家' (Costco Exclusive) are displayed prominently. (4) Functional text listing prices '96入 589元' and features like '99.9% 制菌' (99.9% antibacterial) and '天然' (Natural) appear in various phases. (5) CTA/Summary text '推薦給值得穿上最好的你' (Recommended for you who deserve the best) ends the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a problem-solution narrative: Stain Incident -> Shopping at Costco -> Product Demonstration -> Clean Result -> Recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a grey camo fluffy hat and a black long-sleeved shirt stands excitedly in front of a wall of yellow gashapon machines. She gestures towards the machines while speaking directly to the camera. (2) The camera zooms in on a specific gashapon machine featuring Disney Princess Qposket figures. A hand reaches in to turn the dial, and a green plastic ball drops into the collection tray. (3) The woman retrieves the ball, opens it, and reveals a miniature Jasmine figure in a small box. She looks at the camera with a mix of laughter and mock-disappointment. (4) The scene cuts to the woman placing three identical Jasmine mini-figures in a row on a yellow surface, demonstrating her repeated luck or lack thereof.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop-style background music begins. A woman's voice is heard speaking in an excited, high-pitched tone in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects of a gashapon machine's mechanical dial clicking and the plastic ball rolling down are audible over the music. (3) The woman laughs and her tone becomes slightly exaggerated and humorous as she discovers the contents of the ball. (4) The music continues at a steady pace until the end of the clip, occasionally accompanied by cartoon-style sound effects.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '家裡空間不足了嗎？' (Is there not enough space at home?) - Hook question. (2) Functional Text: '別擔心我們來抽這個' (Don't worry, let's draw this) - Instructional. (3) Decorative Text: '超迷你 迪士尼公主 縮小迷你公仔版' (Super mini Disney Princess scaled-down mini figure version) - Product title. (4) Decorative Text: '這米粒公仔太吸引人了！' (This grain-sized figure is so attractive!) - Emotional caption. (5) Functional Text: '一抽 200 元' (200 dollars per draw) - Price information. (6) Decorative Text: '茉莉花茶' (Jasmine Tea) - Humorous pun related to the Jasmine character. (7) Functional Text: '哈哈..三..第三個' (Haha... three... the third one) - Narrative subtitle reflecting the result.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Gashapon interaction -> Discovery -> Humorous reveal

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink knit sweater and a camouflage patterned bucket hat, stands in a Costco store holding a large plastic container of seafood soup. (2) She points at the contents through the clear lid, then is joined by another woman wearing a black dress. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen/dining setting where the main character, now wearing a white sweater and a navy beret, presents the same seafood soup kit along with a separate large plastic bag of broth. (4) She uses pink chopsticks to separate and count individual shrimps on a plate and crab meat pieces in the container. (5) A metal pot on a stove is shown with the seafood soup simmering and being stirred with a black ladle, showing steam and various vegetables. (6) Both women sit at a table, eating the soup from the pot and gesturing towards the camera with enthusiastic facial expressions and hand signs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, cheerful, and fast-paced background music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice narrates her discovery at Costco. (2) The music remains constant as she discusses the price and shows the product to a friend; ambient store noise is minimal. (3) The audio quality transitions to a clearer indoor environment where two female voices discuss the ingredients and the cooking process with an excited tone. (4) Occasional 'ding' sound effects are used to highlight specific features or text appearing on screen. (5) The video ends with both women speaking in unison and laughing over the upbeat music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; 'Super Sincere Shrimp & Crab Meat Seafood Soup' in bright red and yellow variety-show style font. (2) Functional: 'This is new', '1kg 389 NTD', 'I bought it for 499 NTD'. (3) Functional: '21 Shrimp', '11 Crab meat' with 'Boing' effect text when highlighting the crab meat. (4) Decorative: 'Delicious, delicious', 'Seafood soup 1-10 points we give...', '9 Points' in large gold/red font. (5) Functional: '500 NTD for 2-4 people', '2 people will be super full'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a Shopping Discovery -> Product Unboxing -> Cooking Demo -> Tasting and Final Rating flow.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a Costco warehouse setting, a young woman wearing a blue beret and white sweater holds a multi-pack of Red Seal Propolis toothpaste. She gestures excitedly toward the stacked boxes of the product behind her. (2) The scene shifts to a bright indoor home setting where the same woman and another woman are seated at a white table. They hold the toothpaste boxes and tubes, pointing at details on the packaging. (3) A close-up shot focuses on the 'Silver Fern' certification and the 'Made in New Zealand' label on the box. (4) Both women are seen in a bathroom setting, looking into the mirror while brushing their teeth with electric toothbrushes, smiling throughout. (5) They return to the table, showing the individual tubes and performing heart-shaped hand gestures. (6) The video ends with them holding the product and waving at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks quickly in Mandarin, expressing surprise at the price of toothpaste at Costco. (2) Music continues at a steady volume as two female voices engage in a conversation. They alternate between explaining the product's natural ingredients and its lack of chemical additives. (3) Occasional high-pitched sound effects (ding, pop) are synced with text overlays. (4) The sound of electric toothbrushes humming is briefly audible during the bathroom scene. (5) The voices maintain a friendly, enthusiastic tone until the end, concluding with a call for comments.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. Subtitles translate the Mandarin speech throughout. (2) Decorative Text: '超扯' (Unbelievable), '比在紐西蘭買還要便宜' (Cheaper than buying in New Zealand) in large, colorful fonts. (3) Product Info: 'red seal 紅印 蜂膠牙膏' (Red Seal Propolis Toothpaste), '6入649元' (6-pack for 649 NTD). (4) Hook Text: '大容量' (Large capacity), '不含氟化物/防腐劑' (No fluoride/preservatives), '全家安心使用' (Safe for the whole family). (5) CTA: '留言 我愛刷牙牙齒好 抽三個人讓你免費試用' (Comment 'I love brushing my teeth' to win one of three free trials).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Detailed product breakdown at home -> Usage demo -> Promotional giveaway outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman standing in a Costco aisle, holding a large plastic bag containing two smaller vacuum-sealed packs; she gestures toward the camera while talking. A female voice speaks in a friendly, high-pitched tone, expressing excitement about new finds at Costco. (2) A male voice briefly responds off-camera with affirmative sounds. (3) The female continues describing the product features over the same consistent BGM. (4) Subtle sound effects like a digital 'ping' are heard when text highlights appear. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a Costco warehouse aisle; the one on the left holds a giant green Rex (Toy Story) plush. They both smile and gesture excitedly. (2) The woman on the right, wearing a blue off-the-shoulder top and a bucket hat, speaks to the camera while pointing at the plush. (3) She pulls a green and white checkered blanket out from the plush toy's back. (4) She unfolds and displays the blanket, showing silhouettes of various Toy Story characters. (5) They both hug the plush together, then the camera zooms in on the plush's face as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice introduces the 'Super Large Hugging Dragon'. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the speaker explains the price and compares the convenience of buying it at Costco versus a Disney theme park. (3) Sound effects of 'rustling' and 'pop' are heard as the blanket is pulled out. A second female voice is heard briefly saying 'Oh, so cute!'. (4) The main speaker continues describing the patterns on the blanket and the weight of the plush, concluding with a recommendation for kids' age.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo remains at the top. (2) Hook Text: '超大抱抱龍' (Super Large Hugging Dragon) with '哇' (Wow) emotional stickers. (3) Functional Text: '2249元' (2249 dollars) price tag. (4) Decorative Text: Narrates the struggle of bringing large toys home from Disney vs. Costco. (5) Functional Text: '有附毯子' (Blanket included) and '玩具總動員' (Toy Story). (6) Functional Text: Detailed description of the plush's 'healing' face and weight suitability for kids over 10.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a toy box for a remote control dinosaur in a retail warehouse. (4) Close-up shots of the box art highlight features like water-spraying, 360-degree rotation, and color variants. (5) The woman walks through the aisles of the warehouse while continuing to showcase the toy's packaging to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy, upbeat electronic pop track starts immediately. A female voice speaks in enthusiastic Mandarin about the coolness of the remote control. (2) A male voice enters the audio track, speaking off-camera, engaging in a playful dialogue with the woman about buying the toy and its cost. (3) The female voice continues to describe the toy's functions (spraying, moving), interspersed with occasional dinosaur roaring sound effects and warehouse ambient noise. (4) The music remains consistent in tempo as the two speakers laugh and conclude their discussion about the toy's target age range.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Costco Wholesale' logo is fixed at the top. '妹妹說他想要' (Sister says she wants it) appears as a hook. (2) '這是他遙控器帥爆了' (This remote control is awesome) appears as functional dialogue text. (3) '$699' and '歡樂的小孩' (Happy child) appear in stylized yellow font. (6) '普通級就是1-99歲' (General rating is 1-99 years old) appears as concluding humorous text.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women running towards the camera in front of a modern, multi-story grey stone villa. A small white dog in a pink sweater runs around the wooden floor. (3) The camera follows them to a spacious kitchen with a large white round dining table, then up a floating staircase. (4) They explore multiple bedrooms with floor-to-ceiling windows, highlighting the sunlight and views of Tainan's urban landscape at sunset. (5) One woman is seen taking a selfie in a large bathroom mirror. (6) The video concludes with the women playing with the dog in the living room as the sun sets outside.

A female voice begins narrating in Mandarin with an excited, high-pitched, and welcoming tone. (2) The music continues at a steady, fast pace throughout the house tour, maintaining the energetic atmosphere. (3) No ambient noise is heard during the tour, suggesting a studio-quality voiceover was added. (4) At the very end of the video, the background music fades slightly to let the sound of the small dog barking and the women laughing be heard clearly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "我們在台南住到一個超棒的陽光別墅" (We stayed in a super awesome sunny villa in Tainan). perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair, wearing a white shirt and a black vest, is seen in the book section of a Costco warehouse. (2) She begins flipping through a large, colorful pop-up book titled 'Sea Animal Sounds.' (3) As she turns the pages, various 3D paper constructions of sea creatures like whales, coral reefs, sharks, and albatrosses emerge. (4) The woman points at the text in the book and later holds the open book up to the camera while smiling and looking expressive. (5) In the final segment, the back of the book is shown, revealing a battery compartment and an on/off switch, followed by a close-up of the book cover.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with the woman's voice excitedly announcing they are at Costco and have found something amazing. (2) As the pages of the book are turned, high-quality electronic sound effects of ocean waves and whale vocalizations are clearly audible. (3) A male voice off-screen joins the conversation, discussing the book's features and noting that it's in English. (4) The woman imitates a whale's low-pitched, haunting call, which is followed by loud laughter from both speakers. (5) The male narrator provides a final summary of the product's price and its battery-saving features.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Wait a second, we are at Costco' - Functional, setting the scene. (2) 'Found a magical thing' - Hook, creating curiosity. (3) 'Worth buying - kids love talking storybooks' - Promotional/Recommendation. (4) 'Listen carefully' - Directive to the audience. (5) 'This is a book with sound' - Functional explanation. (6) 'No Chinese translation' - Informative critique. (7) 'Hahahaha' - Emotional/Atmospheric. (8) 'Sea Animal Sounds Pop-up Sound Book' - Functional product title. (9) 'Price 599' - Informative.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with close-up shots of "Water Buddies" kickboard product packaging on store shelves. (2) A woman wearing a white lace dress over a black top and a grey sun hat stands in a warehouse store aisle, holding two large, colorful kickboards—one shaped like a cupcake and another like a yellow smiley face. (3) She demonstrates the light weight of the boards by holding them up and flipping them to reveal solid-colored backs (blue and green). (4) She points to the cupcake design while smiling and posing with the product, showing its size relative to her body.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. (2) A female voice speaks enthusiastically, praising the cuteness and appearance of the kickboards. (3) An off-camera male voice joins the conversation, making humorous comparisons between the products and the woman. (4) The female voice continues to describe the weight (240g), buoyancy, and stability of the product as the background music maintains a consistent tempo throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "真的很好看耶" (Really looks good) - Functional Text. (2) "游泳想更有安全感?" (Want more security while swimming?) - Hook Text. (3) "299元 超可愛浮板" (299 Yuan Super cute kickboard) - Functional Text. (4) "穩定度高" (High stability) - Functional Text. (5) "Costco Wholesale" - Brand Logo.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white cardigan and brown dress is seen standing in a Costco warehouse aisle, gesturing with excitement at several boxes of red bean pastries. (2) She picks up one box, presenting it to the camera, and walks past rows of merchandise; a shot focuses on the price label on the shelf. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen or studio where the same woman and another woman in a zebra-print hat are seated at a table with the pastry box. (4) Close-ups show them opening the box, cutting a pastry to reveal the flaky layers and red bean topping, and holding the pieces toward the camera. (5) Both women are seen eating the pastry, smiling, nodding, and giving thumbs-up gestures to indicate their approval.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo background music plays immediately. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, energetic tone, expressing shock at how few pastries are left on the shelf. (2) Sounds of a busy store environment, like distant cart rolling and muffled chatter, are audible beneath the music. (3) The music continues as the location changes; two female voices engage in a lively conversation, discussing the price point and the texture of the bread. (4) Occasional 'ding' and 'sparkle' sound effects are used to highlight key points in the dialogue or visual cues. (5) The volume of the vocals remains high and clear relative to the background music until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '為什麼拍手' (Why clapping?) and '銷量超好！' (Best-selling!) appear with excited emotional emphasis. (2) Functional Information: '紅豆奶油酥' (Red Bean Butter Pastry) and '只剩下三盒' (Only 3 boxes left) describe the product status. (3) Detail Text: '6入399' (6 for 399) and '一個是66.5塊錢' (66.5 each) provide price breakdowns. (4) Instructional Text: '我加熱了145度三分鐘' (I heated it at 145 degrees for three minutes) explains the preparation. (5) Descriptive Conclusion: '好事多黑馬' (Costco's dark horse) and '真的很好吃' (Really delicious) convey a final positive review.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Discovery at store -> Product close-ups -> Home tasting and review

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in front of a shelf packed with merchandise, holding a large promotional poster for a Chiikawa scratch-off game. (2) The camera cuts to close-up shots of various Chiikawa bread-shaped plushies in plastic packaging on a table. (3) The women stand next to a large scratch-off board with numbered circles; one woman uses a metal ruler to scratch off specific spots while the other points. (4) After scratching, the woman in the blue beret excitedly holds up a small prize plushie to the lens while cheering.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat pop music begins immediately alongside two female voices speaking excitedly in Mandarin Chinese. (2) The music continues at a steady, fast tempo as the vocals explain the game's high winning probability and prize types. (3) A sharp scratching sound effect plays as the board is revealed, followed by loud, enthusiastic cheering and shouting when the prize is won. (4) The music and high-pitched vocal energy maintain through to the final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "東京限定" (Tokyo Limited), "夜市刮刮樂" (Night Market Scratch-off), and "吉伊卡哇麵包" (Chiikawa Bread) appear as large titles. (2) Hook Text: "1/3的機率會中到" (1/3 chance of winning) and "45號前全部都是大獎" (Everything before #45 is a big prize) highlight the value. (3) Functional Text: Numbers like "40號", "129", and "13號" appear to track the game progress. (4) Decorative Text: "小娃烏薩奇" (Small Doll Usagi) appears in a variety-show style bubble. (5) CTA Text: "趕快來挑戰" (Come and challenge quickly) appears at the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white lace cardigan over a brown dress, stands in front of a shelf in a Costco warehouse. She points excitedly at a large grey stone-textured Moai-shaped planter. (2) The camera zooms in on the planters, showing three different sizes and colors: a large grey stone one, a medium light-green one, and a smaller terracotta-orange one. The woman's hand touches the textures to demonstrate the material. (3) She picks up the green Moai planter to show its underside, highlighting a drainage hole. She gestures toward the price tag and the surrounding Costco environment, which includes signs for meat products and shelves of tools.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop music plays in the background. A female voice starts speaking with high excitement, introducing the Moai planters found at Costco. (2) A male voice joins off-screen, engaging in a dialogue about the price and the weight of the items. The sound of light tapping on the ceramic/stone material is heard. (3) Short sound effects like 'dings' and 'sparkle' chimes are added during key feature reveals. The female speaker concludes with a recommendation as the music maintains its lively tempo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese throughout the video translating the dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, colorful titles appear: '300元超便宜' (300 dollars super cheap), '摩艾石盆栽' (Moai stone planter), and '摩艾石控注意了' (Moai fans pay attention). (3) Content & Tone: The text uses bold fonts and emojis to convey an enthusiastic and helpful shopping guide tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two young women, one in a red dress and one in a white dress, standing before a traditional Chinese temple, smiling and gesturing at the camera. (2) Shots transition to show a bulletin board listing rules for a ritual and close-ups of colorful, boat-shaped divining blocks. (3) The women are shown kneeling on cushions inside the temple, tossing the blocks from a plate onto the floor. The woman in red raises her hands in excitement. (4) The woman in red holds a pink slip and prays with incense, later showing off a small gold pendant stored in a red velvet pouch. (5) The woman in red walks through an outdoor path lined with large, colorful sculptures of divining blocks and finally washes her hands at a dragon-themed stone basin.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice introduces the Daxi Ying Fu Song Qiu Temple. (2) The narrator continues speaking rapidly, explaining the significance of the six-colored blocks and the process of the ritual. (3) Sound effects of the wooden blocks clattering on the floor are audible, followed by an enthusiastic exclamation from the female narrator upon winning. (4) The music remains consistent as the narrator explains the prize redemption. (5) The audio concludes with the narrator offering blessings for wealth and prosperity over the continuing upbeat music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '財神送我純金金牌' (God of Wealth gave me a pure gold medal) - High-energy hook. (2) '求財必去!' (Must go to pray for wealth!) - Enthusiastic recommendation. (3) '六色聖杯' (Six-colored holy cups) - Informative context. (4) '金牌!' (Gold medal!) - Emotional celebration. (5) '黃金五分墜' (5-point gold pendant) - Specific prize description. (6) '錢錢賺不完' (Endless money-making) - Final blessing tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Ritual Introduction -> Gameplay/Participation -> Prize Reveal -> Outro/Blessings

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a black dress points enthusiastically at a shelf of toys in a brightly lit gashapon store. (3) They select blind boxes and the woman in the beret begins to unwrap one, looking excited and focused. (4) Upon opening the inner bag and seeing a pink pig toy, both women react with intense surprise, covering their mouths with their hands. (5) A close-up shot shows a hand pulling a yellow paper fortune strip from the bottom of the pink pig toy. (6) The video ends with the two women smiling and posing together with the toy and the fortune strip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately with a playful rhythm. (2) Two female voices are heard speaking excitedly in high-pitched, enthusiastic tones, often talking over each other. (3) Frequent sound effects such as 'sparkle' chimes, 'pop' noises, and 'ding' sounds are integrated with the music to emphasize specific actions. (4) Loud, sharp gasps and celebratory exclamations occur when the toy is revealed. (5) The background music remains consistent in volume and energy until the final frame.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我要這個' (I want this) - Excited and decisive tone. (2) '可以抽籤的解答豬豬' (A fortune-telling answer pig) - Informative and playful. (3) '一抽入魂!' (One pull, heart and soul!) - Emphasizing the luck of the draw. (4) '學豬叫就買給你' (Bark like a pig and I'll buy it for you) - Humorous and challenging. (5) '目標豬豬' (Target pig) - Focused intent. (6) '啊 太強了吧' (Ah, it's too strong/lucky) - Surprised and impressed tone. (7) '主動出擊' (Active strike) - Functional text from the fortune strip.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a busy title screen showing a shopping cart filled with grocery bags and produce at a Costco store, with a text overlay announcing a weekly price report for June 16th to June 22nd. (3) Products range from beverages and meats to household supplies, snacks, and frozen foods, each appearing for about 1-2 seconds. (4) The video maintains this montage style throughout, ending on a final shot of a sparkling wine package.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-paced, upbeat electronic background track begins immediately and maintains a consistent tempo throughout the video. (2) A male voiceover enters, speaking in an energetic and promotional tone, announcing the Costco weekly report. (3) For each visual cut, the male speaker quickly announces the brand name and the specific discounted price of the product shown. (4) No ambient store noises or sound effects are present; the audio consists entirely of the music bed and the clean studio-recorded voiceover.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: The intro displays '好市多 每週特價速報 06/16~06/22' (Costco Weekly Special Report) and '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us). (2) Functional/Decorative Text: Every product shot features a large central text overlay with the Brand (e.g., 'COCA COLA', 'KIRKLAND'), the product description, and pricing details: '原價' (Original Price), '-66' (Discount amount), and '特價' (Special Price) highlighted in red or yellow. (3) The text is designed to be highly legible and informative, conveying a sense of value and urgency.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a retail store where a young woman in a zebra-patterned hat holds a large, white body pillow with a cartoon face. (2) She demonstrates the pillow's length by stretching her arms, points to a price tag, and then shows the pillow's texture by hugging it. (3) The scene shifts to show different versions of the pillow with various facial expressions in a display bin. (4) Finally, she places one of the pillows into her shopping cart and walks forward.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately along with a woman's energetic voice speaking in Mandarin. (2) As she describes features, cartoon-style sound effects like 'dings' and 'boings' are interspersed with her speech. (3) The background music remains consistent in volume and rhythm throughout the middle section while her voice maintains a high-pitched, excited tone. (4) Towards the end, the sound of the shopping cart moving and faint ambient store noise can be heard as the music fades slightly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. '这是大人专用的' (This is for adults) appears as a hook. (2) Functional Text: '799元' (799 NTD) marks the price. (3) Decorative Text: '超长的凉感抱枕' (Super long cooling body pillow) and '他有100cm' (It's 100cm) highlight features. (4) Humorous Text: '好朋友不要学抽烟哦' (Good friends, don't learn to smoke) appears when showing a pillow face. (5) Descriptive Text: '墨镜酷男' (Cool guy with sunglasses) and '可爱的贪吃脸' (Cute glutton face) identify pillow designs.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Feature Demonstration -> Variety Showcase -> Action (Purchase)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women, one in a white lace dress with a zebra-print hat and another in a black dress, standing excitedly in front of a Costco Wholesale sign at night. (2) The camera pans to reveal a white and green Uber Eats delivery scooter-trike with a large cargo box, while the woman in white gestures towards it. (3) The women walk around the large green delivery box, showing its size and the 'Uber Eats' branding. (4) The scene shifts to a close-up of the two women as they talk directly to the camera, using hand gestures to emphasize points. (5) The video ends with them posing with 'thumbs up' and peace signs while looking directly at the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music begins immediately with a high-pitched, excited female voice speaking in Mandarin. (2) As the speaker highlights the delivery vehicle, the music maintains a steady tempo with minor ambient parking lot sounds like distant engine hums. (3) A distinct 'pop' sound effect occurs when key text information about the price appears. (4) The vocal density remains high as the speaker poses a final question, ending with the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '誇張！' (Incredible!) with a shocked emoji at the start. '免會員費 外送好市多！' (No membership fee, Costco delivery!) serves as the main hook. (3) Functional Text: '用 Uber Eats 也點得到' (Can also order via Uber Eats), '大約貴30%價格' (About 30% more expensive), and '你願意買嗎？' (Would you buy it?) used to convey core service details and a call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Showcase Delivery Vehicle -> Price/Service Analysis -> Interactive Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white dress and blue beret drops a blue plastic disc into a giant 'Plinko' style game board inside a Costco warehouse. (2) The disc bounces down through white pegs as she and another woman watch with anticipation and laughter. The disc lands in the '0' slot. (3) The camera shows a close-up of the price tag ($2,599) and the product packaging. (4) The woman explains how parents or bosses could use this for giving out allowance or rewards. (5) She tries again, and the disc once more lands in the '0' slot, causing both women to burst into laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. A female voice speaks excitedly about using the game for allowance. Sounds of a plastic disc clattering against pegs are heard. (2) A comical 'fail' or 'loss' sound effect plays as the disc lands on zero, followed by loud, genuine laughter from two women. (3) The main female voice continues speaking at a high speed, mentioning the price and store location. (4) Another clattering sound as the second disc is dropped. (5) The 'fail' SFX repeats, followed by even louder laughter and high-pitched exclamations of 'King of bad luck!'
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. '2599元 值得買嗎?!' (2599 yuan, is it worth buying?!) acts as the hook. '超大型 彈珠遊戲台' (Super large marble game machine) describes the product. (2) '0元' (0 yuan) appears with an emoji when the disc lands. (3) Functional text: '爸爸要給的零用錢是' (The allowance Dad wants to give is...). (4) '槓龜王欸' (The king of bad luck!) and '笑死我了' (Dying of laughter) appear as decorative/emotional captions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook/Demo -> Product/Price Detail -> Contextual Explanation -> Reaction/Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a pink beret excitedly hugging large colorful pet beds and plushies in a crowded exhibition booth. (2) She picks up a dog-shaped plushie with a yellow 'butt' pouch, demonstrating how it opens. (3) Transition to two women at a booth labeled 'Jolly Pet' with a small white dog; they are drawing a lottery ticket from a black box. (4) An informational graphic showing pet strollers and bed prices appears. (5) Back at a home setting, one woman holds a 'Crayon Shin-chan' bento-themed toy and shows its internal compartments and squeaky features to the white dog. (6) She displays a large Snoopy-themed pet sofa with the dog sitting on it. (7) Final shots show a small Jack Russell Terrier wearing a Crayon Shin-chan hat and cape.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. (2) High-pitched female vocals speak enthusiastically with frequent exclamations of 'Cute!' and 'Look at this!'. (3) Sounds of plastic rustling and a lottery box being shaken are audible during the exhibition scene. (4) Squeaky toy sound effects occur when the woman demonstrates the bento toy. (5) Narrative flow transitions from live fairground chatter to a clearer, studio-quality voiceover describing product features.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我要這個窩' (I want this nest) - Enthusiastic hook. (2) '超可愛寵物用品' (Super cute pet supplies) - Content label. (3) '屁屁走路' (Butt walking) - Humorous caption for the pouch. (4) '展場限定優惠' (Exhibition limited offers) - Functional text for pricing. (5) '手電筒娃娃' (Flashlight doll) - Product name. (6) '藏食玩具' (Treat-hiding toy) - Functional description. (7) '史努比大沙發' (Snoopy big sofa) - Product highlight.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Exhibition Discovery) -> Action (Lottery/Shopping) -> Demo (Detailed Home Showcase) -> Closing (Dog Outfits)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a gray bucket hat and blue off-the-shoulder top stands in a Costco warehouse, holding and patting a large pink rabbit-shaped cushion. Large text overlays identify the product and price. (2) The scene cuts as she showcases different animal-themed cushions: a gray penguin and a large light blue elephant. She touches the fabric to demonstrate texture and smiles enthusiastically at the camera. (3) She demonstrates the cushion's versatility by folding it and showing a button fastening that turns it into a triangular backrest. She hugs the elephant cushion tightly, then points to the 699 TWD price graphic. The video ends with her giving two thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female vocals start immediately over a fast-paced, upbeat, and playful pop BGM. She speaks enthusiastically about finding a good deal at Costco. (2) The audio remains consistent as she describes the different animal shapes and the 'cooling' feel of the fabric. Soft ambient warehouse noise is present but suppressed by the vocals and music. (3) She explains the dual-use function (cushion or pillow) with a friendly and persuasive tone. A subtle 'ding' or pop sound effect might accompany text transitions. The segment ends with a final verbal recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and '699元很值得' (699 yuan is worth it). Hook Text: '動物涼感兩用坐墊' (Animal cooling dual-purpose cushion) in large blue and white bubbles. (2) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking her speech: '你看有兔子的形狀' (Look, there's a rabbit shape), '還有企鵝' (And a penguin), '以及大象' (And an elephant). (3) Functional Text: '最重要是他捲起來呢 你就可以當靠枕' (Most importantly, when rolled up, it can be a backrest), '699元' price tag graphic, and '這個推推 夏天來了' (Highly recommend this, summer is here) as a closing hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Variety Showcase -> Functional Demo -> Price & Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a shot of a large grey plush cat in a warehouse setting, overlaid with the Costco logo and promotional text. (2) A series of rapid-fire cuts show various products on shelves or in boxes: stacks of Kirkland toilet paper, bags of Fuji apples, boxes of Pampers diapers, snacks, coffee, biscuits, and chips. (3) The sequence continues through clothing items like PUMA socks and underwear, followed by household essentials, refrigerated foods, drinks, and personal care products like toothbrushes and laundry pods. (4) The final shots feature small appliances like vacuum cleaners and ice makers, ending with health supplements and a vanity mirror.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately with a high-pitched, energetic male voice introducing the weekly specials. (2) The male voice continues a rapid-fire narration throughout the video, naming each product and its discounted price in synchronization with the visual cuts. (3) There are no significant ambient noises from the store; the audio is a clean mix of studio-recorded narration and BGM. (4) The music and vocal delivery maintain a consistent high energy until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'Costco Wholesale 好市多 每週特價速報 06/23-06/29 記得追蹤我們' (Weekly Special Report, remember to follow us). (2) Functional text appears for every product, displaying the brand name, product description, '原價' (Original Price), discount amount (e.g., -110), and '特價' (Special Price). (3) Examples of product text: 'KIRKLAND SIGNATURE 捲筒衛生紙', 'PUMA 男短襪8入組', 'TIDE 汰漬 洗衣膠囊'.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a black dress standing in a Costco warehouse in front of a stack of 'Great Day' brand almond soup boxes; she is gesturing and talking excitedly to the camera. (5) Throughout the tasting, the women use hand gestures like thumbs up and pointing to emphasize the richness of the soup while maintaining smiling and expressive facial expressions.

(2) Two female voices are heard; one is a primary narrator speaking with a bright, enthusiastic tone, and another joins in during the indoor review section. (3) Sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings' and 'pops' coincide with the appearance of text overlays. (4) The audio transitions from a slightly echoing warehouse environment to a clearer, studio-like indoor recording with minimal ambient noise.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco supermarket; a young woman with long dark hair is looking at frozen goods. (2) She points to and picks up a box of 'Wasabi Clams' by the Humble House Group. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where two women are sitting at a table. (4) They open a small vacuum-sealed plastic pouch of clams and pour it onto a blue plate. (5) They use chopsticks to pick up the clams and edamame, showing close-ups of the meat, and then taste the food while reacting to the flavor.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately. A female voice asks a question, followed by another female voice excitedly identifying a product. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume as the narrator provides details about the price and brand. Occasional 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects play when text appears. (3) In the tasting section, the narrator's voice becomes more descriptive, explaining the flavor profile. (4) The audio concludes with a cheerful sign-off over the fading music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你要買什麼' (What do you want to buy?) - functional dialogue subtitle. (2) '寒舍集團 銅板價' (Humble House Group, bargain price) - decorative hook text. (3) '55元山葵花蛤' ($55 Wasabi Clams) - factual/hook text. (4) '6入 329 總共有6包' (6 packs for 329, total 6 bags) - functional text. (5) '裡面主要的成分就是花蛤 毛豆仁' (Main ingredients: clams and edamame) - functional description. (6) '偏甜口的涼拌花蛤配毛豆' (Sweet-tasting cold clam salad with edamame) - descriptive text.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts at a Costco warehouse; a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black and white off-the-shoulder top, holds two tubs of maple pecan cream cheese while smiling and speaking to the camera. (2) The scene transitions to a brightly lit indoor home setting where two women sit at a table; the first woman from the previous scene is joined by another woman wearing a white lace top and a dark blue beret. (3) They hold the cream cheese tub, gesturing with their hands to emphasize points about the ingredients and price, showing close-ups of the container. (4) Towards the end, they both give a thumbs-up gesture and smile warmly toward the camera as decorative text bubbles appear.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat instrumental background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, energetic tone, introducing the product in a retail environment with muffled background chatter. (2) As the scene shifts to an indoor setting, the same upbeat music continues at a steady volume. Two female voices are heard; one leads the narration with an enthusiastic and informative tone, while the second voice provides supportive reactions and comments. (3) Sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings' or 'pops' coincide with the appearance of text overlays. (4) The audio remains clear and professionally recorded, with no significant ambient noise in the second half, ending with a final upbeat musical flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Hook Text: '如何保存更久' (How to preserve it longer) and '楓糖核桃乳酪醬' (Maple Pecan Cream Cheese) in stylized fonts. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles translating the spoken Mandarin Chinese throughout the video. (4) Descriptive Text: '大罐 239 元' (Large tub 239 NTD) appears in a red and yellow box. (5) Decorative Text: '經典不敗' (Classic and unbeatable) appears at the end in a speech bubble.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing in front of a refrigerated display case in a Costco warehouse; one is wearing a white dress and a navy beret, the other a black top. They hold a large pizza box and gesture excitedly towards the camera. (2) The camera zooms in on several boxes of 'Seafood Supreme Pizza' on the shelf. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor dining setting where the same two women are holding slices of the cooked pizza, pointing out the specific toppings like shrimp and squid. (4) Close-up shots of the pizza reveal melting cheese, large shrimp, and green peppers. One woman takes a bite with a satisfied facial expression, nodding and giving a thumbs-up gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin, sounding excited and welcoming. (2) The same voice continues as the music maintains a steady, rhythmic beat; environmental sounds of a warehouse (faint background chatter) are present but muffled by the voiceover. (3) The audio shifts to a cleaner indoor acoustic environment. The female voice becomes more descriptive, highlighting specific ingredients with rising intonation to show surprise. (4) The music continues at the same volume until the end, punctuated by the sounds of the women reacting with 'oohs' and 'aahs' as they taste the food.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout the first half. (2) Hook Text: '海鮮總匯披薩' (Seafood Supreme Pizza) in large yellow and red stylized font. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue, e.g., '349元裡面有蝦子蛤蜊肉跟透抽' ($349 includes shrimp, clam meat, and squid). (4) Decorative Text: '非常爽脆的口感' (Very crispy texture) and '我們給它8分' (We give it 8 points) appear with flame or sparkle stickers for emphasis.

(3) The women take turns dipping individual shrimp into the sauce, showing the interior of the fried shrimp to the camera, and eating while making various facial expressions reflecting their evaluation of the taste.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a warehouse interior shot (Costco) featuring a large title overlay about weekly special prices. (3) Each shot is either a static image or a very short pan across product packaging, featuring clear pricing information overlaid on the center of the frame. (4) The sequence continues through various departments including snacks, frozen foods, and household chemicals, ending with a shot of white wine bottles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins and continues throughout the video. (2) A male narrator with a fast, enthusiastic tone speaks continuously, reading out the names of products and their discounted prices in Mandarin. (3) No significant ambient noise or sound effects are present, as the narration and BGM dominate the audio track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: 'COSTCO 好市多 每週特價速報 07/14 - 07/20 記得追蹤我們' (Costco Weekly Special Report 07/14-07/20, remember to follow us) appearing at the start with an excited tone. (2) Functional Text: For each product, the name is shown (e.g., '橘子工坊 除臭酵素洗衣精'), followed by price breakdowns: '原價' (Original Price), a minus figure for the discount, and '特價' (Special Price) in a bold red font to emphasize savings. (3) Various brand names are visible on screen text corresponding to the items shown.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. A young woman in a white lace top and blue beret stands in a Costco aisle, smiling and holding a pre-packaged Roast Beef Salad. Two women are seated at a table, plating and tasting the salad. The main character in the beret shows extreme excitement, then coughs mid-chew. (4) Close-up shots of sauce being poured and beef being lifted with tongs. The main character ends with a thumbs-up and a peace sign.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts. A high-pitched, energetic female voice introduces the product in Mandarin. (2) Music continues as the narrator describes the ingredients. The sound of plastic packaging crinkling is heard. (3) The acoustic environment changes to a room with slight reverb. Sounds of chewing and utensils hitting plates are prominent. A sudden, loud cough is heard from the main speaker. (4) Music remains steady as the voice expresses strong approval and concludes the review.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '最新款的' (The newest), '超級好吃！新品黑馬' (Super delicious! New hit), '燒烤牛肉沙拉' (Roast Beef Salad). Tone: Excited. (2) Functional Text: '一公斤是519元' ($519/kg), '每盒落在370元左右' (Approx $370 per box). Tone: Informative. (3) Decorative Text: '12萬分' (120,000 points) with a star sticker. Tone: Exaggerated praise. (4) Functional Text: '回感豐富 價格不貴' (Rich flavor, affordable price). Tone: Recommending.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white t-shirt exercises with a blue dumbbell on a brown leather sofa, looking exhausted and sweaty; she then holds bell peppers and tries to eat one while a white dog sits nearby. (2) A second woman in a black dress enters, pointing at the first woman's shirt which appears to have a sweat/stain graphic added; they transition to a Costco warehouse where they pose with a shopping cart full of orange laundry detergent bottles. (3) The two women sit at a gray table discussing the product, holding a large bottle of 'Orange House' laundry detergent; close-ups show the liquid being poured into a Whirlpool washing machine drawer. (4) A split-screen comparison shows a white t-shirt with red stains becoming perfectly white after washing. (5) The video ends with both women smiling and holding the product while decorative text and emojis appear.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic music begins with a female voice shouting enthusiastically about exercising to get thin. (2) The soundscape shifts as two female voices engage in a dialogue, one sounding disgusted about a bad smell and the other making excuses; sharp transition SFX are heard between cuts. (3) A professional male voiceover enters, speaking at a moderate-to-fast pace to describe the product's enzymes and natural ingredients. (4) Ambient noise is minimal, with studio-quality clarity for the vocals; the BGM remains a consistent, driving pop-electronic track throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '努力運動會變瘦' (Working hard at exercise makes you thin) - Motivational/Hook. (2) '認真吃菜才會變瘦' (Eating vegetables seriously makes you thin) - Humorous/Advice. (3) '橘子工坊 除臭酵素洗衣精' (Orange House Odor-Eliminating Enzyme Laundry Detergent) - Functional/Product Name. (4) '必買特價!' (Must-buy sale!) - Promotional Hook. (5) '美國PCR低敏驗證' (US PCR Hypoallergenic Certification) - Functional/Technical Detail. (6) '7/14~7/20 店內促銷' (7/14~7/20 In-store promotion) - Functional/Sales Info.

They use chopsticks to pick up the cooked, golden-brown dumplings and eat them, reacting with wide eyes and thumbs-up gestures.

(4) Functional Text: '399元 超常折80' (399 yuan, often discounted by 80) highlights the price. (5) Functional Text: '180度 10分鐘' (180 degrees, 10 minutes) provides cooking instructions. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a beige bucket hat and a cream-colored dress stands inside a Costco, excitedly holding a large packaged 'Vegetable Mutton Hot Pot' kit while gesturing toward the price tag of 289 dollars per kilogram. (2) The scene shifts to a home dining setting where two women unbox the contents of the kit, revealing bags of mutton slices, clams, soup base packets, and fresh white radish. (3) Close-up shots of the cooking process follow: vegetables are boiled in a blue cast-iron pot, then mutton and clams are added using tongs as steam rises. (4) The two women sit at the table and taste the finished hot pot, nodding and giving enthusiastic thumbs-up while displaying the tender meat and cooked clams to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music begins immediately with a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaking in Mandarin. Ambient store chatter is faintly audible in the background. (2) The music continues as a clear, professional male voiceover takes over, narrating the unboxing process with an energetic tone; sounds of plastic packaging being opened and objects being placed on a table are heard. (3) During the cooking phase, sound effects of bubbling water and the clinking of a heavy pot lid are prominent. (4) The final phase features the two women making satisfied eating sounds and brief verbal exclamations of delight over the background music and occasional cartoon-style 'ding' sound effects for emphasis.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue and narration. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, colorful captions appear such as '超火新品' (Super popular new product) in red, '蔬菜羊肉爐' (Vegetable Mutton Hot Pot) in green, and '超級無敵清香' (Super invincible fragrance) with a rainbow border. (3) Descriptive Text: '非常醜喔' (Very ugly) appears when criticizing the appearance of the cabbage, and '畫龍點睛' (The finishing touch) appears when adding clams.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts at a Costco warehouse where a woman in a black dress is standing in front of shelves of Aunt Stella cookie boxes. She holds a box and smiles excitedly. (2) The camera cuts to close-ups of different cookie gift sets on the shelves, showing the Aunt Stella branding and price tags ($369, $269, $247). (3) The scene transitions to an indoor setting where the woman from the store and another woman in a zebra-print hat sit at a table. They open the 'Aunt Stella Classic Fruit Cookie Set', take out individual cookie packs, and show the camera the contents. (4) Both women taste the cookies (blueberry, apple, and raspberry flavors), breaking them open to show the fruit bits inside, and reacting with exaggerated expressions of delight.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone, introducing the Costco deal. (2) As the scene moves to the products, the vocal continues describing the prices and the 'Buy one, get one' or dual-set nature of the deal. (3) In the indoor scene, two female voices are heard. The main speaker describes the packaging and flavors, while the second woman provides supporting exclamations like 'Wow' and 'So many ingredients'. Sound effects like 'pop' and 'ting' are occasionally heard during transitions or text pop-ups. (4) The audio ends with a concluding recommendation to buy at Costco.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top center. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '比百貨公司便宜超多' (Much cheaper than department stores) in bright yellow/red. '必買水果餅乾組' (Must-buy fruit cookie set) with a purple background. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles in white with black borders translate the spoken Chinese throughout. (4) Decorative Text: '好事成雙!' (Good things come in pairs), '詩特莉經典水果餅乾組' (Aunt Stella Classic Fruit Cookie Set), '超多料' (Full of ingredients) with sparkling stickers.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in the freezer section of a Costco store, showing stacks of Dessaint '12 Pancakes All Butter' boxes. A young woman with long dark hair and a light-colored blouse pulls a box from the shelf. (2) She presents the box to the camera, smiling excitedly, and points to the product details. The scene then transitions to an indoor home setting. (3) The box is opened to reveal pancakes stacked inside without individual wrapping. (4) Two women are seen at a table; one holds the product box while the other holds a piece of pancake on a fork, showing a close-up of the texture. (5) They engage in a discussion, tasting the product and showing expressions of disappointment and skepticism as they talk to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat background music with rhythmic beats and 'sparkle' sound effects plays. A female voice speaks with high energy and excitement, introducing a 'French romance' find at Costco. (2) The music continues as the speaker provides details about the price (229 NTD) and quantity, maintaining a cheerful tone. (3) The audio transitions to a conversational setting at home. The background music remains, but the focus shifts to a dialogue between two females. (4) Their tone becomes more analytical and eventually critical as they describe the taste, specifically mentioning the 'concentrated butter' flavor which they do not enjoy. (5) The video ends with a summary recommendation, sounding humorous but definitive in their dislike.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo, '12 PANCAKES All Butter!'. Decorative Text: '法國的浪漫!' (French Romance!) and '冷凍法式奶油鬆餅' (Frozen French Butter Pancakes) in large, colorful fonts. (2) Decorative Text: '229元 裡面有12片' (229 NTD, 12 pieces inside) used as a hook. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles translating the speakers' dialogue about convenience and packaging. (4) Decorative Text: '法國人真浪漫 連包裝都沒有' (French people are truly romantic, even the packaging is absent) in a sarcastic tone. (5) Decorative Text: '我不喜歡' (I don't like it), '愛重奶' (Love heavy dairy), and '省錢嘍' (Save your money) used to emphasize the final verdict.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a colorful graphic overlay featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and a cartoon character, announcing a weekly special report. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing different products on warehouse shelves: Klim milk powder, vacuum-packed chicken, trays of beef, boxes of macarons, stacks of Cheetos, Ritz crackers, and various chocolates. (3) The sequence moves through beverages like Kirin green tea, frozen prepared foods including Buddha Jumps Over the Wall, fresh seafood platters, and cartons of apples, each shot lasting only about 1-2 seconds with hand movements sometimes visible as they interact with the items.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy electronic background music starts immediately. An enthusiastic male voice introduces the Costco weekly special report and encourages viewers to follow. (2) The narrator begins a rhythmic, rapid-fire recitation of various product names and their corresponding discount prices, matching the fast pace of the music. (3) The audio remains consistent in its high energy, with the music providing a continuous beat and the vocals staying dominant and clear throughout the entire duration until a sharp cut-off at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: "COSTCO WHOLESALE", "好市多 每週特價速報", "01/20-01/26", "記得追蹤我們" (Remember to follow us). (2) Functional: A series of product labels and price breakdowns appear for every item, e.g., "克寧紐西蘭全脂奶粉", "原價659 -130 特價529". (3) Decorative/Hook: Varied colorful fonts and background boxes highlight the savings amounts to grab attention.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female host wearing a blue Kangol beret and a white lace top stands in a Costco warehouse, holding a gold-colored package of Aunt Stella pound cake. She points excitedly at the camera and the product shelf. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the Aunt Stella shelf display with a Costco price tag of 299 NTD. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where the host is joined by another female. They sit at a table, holding the individual pound cakes (lemon and orange flavors). They take bites of the cake, showing exaggerated expressions of delight, nodding, and gesturing to emphasize the texture and flavor. The host continues to talk directly to the camera throughout the tasting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic BGM starts immediately with a high-pitched female voice speaking rapidly in Mandarin, sounding excited. Ambient warehouse noise is faint in the background. (2) Frequent cartoon-style sound effects (pops and dings) coincide with text appearing on screen. (3) The audio transitions to a dual-vocal conversation in the indoor setting; both females have high-pitched, enthusiastic tones. The background music remains consistent in tempo and volume, providing a cheerful atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and '超隱藏款 1個150元' (Super hidden item, 150 NTD per piece) in large red and yellow characters. (2) Functional/Title: '詩特莉水果磅蛋糕' (Aunt Stella Fruit Pound Cake) appears in large font. (3) Functional: Subtitles translating the spoken dialogue into traditional Chinese throughout the video. (4) Decorative: '史上最便宜' (Cheapest in history), '超濃厚超炸裂' (Super rich and explosive), and '299元 超級無敵划算' (299 NTD, super unbeatable deal).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a gray coat stands in a Costco store, holding a green bag of potatoes. She looks excited and surprised. (2) The camera pans to a shelf filled with the same product. A price tag showing "$349" is visible. (3) The woman holds the bag closer, pointing at the details while talking. (4) Scene shifts to a home setting where two women sit at a table with the product. They are interacting with the camera and each other. (5) They open the bag, take out a potato, and eat it with a fork, expressing their opinions through facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat background music begins. A high-pitched female voice speaks excitedly about finding a product. (2) An off-screen male voice briefly joins the conversation, sounding supportive. (3) The music continues at a steady pace. At the home scene, two female voices take turns speaking in a friendly, conversational tone, detailing price calculations and cooking instructions. (4) Ambient indoor noise is low. Sound of plastic packaging rustling and forks clicking on a plate can be heard occasionally.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "終於出現了" (Finally appeared) - excited hook. (2) "你看一整排" (Look, a whole row) - emphasis on stock. (3) "日本北海道奶油馬鈴薯" (Japan Hokkaido Butter Potato) - product identification. (4) "$349" - pricing info. (5) "1.1公斤有三入" (1.1kg with 3 packs). (6) "每一顆馬鈴薯是29塊錢" (Each potato is 29 dollars) - cost analysis. (7) "澳洲白玉馬鈴薯" (Australia White Jade Potato) - comparative recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a brown bucket hat and beige dress holding a large, white polar bear-shaped cooling cushion in the aisle of a Costco warehouse. A large Costco Wholesale logo is overlaid at the top. (2) A second woman in a white dress and beige cardigan joins her. They both hold and display various animal-shaped cushions, including a panda, a blue bear, and a white cat. They gesture towards the cushions and each other while talking enthusiastically. (3) There is a close-up shot of a stack of the cushions (panda, cat, blue bear) where a hand is seen touching the panda's head. (4) The scene returns to the two women holding the cushions together, smiling at the camera and interacting playfully as they continue their discussion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, cheerful, and mid-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, excited, and friendly tone, introducing the product. (2) A second female voice joins in, creating a conversational and lively atmosphere. They discuss the price and the physical sensation of the product. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (3) Occasional subtle sound effects (SFX) like light 'dings' or 'pops' accompany some of the text overlays. Ambient warehouse noise is kept at a very low, almost imperceptible level. (4) The music and the two female voices continue until the end of the video, maintaining a high energy level.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout the video. (2) Hook Text: '以前小朋友我都用這個 現在長大後 我要用這個' (I used to use this as a kid, now that I'm grown up, I want to use this) - nostalgic and persuasive tone. (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '最新的 動物涼感抱枕 799元' (Latest animal cooling cushion 799 yuan) - informational and catchy. (4) Functional Text: '你一定要在冷氣房 它的涼感才真的會涼' (You must use it in an air-conditioned room for it to really feel cool) - helpful advice. (5) Decorative Text: '舒服 舒服' (Comfortable, comfortable) and '算是省電神器' (A power-saving miracle tool) - highlighting product benefits. (6) Functional Text: '這個叫做熊貓' (This one is called a panda) - identifying the animal.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco warehouse; a woman wearing a black dress with chest cut-outs and large earrings holds a large plastic bag containing two massive loaves of bread, looking excited and talking to the camera. (2) She points toward the bakery shelves showing price tags of $269 and $219, then points specifically at the last remaining bags of bread on the shelf while gesturing enthusiastically. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor dining room where the same woman and another woman wearing a black beret are sitting at a wooden table; they hold up sliced halves of the bread to show the internal texture filled with nuts and olives, then they take bites and react with thumbs up and wide eyes. (4) The video concludes with them holding up the bread slices and gesturing a '9' with their fingers to indicate a rating.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals dominate, speaking in a fast, excited Mandarin tone. (A) Vocals: Primary female speaker and a secondary off-screen male voice briefly responding. (B) BGM: Upbeat, rhythmic pop-style music with a steady tempo. (C) Ambient: Background chatter and typical warehouse supermarket hum. (D) SFX: Subtle 'ping' or variety-show style sound effects accompanying text pop-ups. (2) Transition to indoor acoustics. (A) Vocals: Two females conversing, voices are clear and studio-like. (B) BGM: Continues the same upbeat track. (C) Ambient: Quiet indoor environment with minimal noise. (D) SFX: Sound of bread being sliced and the plastic bag rustling.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Costco Wholesale logo appears at the top. (2) Hook text: '倒數最後一包' (Last one left) in yellow/pink variety-style font, conveying urgency. (3) Functional text: '黑橄欖乳酪麵包' (Black Olive Cheese Bread) identifying the product. (4) Pricing text: '269元' and '219元' appearing over the shelf shots. (5) Rating text: '9分' (9 points) in a large, colorful graphic during the final tasting scene.

(3) The soundscape transitions as the ambient noise shifts to a quieter indoor room setting, though the BGM remains constant. (4) A soft cutting sound is heard as the knife slices through the cake. (4) '這一款 你一定要買' (You must buy this one) and '空氣感十足' (Full of airiness). (5) Decorative Text: '推薦' (Recommend) at the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a colorful title card featuring a cartoon character and the Costco Wholesale logo against a background of plush toys. (2) A rapid sequence of shots follows, each focusing on different products on Costco store shelves, ranging from household goods (Kleenex) to pantry staples (Milk powder, Oreo, Rice crackers) and fresh produce/meats (Pork, Apples). (3) The shots are mostly static, centered on the packaging of the items, transitioning quickly every 2 seconds. (4) The final sequence shows alcoholic beverages and household chemicals before ending abruptly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy, fast-paced male voice starts by shouting the video title and a call to action. (2) Upbeat, high-BPM electronic background music plays continuously. (3) The male narrator maintains a rapid-fire delivery throughout the video, reading the brand name, product name, and the specific discount/price for every single item shown on screen. (4) Very low-level ambient store noise is occasionally audible underneath the music and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Title Screen: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 每週特價速報 07/21 - 07/27 記得追蹤我們' (Weekly Special Report, Remember to follow us). (2) Product Text (repeated for each item): 'Brand Name', 'Product Name', 'Original Price', 'Discount Amount', 'Special Price'. (3) All text is in Traditional Chinese with a variety-show bold style and bright colors (Yellow/Red).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black mesh top, stands in a warehouse aisle holding a package of pre-cut vegetables. (2) Close-up shots follow, showing three different vegetable platters: a pork rib soup set with corn and lotus root, a spice set with chili and green onions, and a chicken soup set with mushrooms. (3) The camera pans to price labels on the shelf indicating 249 and 199. (4) The woman holds two packages and speaks directly to the camera with expressive facial movements and hand gestures, standing against a backdrop of stacked cardboard boxes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop background music starts immediately. A woman's voice begins speaking in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. (2) As the woman describes the products, the music remains at a steady volume, with subtle ambient warehouse hum in the background. (3) A male voice is briefly heard off-camera laughing and asking a question. (4) The woman's fast-paced narration continues as the music fades out toward the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '煮婦大幫手' (Housewife's great helper) appears in a yellow bubble with a red 'NEW' star. (2) Functional: '好市多最近出很多這種組合' (Costco recently released many of these sets) translates the narration. (3) Decorative: '很用心耶' (Very thoughtful) and 'WOW' appear as emotional stickers. (4) Functional: '排骨湯配料組' (Pork rib soup set), '辛香料組' (Spice set), and '雞湯配料組' (Chicken soup set) identify the products. (5) Decorative: '你覺得值得嗎?' (Do you think it's worth it?) acts as a hook for engagement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is live-action. A woman wearing a black top with a cutout and large hoop earrings stands in a Costco aisle, holding a large plastic bowl of Thai Seafood Tom Yum Pho. She points to the product and gestures enthusiastically. (2) Close-up shots show the product label and the ingredients inside the bowl (shrimp, squid, fish). The woman gives a thumbs-up and makes a 'money' hand sign. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor room where the first woman is joined by another woman wearing a zebra-print bucket hat. They unbox the Pho kit, showing the separate bags of noodles, seafood, herbs, and soup base. (4) A black pot on a stovetop shows the soup boiling with all ingredients added. (5) The two women sit at a table, eating the Pho from the pot. They have expressive facial reactions, nodding and gesturing to indicate the food is spicy and sour. (6) They point to the pot, which is now half-empty, and give final positive reactions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music plays throughout. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone in Mandarin. Background ambient noise of a busy supermarket is audible. (2) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'sparkle' noises coincide with visual text appearances. (3) The audio transitions to a clearer, indoor environment. Two female voices are heard chatting and laughing as they describe the ingredients. (4) Slurping sounds and 'mmm' vocalizations occur during the eating segment. (5) The upbeat music continues until the end, maintaining a high energy level.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' banner at the top throughout the store segment. Subtitles in white at the bottom translate the spoken Mandarin. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '小朋友拿什麼' (What did the kid take?) as an opening hook. '誠意十足 滿滿海鮮' (Very sincere, full of seafood) in large purple/pink variety-show style font. '泰式酸辣海鮮河粉' (Thai Spicy and Sour Seafood Pho) as the main title. (3) Price information: '437元' and '一公斤只要395' (395 per kg) appear in bold yellow/red text. (4) Emotional Hooks: '超級划算' (Super good value) and '又酸又辣' (Both sour and spicy) appear with explosion graphics to emphasize the taste.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store Intro -> Product Close-up -> Home Unboxing -> Cooking Demo -> Taste Test/Review

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a beige cardigan and white skirt, standing in a large warehouse store. She stands next to a metal display rack filled with packaged ferns, smiling and gesturing towards them. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of the ferns, which are mounted on boards and encased in clear plastic boxes. A finger points to different species of the plants. (3) The woman returns to the frame, picking up one of the fern boxes. She continues to speak with high energy, looking at the camera and occasionally away to interact with someone behind the camera, eventually giving a thumbs-up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched and enthusiastic female voice speaks in Mandarin, appearing to be the main narrator. Background noise includes the distant hum of a large store and ambient voices. No prominent BGM is detected. (2) The female vocal continues, joined by a casual, steady-toned male voice from off-screen. They engage in a conversational dialogue. (3) The interaction between the two voices continues with a friendly and humorous tone. The ambient noise of the warehouse (clanking of carts, distant footsteps) remains consistent throughout the recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: (1) "阿寶我們來買這個" (Abao, let's buy this) - casual, inviting tone. (2) "399元 這很方便" (399 NTD, this is very convenient) - informative tone. (3) "具有招財聚氣的功效" (Has the effect of attracting wealth and energy) - promotional tone. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: (1) Large "COSTCO WHOLESALE" logo at the top of the frame. (2) "399元 掛門上超好看 上板蕨類" (399 NTD, looks great on the door, mounted ferns) - promotional hook with an excited tone. (3) "招財進寶" (Bring wealth and treasure) - celebratory/auspicious tone sticker at the end.
