perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco warehouse; a woman in a black dress with a cutout design is looking at a refrigerated meat section. (2) Close-ups show various packs of meat, specifically duck legs. The woman picks up a pack and examines it. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen where the duck legs are placed on a wire rack over a tray and seasoned with pepper, salt, garlic powder, and Sichuan pepper. (4) The duck legs are then placed in a stainless steel pan, skin side down, and fried until the skin is golden brown and crispy. (5) The cooked meat is sliced on a black cutting board, revealing a pink, juicy interior. (6) Finally, the woman holds a plate of the sliced duck legs, gesturing and talking directly to the camera to provide a review.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music plays throughout. Initially, it's mixed with ambient supermarket noise and the chatter of a male narrator and the on-screen woman discussing the purchase. (2) As the scene shifts to cooking, the sound of seasoning being ground and the loud, rhythmic sizzling of meat in a pan become prominent. (3) The male narrator provides a continuous, enthusiastic commentary on the cooking steps and the flavor, with the woman occasionally chiming in with affirmative sounds and her own descriptions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout the video translate the spoken Mandarin Chinese dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is persistent at the top. (3) Hook Text: '新的肉！' (New meat!), '料理超簡單' (Cooking is super easy!), '好好吃哦' (So delicious!), and '+1' variety-show style stickers appear to emphasize excitement and key points.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair in a black dress stands in a Costco aisle, excitedly holding a large floral-patterned box of Aunt Stella cookies and pointing at the text overlays. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a Costco shelf price tag labeled 'AUNT STELLA TAIWAN TEA COOKIES' at $369. (3) The setting shifts to a home kitchen where the first woman and another woman in a bucket hat sit at a counter, unboxing the product. (4) They display the 15 individual packs of cookies and show close-up textures of three different tea-flavored cookies (Ruby Black Tea, Tieguanyin, Biluochun). (5) They break the cookies to show the interior and eat them, concluding with thumbs-up and enthusiastic facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high energy and excitement in Mandarin. Upbeat, mid-tempo electronic background music plays throughout. (2) In the second phase, two female voices are heard conversing, describing the flavor profiles and crunchiness of the cookies. (3) Sound effects include the crisp rustling of individual plastic cookie wrappers and the distinct 'crunch' sound as they bite into the cookies. (4) The ambient background noise transitions from the slight hum of a warehouse store to a quiet indoor room environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '找到了 詩特莉 台茶精選餅乾' (Found it! Aunt Stella Taiwan Tea Selection Cookies). (2) Functional Text: '369元', '15包', '總共30片' (369 Dollars, 15 packs, total 30 pieces). (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '真的找很久' (Really looked for a long time!), '超級好吃' (Super delicious!), '隱藏版' (Hidden/Secret edition). (4) Labels for flavors: '紅玉紅茶' (Ruby Black Tea), '鐵觀音' (Tieguanyin), '碧螺春玄米茶' (Biluochun Brown Rice Tea).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a graphic Costco Wholesale logo. A young woman wearing a blue Kangol beret and a white ruffled dress stands in a warehouse store aisle, excitedly presenting a 4-pack of Colgate toothpaste. (2) Transitioning to an indoor setting, she sits with a friend in a black dress and squeezes pink translucent toothpaste containing small, multi-colored heart-shaped glitters onto a plate. (3) She applies the paste to an electric toothbrush and is shown in a bathroom mirror brushing her teeth with a surprised, wide-eyed expression. (4) After rinsing, a heart-shaped flake is stuck to her front tooth, which she laughs about. Her friend in black is shown lounging on a brown leather sofa, laughing at the situation. A small white dog in a pink strawberry-themed outfit walks into the frame.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched and enthusiastic female voice speaks in Mandarin over upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop background music. (2) The sounds of a tube squeezing and the mechanical buzzing of an electric toothbrush are clearly heard as the speaker continues her narration. (3) Laughter and a conversational back-and-forth between two female voices follow, maintaining a humorous and friendly tone. (4) The upbeat BGM continues throughout the transition between scenes, fading slightly at the very end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', '超夢幻' (Super Dreamy), '無法理解' (Incomprehensible), and '愛心彩虹牙膏' (Heart Rainbow Toothpaste) appear in large, colorful fonts to highlight key moments. (3) Effect Text: '超級涼感' (Super Cool Sensation) appears in purple with heart emojis to emphasize the product's effect.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins inside a large warehouse-style store. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a tan bucket hat and a white puffy-sleeved top, is standing in front of stacks of cherry boxes. She picks up a clear plastic container of dark red cherries, looking at it with a surprised facial expression. (2) Close-up shots of several cherry containers and price tags are shown. The woman points to different boxes of cherries, including one with yellow-red Rainier cherries. She continues to hold the dark cherry container while smiling and looking towards the camera. (3) The setting shifts to an indoor room with a couch and shelf in the background. Two women are seated at a table with a glass bowl of cherries and a plastic container. They both pick up cherries, bring them close to the camera to show the size and skin, and then eat them. One woman holds a small cherry pit in her palm to demonstrate the meat-to-pit ratio. (4) The women continue talking to the camera, gesturing with the cherries, and taking bites, maintaining happy and satisfied expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays throughout. An energetic female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone, expressing disbelief and excitement. (2) Ambient store noise is faintly audible behind the dominant vocals and music. Sound effects like 'dings' and 'pops' occur when specific prices are mentioned or when there is a transition. (3) As the scene changes to the indoor tasting, the vocal environment remains energetic as two female voices interact, describing the flavor and texture of the fruit. (4) Subtle chewing and crunching sounds are heard when the women bite into the cherries. The music remains consistent until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook Text: '發生什麼事' (What happened?), '太扯了吧' (Too ridiculous), '便宜到嚇到' (Scared by how cheap it is). (2) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is displayed at the top. Price tags show '$ 349' and '$ 559'. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '超便宜櫻桃' (Super cheap cherries), '還是很難吃?' (Or does it taste bad?), '甜酸甜的口感' (Sweet and sour taste). (4) Functional Subtitles: Continuous Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue regarding price, cherry varieties, and taste characteristics.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco warehouse where two women in white dresses are holding blue bottles of Lenor scent beads, smiling and gesturing excitedly. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor living room where the women sit at a table with the product, then a montage begins showing common laundry issues: a man sweating in a shirt, clothes hanging on a rack, and a close-up of a yellow stain on white fabric. (3) Close-up shots follow, showing the blue and white beads being poured into a cap and then into the detergent tray of a Whirlpool washing machine. (4) The women are then shown smelling freshly washed white clothes with expressions of delight. (5) The final scene returns to the women in the warehouse, holding multiple bottles and encouraging the viewer to buy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately and remains consistent throughout the video. (2) Two female voices speak in Mandarin with an energetic and enthusiastic tone, supplemented by a male narrator's voice providing descriptive details about the product. (3) Crisp sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings', 'shaking' (the sound of beads in the bottle), and 'swooshes' are synchronized with scene transitions and text pop-ups. (4) The audio concludes with a final energetic slogan spoken by both women.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) '明星商品 回來了' (Star product is back) appears in large, colorful decorative font. (3) '流汗衣服會臭' (Sweaty clothes will smell) is shown with a negative emoji. (4) '最強蘭諾 抗黃抗菌芳香豆' (Strongest Lenor Anti-Yellow Anti-Bacterial Scent Beads) - Functional text identifying the product. (5) '一次 OUT!' (One-time removal!) - Decorative hook text. (6) '果然是好市多獨家' (As expected, a Costco exclusive) appears at the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and black vest, sits in a living room holding a large yellow jug of laundry detergent. She smiles and gestures toward the bottle. (2) The scene transitions to a laundry area where the yellow jug is placed horizontally on top of a white front-load washing machine. A hand presses a red button on the jug to dispense blue liquid into the detergent drawer. (3) The jug is then seen on a storage shelf. A hand dispenses the blue liquid into a clear plastic measuring cup. (4) The woman shows the measuring cup, pointing out the residue left inside after pouring. (5) She demonstrates placing the entire measuring cup filled with detergent directly into the drum of the washing machine before closing the circular door.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo pop track starts as a female voice speaks in a friendly, high-pitched, and energetic tone. (2) The narration continues steadily as the sound of liquid splashing into a plastic tray is heard. The music remains at a consistent volume. (3) A distinct clicking sound occurs as a washing machine door is shut, followed by the female voice giving a final helpful instruction as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '大家都會去好市多' (Everyone goes to Costco): A hook establishing the common setting, presented in a friendly tone. (2) '美式洗衣精... 他又大又笨重又難用' (American-style laundry detergent... it's big, heavy, and hard to use): Decorative text identifying the product and highlighting a pain point. (3) '巨量桶洗衣精正確使用教學' (Correct usage tutorial for giant bucket laundry detergent): Functional title defining the video's purpose. (4) '直接把它放進去一起洗哦' (Put it directly in to wash together): Functional text explaining the core 'life hack' or secret tip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature 1 -> Feature 2 -> Social Proof
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a shopping guide and product recommendation for a specific lap desk sold at Costco. By demonstrating various usage scenarios (using a phone, reading, and working on a laptop) and highlighting convenient features like side pockets, the creators aim to persuade viewers of the product's utility despite its price. The inclusion of a shot showing nearly empty pallets reinforces the item's popularity through social proof.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to reviewing and demonstrating the features of a single product found at Costco.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of variety-show style text bubbles and fast-paced interactive dialogue between two hosts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video fits the 'Costco finds' or 'Warehouse treasure hunt' trend popular on social media platforms in Taiwan.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white dress and beige bucket hat stands in front of a freezer at a Costco warehouse, pointing excitedly at boxes of 'Chen Pin' pork dumplings. She opens the freezer door and struggles slightly to lift a large red box. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the box is opened to reveal multiple clear plastic bags filled with frozen dumplings. Close-ups show hands pointing at the size and quantity of the dumplings. (3) A sequence shows the dumplings being boiled in a pot and then scooped out using a metal strainer. (4) The woman and a friend are seated at a dining table with a plate of cooked dumplings. They use chopsticks to dip the dumplings in sauce and take bites while talking directly to the camera with expressive gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone about a 'super cheap' find at Costco. (2) Sound of a heavy freezer door opening and closing, followed by the rustling of a cardboard box being moved. (3) The female narrator continues, explaining the price breakdown (less than 2 yuan per piece) and the total count (180 pieces). (4) Bubbling sounds of boiling water and the clinking of a metal strainer against a pot. (5) Two female voices engage in a dialogue, describing the taste, the crunchiness of the cabbage, and the texture of the pork filling. They conclude with enthusiastic positive feedback.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White subtitles at the bottom track the spoken dialogue regarding the price and taste of the dumplings. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. (3) Hook Text: '史上最便宜！好吃嗎？' (Cheapest ever! Is it good?), '一顆不用2元 豬肉水餃' (Less than 2 yuan per pork dumpling), and '太便宜了吧！！' (Too cheap!!) appear in large yellow and blue fonts to emphasize the value. (4) Functional Text: '180顆 329元' (180 pieces for 329 yuan) and '煮水餃中' (Boiling dumplings) appear during the respective phases.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail location -> Unboxing/Preparation -> Controlled tasting and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in bucket hat, 1 friend appearing during the tasting segment

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed mention of price, quantity, and brand name 'Chen Pin' with a clear call to check it out at Costco.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a hand reaching into a 7-Eleven refrigerated shelf to pick up a packaged 'Mochi QQ' cake. (2) A young woman wearing a white off-the-shoulder top and a brown bucket hat stands outside the store at night, holding the package and smiling excitedly at the camera. (3) The shot cuts to a close-up of the package being torn open, revealing four pieces of light-yellow sponge cake rolls with cream filling. (4) A hand picks up one piece, squeezing it slightly to show the soft, elastic texture. (5) Two women are seen indoors sitting at a marble table; they take bites of the cake and look directly at the camera with expressive, surprised facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice says 'Look what I found!'. (2) The same woman continues speaking outside with a joyful tone, mentioning she bought the last one and no longer needs to fly to Japan. (3) Sound of plastic packaging crinkling as the product is opened. (4) Two female voices engage in a dialogue, discussing the 'QQ' (chewy) texture of the cake skin and comparing it to the version found in Japan. (5) One woman makes a loud gasp of mock-despair as the music reaches a peak.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '不用飛日本' (No need to fly to Japan) - Decorative Hook. (2) '好吃嗎？' (Is it delicious?) - Decorative Question. (3) '超紅711麻糬蛋糕' (Super popular 7-11 Mochi Cake) - Functional Title. (4) '買到了最後一個' (Bought the last one) - Decorative text. (5) '像麻糬一樣QQ的欸' (Chewy like mochi!) - Impact caption with variety show graphics. (6) Standard functional subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Discovery at store -> Product reveal -> Tasting and comparison review.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand in a Costco parking garage behind a shopping cart filled with groceries; they hold up extremely small versions of Costco membership cards. (2) The scene cuts to a ground-level view of people's shoes and a blue-uniformed staff member, then zooms in on the tiny card which is being held by a hand. (3) The women talk and gesture, showing that the tiny card is actually a magnet by sticking it to the metal cart. (4) One woman leans her head on the shopping cart handle looking weary while a male hand dangles the mini card in front of her face in a playful manner.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-paced, upbeat, and cheerful pop music track begins immediately. (2) High-pitched and energetic female voices speak rapidly in Mandarin, sounding excited about the 'mini membership cards'. (3) A deep-toned male voice (off-screen) asks questions and interacts playfully with the women. (4) The audio is a mix of studio-quality narration and field recording from the parking lot, featuring constant vocal interaction and consistent background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: 'Costco Super Cute Free Mini Membership Card' (好市多超可愛免費迷你會員卡). (2) Functional Text: 'This is my membership card' (這是我的會員卡), 'Why is your card so small?' (為什麼你的會員卡這麼小). (3) Instructional Text: 'Find staff in blue clothes' (找藍色衣服的工作人員), 'No purchase necessary for free exchange' (不用消費就可以免費兌換). (4) Warning: 'Limited Quantity' (數量有限).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco warehouse; a woman wearing a black beret and a white ruffled dress excitedly picks up a pink box of Vilson strawberry yogurt snacks from a shelf. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor setting where the woman from the first scene and another woman with long dark hair and a zebra-print hat are sitting at a table. (3) They open the pink box, pour pink dinosaur-shaped snacks onto a house-shaped tray, and then pick them up to show the camera. (4) Both women taste the snacks, displaying exaggerated facial expressions of enjoyment, including widening eyes and nodding, while holding the snacks close to the lens for detail.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop-style background music starts immediately with energetic female vocals speaking in Mandarin. (2) Ambient noise from the warehouse is briefly audible in the first few seconds before the music dominates. (3) The sound of a plastic bag being opened and snacks hitting a ceramic plate is heard. (4) The two women engage in a fast-paced, high-pitched dialogue, expressing excitement and describing the taste of the snacks over the continuous upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' and '399元 值得嗎？' (Is 399 NTD worth it?) appear at the top. (2) '草莓優格恐龍' (Strawberry Yogurt Dinosaur) appears in a yellow bubble. (3) '酸酸甜甜好滋味' (Sweet and sour good taste) appears with emotional stickers. (4) '冷凍的乾燥優格' (Freeze-dried yogurt) and '恐龍咬咬優格' (Dinosaur Bite Yogurt) are used as descriptive titles. (5) '五倍濃縮' (Five times concentrated) appears near the end to emphasize product quality.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Product unboxing and tasting at home -> Review summary.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a sun hat and a blue off-the-shoulder top stands in front of a large display of bagels in a warehouse-style store, giving a thumbs up. (3) The camera focuses on the price tag ($119) and the specific cheese flavor of the bagels. (4) She shows several different stacks of bagels in different flavors including cinnamon raisin and plain. (5) She concludes by giving another thumbs up while holding a bag of cheese bagels.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins speaking in Mandarin over upbeat, poppy background music. (2) The sound of a busy supermarket environment with distant chatter and ambient noise is audible under the narration. (3) The music continues at a steady volume, maintaining an enthusiastic tone throughout the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 新的制度 貝果單賣 一顆只要20元: Hook text indicating a new system for buying bagels individually for $20. (2) 好的制度又一個: Emotional caption expressing approval of the new system. (3) 單包購買: Functional text highlighting that single bags can now be purchased. (4) 119元: Functional text showing the price per bag. (5) 超值得 / 好划算喔: Emotional captions emphasizing the high value and good deal.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco warehouse where a woman wearing a beige bucket hat and a white dress excitedly holds a bag containing two large loaves of toast. She points to the product and the price tag on the shelf while talking to the camera. Other shoppers and carts are visible in the background. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor apartment setting. Two women sit at a table with the toast slices. They tear the bread apart to show the texture and taste it. A small white dog occasionally appears in the background behind the table. (3) Close-up shots of a single slice of toast being pressed and buttered on a plate are shown. The women continue to gesture enthusiastically while eating and discussing the bread's quality.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals speak excitedly over a backdrop of upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music and the ambient hum of a crowded warehouse. (2) The soundscape shifts as the music continues, but the primary audio becomes a dialogue between two female speakers in a quieter indoor environment. Sharp sound effects like 'dings' and 'sparkle' noises are interspersed to emphasize certain points. (3) The female voices maintain a friendly and descriptive tone, discussing the flavor and texture, while the upbeat music remains consistent until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and '銷量超好' (Very good sales) are displayed as hooks. (2) '超便宜好吃嗎? 吐司界的精品' (Is it cheap and delicious? The luxury of the toast world) serves as the main video title. (3) '剩最後一袋' (Only one bag left) and '倒數一袋' (Countdown last bag) emphasize scarcity. (4) '原味生吐司' (Plain Raw Toast) identifies the product. (5) '269元兩大條' (269 dollars for two large loaves) and '300以上' (Above 300) provide price comparisons. (6) '就非常的美味' (Just very delicious), '非常的酥脆' (Very crispy), and '最幸福的人' (The happiest person) are emotional variety-show style captions.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two young women standing inside a Costco warehouse, waving at the camera behind a shopping cart filled with KitKat boxes and other items. Large decorative text overlays the screen. (2) From 0:03 onwards, the video transitions into a rapid-fire montage of various products on warehouse shelves. Each shot displays a specific product—ranging from Charmin toilet paper and Iberico pork to snacks like Cadina chips and Quaker drinks—with large, colorful price tags overlaid on the center of the frame. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of items including household goods, frozen foods, and beverages, each appearing for approximately 1 to 2 seconds before cutting to the next.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic male voiceover begins immediately, welcoming viewers to the 'Costco Weekly Special Report' over a bright, upbeat electronic pop background track. (2) As the product montage begins, the narrator rapidly recites the name of each product and its discounted price in a rhythmic, professional tone. The background music remains constant and energetic. (3) The narration continues without pause, maintaining a high-energy delivery that matches the fast visual cuts. Only the narrator's voice and the background music are audible; ambient warehouse noise is virtually nonexistent.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', '每周特價速報 08/04 - 08/10'. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us). (3) Content & Tone: Detailed product information for over 40 items (e.g., 'CHARMIN 超柔捲筒衛生紙 原價1299 -300 特價999', '西班牙伊比利豬梅花肉捲 特價669'). The tone is informative and urgent, emphasizing the savings.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a navy blue off-the-shoulder top stands in front of a Costco freezer section, holding a purple box of I-MEI Ube Boba Ice Bars and gesturing excitedly. (2) Close-up shots of the ice cream boxes stacked neatly inside the commercial freezer. (3) The woman points at the box and the pricing on the freezer shelf while speaking to the camera. (4) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the same woman and another woman in a purple shirt are sitting at a table. (5) They unwrap and hold up the purple and white ube ice bars. (6) Close-up shots show the ice bar being bitten into, revealing a layered interior with dark boba pearls. (7) Both women eat the ice bars, showing expressions of enjoyment and nodding while talking. (8) The video ends with them holding the ice bars towards the camera in a final recommendation pose.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. A high-pitched, energetic female voice introduces the new product found at Costco. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the speaker details the price and quantity of the ice cream. (3) As the scene shifts indoors, the same female voice is joined by another female voice; they engage in a lively discussion about the texture and flavor of the ice bar. (4) Cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) are heard when the ice cream is bitten or when text pops up on screen. (5) The music fades out slightly towards the end as they give their final verdict.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative Text: '義美 紫薯雙層波霸雪糕' in large, stylized purple and yellow characters. (3) Functional Text: '最新的' (The newest), '239元 有12個' (239 dollars for 12), '一支不用20塊 19.9' (Less than 20 per stick, 19.9). (4) Hook Text: '最完美' (Most perfect), '很多層次' (Many layers), '越嚼越香' (The more you chew, the more fragrant). (5) Subtitles are present throughout the video in Traditional Chinese.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white frilly dress and a grey bucket hat stands in front of a restaurant entrance, gesturing enthusiastically toward the camera. (2) The scene cuts to multiple quick shots of the restaurant interior, showcasing a high-end buffet layout with various stations including a seafood ice bed, a sushi counter, and hot food areas with chefs working behind them. (3) The woman returns to the frame, making hand gestures like a phone call and pointing to her head while speaking directly to the camera. (4) A brief shot shows the restaurant reception counter with three staff members. (5) The final segment shows the woman giving a thumbs up and cheering with both hands raised in front of the restaurant logo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and fast-paced electronic pop music starts immediately. A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a high-pitched, energetic, and excited tone. (2) As the visuals shift to the food stations, the music remains consistent while the vocal continues at a rapid pace. Muffled background clatter and low ambient chatter from a restaurant setting are audible. (3) The vocal remains dominant through the phone booking and on-site tips. (4) The music reaches a crescendo as the speaker's voice becomes even more enthusiastic during the call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '無私分享 100% 預約方法' (Selfless sharing of 100% reservation methods) - Hook text. (2) '台灣最難訂 自助餐島語' (Taiwan's hardest-to-book buffet: Island) - Informative hook. (3) '每個月1號上午11點' (11 AM on the 1st of every month) - Functional text for online booking tip. (4) '不要自己掛掉' (Don't hang up on your own) - Functional text for phone booking tip. (5) '100%一定會插隊' (100% will definitely cut in line) - Decorative text emphasizing the effectiveness of the on-site booking tip. (6) '趕快分享給你' (Quickly share it with you) - Emotional call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Listing specific booking tips with b-roll -> Final encouragement and Outro

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'scarcity' psychological trigger by focusing on how hard the restaurant is to book, making the tips feel more valuable.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two women in a Costco store, standing in front of a refrigerated display case containing 'Strawberry Pork Floss Submarine Sandwiches'. One woman wears a blue off-the-shoulder top and a black Kangol beret, while the other is in a black and white top. They express shock and curiosity through wide eyes and hand gestures. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor living room setting where they hold a single sandwich. One woman cuts it in half on a wooden cutting board, revealing the layers of strawberry, pork floss, and cream. (3) They both eat the sandwich, reacting with exaggerated expressions of delight, nodding, and giving thumbs up. Close-up shots highlight the texture of the bread and the freshness of the strawberries.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, excited tone, introducing the Costco product as part of a 'heresy' series. Faint supermarket ambient hum is heard in the background. (2) The vocal tone remains energetic as the speakers describe the ingredients (strawberries, pork floss, mascarpone). Frequent use of 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects coincides with text appearing on screen. (3) The music maintains a fast tempo as the women conclude their review with enthusiastic recommendations, their voices overlapping in excitement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the dialogue throughout. (2) Hook Text: '我是勇者' (I am a brave person) appears in purple/yellow as a title. (3) Hook Text: '邪教系列 草莓肉鬆潛艇堡' (Heresy Series: Strawberry Pork Floss Submarine Sandwich) labels the product. (4) Decorative Text: '不好吃' (Not tasty) with an 'X' mark appears briefly for dramatic effect. (5) Hook Text: '一定要試試看' (Must try it) appears at the end in large yellow font to encourage viewers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Store discovery) -> Transition -> Action (Tasting/Review) -> Conclusion (Recommendation)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women, one in a white knit top and one in a black dress with a bucket hat, stand in a residential alley talking excitedly to the camera. Large text overlays introduce a 'hidden' dessert spot. (2) They enter a bakery workshop where staff are seen in the background with commercial ovens and mixers. A white paper bag with a cartoon cow logo ('ALL IN ROLL') is handed over. (3) The scene shifts to a living room setting where the woman in the zebra-patterned hat, now wearing a green Mickey Mouse cardigan, sits at a table. (4) A box of five different colored cake rolls is opened and displayed. (5) She proceeds to taste each roll one by one: a hojicha apple roll, a black tea roll, a thick matcha roll, and a black forest roll. She uses a fork to cut them, showing the cream filling, and displays exaggerated expressions of joy and approval.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, fast-paced electronic background music plays. Two female voices talk simultaneously with high-pitched, excited tones. (2) Sounds of rustling bags and a brief male voice saying 'Thank you' in Mandarin are heard. (3) The music maintains a steady upbeat tempo as the main speaker describes the flavors. (4) Frequent sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings', 'pops', and cartoonish boings emphasize specific reactions and text appearances. (5) The speaker's voice remains the dominant audio layer, characterized by clear articulation and enthusiastic inflections.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '超隱藏生乳捲' (Super hidden cream roll) and '私藏口袋名單' (Private pocket list) appear in bold, colorful fonts. (2) Variety-show style labels: '隱藏在私宅小巷內' (Hidden in a private alley), '人氣甜點店' (Popular dessert shop). (3) Functional text: '自選五種口味 340元' (Choose 5 flavors for 340 NTD). (4) Descriptive flavor tags: '焙茶蘋果' (Hojicha Apple), '茶味超濃' (Super strong tea flavor), '5倍濃厚抹茶' (5x thick matcha). (5) Emotional/Reaction text: '就是這個濃' (This is the thickness) with bright yellow emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Shop Visit/Purchase -> Product Reveal -> Detailed Tasting/Review -> Recommendation

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-intensity subtitles, use of 'hidden shop' (私宅) terminology, and extremely expressive facial reactions during tasting.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco freezer aisle. A woman wearing a blue beret and a navy blue off-the-shoulder top smiles and gestures toward boxes of frozen prawn hargow. A passerby in a green hat is briefly visible in the background. (2) The scene cuts to a kitchen where the hargow is being steamed in a large metal pot. Close-up shots show the translucent skin of the dumplings and a pair of tongs picking one up. (3) The woman and a companion are shown at a dining table tasting the cooked dumplings. There are close-ups of the internal filling featuring whole shrimp and bamboo shoots. The main woman uses exaggerated facial expressions and hand gestures to express her enjoyment while eating.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-tempo background music plays immediately. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone about finding a great deal at Costco. (2) A male narrator's voice enters, providing specific details about the price and the steaming process over the sound of light bubbling water and the persistent background music. (3) The female voice returns as the primary vocal, describing the 'QQ' (chewy) texture and the flavor of the shrimp. Cartoon-style sound effects (pops and boings) are synced with the mention of the chewy texture. The music continues until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text including the 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. Decorative hooks like '連路人也瘋狂?' (Even passers-by are crazy?) and '一顆11元' (11 dollars per piece) are displayed in bright colors. (2) Subtitles follow the dialogue, detailing cooking instructions like '水滾之後蒸15分鐘' (Steam for 15 minutes after water boils). (3) Effect text such as '買來試試看' (Buy it and try) and a circular graphic with '彈彈彈' (Bouncy/Chewy) appears around the woman's head to emphasize her reaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Discovery at store -> Cooking preparation -> Tasting and review

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women appear in a Costco warehouse pushing a shopping cart, gesturing excitedly at the camera. The video then transitions to one of the women crouching in front of a shelf of green juice bottles. (2) The woman is shown at home pouring a green juice into a glass, drinking it, then mixing it with a white liquid (yogurt) and drinking it again. A shot shows her in a bathroom giving a thumbs up. (3) Back at Costco, she picks up a tray of large sandwiches from a refrigerated shelf. At home, she cuts one open to show the filling and takes a large bite, smiling. (4) The two women are back at Costco in front of shampoo displays, pointing at the products. They transition to a home setting where one woman's hair is being washed and lathered with shampoo. Before-and-after shots show her hair with more volume. (5) A shot shows hair on a patterned floor being compared to a cleaner floor. The women sit at a table presenting the shampoo bottles and wave goodbye.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice asks a question about what to buy at Costco. (2) The same upbeat BGM continues as a female narrator provides details about a juice product, including ingredients and price. Sounds of liquid pouring and glass clinking are heard. (3) The narration shifts to describing the food item, with rhythmic chewing sounds and satisfied 'mmm' vocalizations layered over the music. (4) The voice becomes more instructional and persuasive while discussing the shampoo, accompanied by the sound of running water and squelching soap suds. (5) The music reaches a peak during the 'before and after' reveal and then maintains a steady rhythm until the women say a final goodbye and the audio fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '如果來好事多，只能選三樣，你會買甚麼？' (If you come to Costco and can only choose 3 items, what would you buy?). Decorative Text: '跟我來' (Follow me!) in a bright yellow bubble. (2) Functional Text: '純在 雪梨酪梨 綜合果汁' (Natural Benefits Pear Avocado Mixed Juice) and '195元'. Hook Text: '超猛炸馬桶神器' (Extremely powerful toilet exploding tool) with a humorous, energetic tone. (3) Functional Text: '豪華蟹肉沙拉堡' (Deluxe Crab Meat Salad Bun) and '160元'. (4) Functional Text: 'Dr.FORHAIR 固髮煥活洗髮露' and '729元'. Effect Text: '洗前' (Before washing) and '洗後' (After washing) appearing during the hair comparison. (5) Hook Text: '強化髮根減少掉髮' (Strengthen hair roots and reduce hair loss) and '臭頭油頭說掰掰' (Say goodbye to smelly and oily hair).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Item 1 (Food) -> Item 2 (Food) -> Item 3 (Personal Care) -> Demo/Results -> Outro

(4) A pair of hands picks up one egg, showing its surface, and then brings in another egg from a different source for a side-by-side comparison, tapping the shells against each other.

A woman speaks in a high-pitched, excited tone about finding a specific product at a warehouse store. (2) A man's voice enters, sounding supportive and adding details about the product's availability and quality. (3) Ambient noise from the warehouse is faintly audible in the background. (4) Distinct clinking sound effects are heard as the eggshells are tapped together, and 'pop' sound effects coincide with text appearing on screen.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is live-action. A woman wearing a pink beret and a light-colored dress is shown stirring a cup of instant noodles vigorously. A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlaid on top. (2) Scene shifts to a Costco warehouse where the woman holds a large pink box of 'MANTECARE' pasta, pointing to the shelves and then the price tag. (3) Back at home, she opens the box to reveal eight individual cups of pasta. (4) The camera focuses on the stirring process, showing the thin noodles and white sauce gradually thickening. (5) Two women are seated at a table, holding the cups and using chopsticks to lift the noodles, showing off the texture while talking excitedly with various facial expressions of enjoyment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals enter immediately, speaking quickly and excitedly about the 'stir 100 times' challenge. Background music is upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop. (2) The audio shifts to a descriptive tone as the female narrator explains the price per cup and the convenience of 3-minute microwaving, over muffled ambient warehouse sounds. (3) Sound effects of vigorous stirring 'shshsh' are prominent. (4) A second female voice joins in, and both women engage in a rhythmic dialogue, using words like 'QQ' to describe the chewiness. The BGM maintains a steady, happy rhythm throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '是什麼泡面' (What instant noodle is this?), '竟然要自己攪拌100次' (Actually have to stir 100 times myself). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '攪拌100次' (Stir 100 times) in a colorful burst font; '真香系列' (Really smells good series); '每碗61塊' (61 dollars per bowl) highlighted in yellow. (3) Functional Text: '微波3分鐘就可以吃' (Microwave for 3 minutes to eat). (4) Decorative Text: '乳化!' (Emulsify!) appearing during the stirring phase; '非常Q彈' (Very chewy) during the tasting phase.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Stirring) -> Origin (Store purchase) -> Unboxing -> Process (Emulsifying) -> Conclusion (Tasting review)

It then provides practical consumer information including the price point ($61 TWD per cup) and cooking methods, ultimately validating the product through a two-person tasting test that highlights unique textures not found in standard convenience store food.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black vest over a white puffed-sleeve shirt stands in a Costco warehouse, holding a pre-packaged 'XO Sauce Stir-fry Radish Cake' kit. (2) Close-up shots of the product label and its contents, including radish cake slices, eggs, and vegetables; a hand is placed over the cake to demonstrate its size. (3) Transition to a kitchen setting where the woman fries the radish cake slices in a pan until golden brown, then adds vegetables and sauce, tossing them together. (4) Two women are shown seated at a table, eating the prepared dish with chopsticks, nodding, and gesturing enthusiastically. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a graphic title card featuring a character and the text 'Costco 每週特價速報' over a background of store shelves. (2) A series of rapid cuts showcase various products inside a Costco warehouse, starting with Iberian pork belly rolls and Skippy peanut butter. Hands are occasionally seen pointing at or holding the products. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of items including energy jellies, instant noodles, chewing gum, snacks, bottled water, tea, laundry detergent, pet food, and various wines, all displayed on their respective warehouse shelves. (4) The video maintains this fast-paced product-reveal format until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice introduces the segment with a friendly, rapid-fire greeting: '好市多每週特價速報，記得追踪我們哦'. (2) As each product appears, the male narrator quickly reads out the product name and its sale price in a rhythmic, professional tone. (3) The audio consists of a continuous stream of vocal information layered over the persistent, high-tempo BGM. No ambient store noise or specific SFX are audible over the studio-quality voiceover and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '好市多 每週特價速報 08/18 - 08/24 記得追蹤我們' appearing on the opening screen with an energetic tone. (2) Functional Text: For every product, a consistent overlay appears showing 'Product Name' (e.g., 西班牙 伊比利豬五花肉卷), 'Original Price' (e.g., 原價599/KG), 'Discount amount' (e.g., -120), and 'Sale Price' (e.g., 特價479/KG). (3) Branding: Specific brand names like 'SKIPPY', 'AIRWAVES', 'CALBEE', 'KIRKLAND', 'KITKAT', and 'CORONA' are featured prominently in the text overlays.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a tan bucket hat and a black top sits on a wooden floor crying, surrounded by lottery invoices; a second woman in a beret enters the frame to comfort her and presents a pink gift box. (2) Close-up shots show four heart-shaped cheesecakes in flavors of lemon, matcha, chocolate, and original, decorated with cute smiley faces on the lids. (3) The two women are shown eating the cakes at a kitchen counter, expressing exaggerated delight and giving thumbs-up gestures. (4) A DIY segment shows hands pouring rum from a 'Santiago de Cuba' bottle into a glass with cherries, then topping the cheesecake with the soaked fruit. (5) The video concludes with the two women holding several branded gift boxes and a paper bag, pointing at a smartphone screen to demonstrate an online purchase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with the sound of a woman crying loudly, which is quickly overlaid by upbeat, fast-tempo background music. (2) Two female voices speak in high-pitched, energetic tones, alternating between describing the flavors and making exaggerated 'Mmm' sounds of satisfaction. (3) Audible 'clinking' sounds of metal spoons hitting the heart-shaped tins occur throughout the eating sequence. (4) A consistent, bubbly background track continues as the voices explain the 72% cheese content and the brand location. (5) The audio ends with a clear, direct-to-camera address inviting viewers to participate in a giveaway.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: 'Invoice hasn't won for three years in a row' (Sad tone). (2) Hook: 'Don't be sad, come eat some healing cheesecake!' (Encouraging). (3) Functional: 'Summer must-eat: Sour and sweet Lemon' and 'Shizuoka Matcha from Japan' (Informational). (4) Decorative: '72% super thick cheesecake' (Emphasis). (5) Functional: 'Taichung's newest souvenir: Mimian 72% thick cheesecake' (Branding). (6) Call to Action: 'Like and comment to tell me your unlucky moment' (Engagement).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Sadness) -> Solution (Cake Reveal) -> Flavor Montage (Eating) -> Creative DIY -> Outro (Giveaway/CTA)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a graphic-heavy intro featuring a cartoon character, the Costco logo, and text announcing a weekly special price report for August 25th to 31st against a blurred background of a shopping warehouse. (2) A rapid-fire sequence of shots follows, each showcasing a different product on Costco shelves: trays of Choice beef, boxes of crackers, I-Mei milk tea, ramen, Airwaves gum, seaweed snacks, chocolate wafers, noodle snacks, garlic bread, rice crackers, sesame cakes, cashews, almond crisps, and various beverages and pantry staples. (3) Each product shot includes hands occasionally reaching for items or adjusting them, but mostly focuses on the packaging and the yellow price tags. The camera transitions quickly between products in a high-speed montage. (4) The sequence continues through household goods like underwear, bottled water, tea, yogurt, and cleaning or personal care items like sanitary pads, mouthwash, and toothpaste, ending on boxes of Corona Extra beer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic and fast-talking male voice-over begins immediately, announcing the Costco weekly special report and encouraging viewers to follow. The background music is upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop. (2) Throughout the video, the narrator rapidly lists product names and their discounted prices in sync with the visual changes. The tone is consistently enthusiastic and promotional. (3) Ambient warehouse noise is virtually non-existent, replaced entirely by the studio-recorded narration and music. (4) The music maintains a constant high tempo until the video cuts off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'Costco Weekly Special Report 08/25 - 08/31, remember to follow us' in large, colorful Chinese characters. (2) Functional text: Throughout the video, each product is labeled with its name, original price (e.g., '原價399'), discount amount (e.g., '-80'), and final special price (e.g., '特價319') in Traditional Chinese. (3) Brand names like 'COSTCO', 'AIRWAVES', 'MONBANA', 'SAMLIP', 'UCC', 'KITKAT', 'COLGATE', and 'CORONA' appear on packaging or in functional text overlays.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) 0:00-0:20: A woman wearing a black beret and a dark off-the-shoulder top stands in a warehouse setting (Costco) in front of a large stack of red KitKat boxes. She holds a large KitKat Biscoff box, smiling and gesturing towards it excitedly. (2) 0:21-0:24: The scene shifts to an indoor room. Two women (one from the previous scene and another in a purple top) are seated at a table. They lift the lid of the large box to reveal 12 individual KitKat bars inside, laughing happily. (3) 0:25-0:31: Close-up shots show hands unwrapping a silver foil KitKat bar and using pink scissors to cut the chocolate into sections, revealing the internal wafer and crushed cookie filling on a heart-shaped plate. (4) 0:32-1:28: Back to the two women at the table. They taste the chocolate, react with thumbs-up gestures, animated facial expressions, and hand movements while discussing the product. The woman in the beret changes into a zebra-print bucket hat mid-way through.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) 0:00-0:20: Upbeat, high-tempo pop background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks rapidly. Faint ambient warehouse hum is audible. (2) 0:21-0:31: Music continues at a steady pace. Sound of two women laughing together. Specific SFX of foil crinkling and a 'snip' sound when scissors cut the chocolate are present. (3) 0:32-1:28: Continuous dialogue between two female speakers. One is more talkative and descriptive (energetic tone), while the other provides occasional reactions and agreement. The background music maintains a cheerful atmosphere. Occasional 'ding' or soft pop sound effects accompany text pop-ups.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. '超甜超好吃' (Super sweet super tasty) and '超巨大 KitKat 隱藏脆餅口味' (Super giant KitKat hidden crispy cookie flavor) appear as large, colorful captions. (2) Functional Text: 'KitKat跟蓮花脆餅乾合作啦' (KitKat and Lotus Biscoff collaboration), '超大一條 375元' (Huge bar 375 NTD), '有12入' (Contains 12). (3) Emotional/Variety Text: '哈哈哈哈' (Laughter), '完美無瑕' (Perfect), '更棒更脆' (Better and crunchier), '有夠甜' (So sweet), '大加分' (Big plus).

(3) The sound of a metal tin being shaken (pepper salt) is heard over the sizzling. (4) The sizzling fades out, and the music volume lowers slightly. Two female voices are heard in a conversational, enthusiastic dialogue. Clinking of spoons against plates occurs occasionally.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a stylized title screen displaying the Costco logo, a cartoon character, and text announcing a weekly special report for early September. (3) The visual flow continues with shots of dairy products, snacks, beverages, and household cleaning supplies, often showing them stacked on pallets or in refrigerated cases. (4) The final segment displays rows of wine bottles, beer crates, and health/beauty products like tampons, maintaining the fast-paced editing style until the end.

(3) The audio maintains this high-energy combination of music and voiceover throughout the entire duration, with no significant ambient noise or pauses. (4) The music and narration cut off abruptly at the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "COSTCO 開學季特惠" (Costco Back-to-School Specials) and "每週特價速報 09/01-09/07" (Weekly Special Report). (2) Functional text appears in every shot, identifying the product (e.g., "舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙") and its pricing structure: "原價" (Original Price), discount amount, and "特價" (Sale Price). (3) Call to action: "記得追蹤我們" (Remember to follow us) is displayed on the opening screen.

Upbeat, light-tempo acoustic background music starts playing. The sound of plastic crinkling is heard as they open the bread container. (3) The primary speaker describes the texture and taste, while the second woman adds comments. Sounds of chewing and occasional laughter are present. The music remains consistent until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout. (3) The woman returns to the frame, gesturing with the bags and comparing them to other produce on the shelves. (4) The scene shifts to a kitchen where the purple sweet potatoes are being washed in a metal mesh basket under a sink. (5) In a cozy indoor setting, the woman is seen feeding small pieces of the baked, deep-purple sweet potato to a small white dog while laughing; a second woman's hands are visible helping to break the potato apart.

Faint ambient warehouse noise is heard in the background. (2) The female voice continues with a rhythmic, almost melodic cadence while discussing prices. (3) The background music remains consistent as the scene shifts, accompanied by the subtle sound of water or light kitchen activity. (4) The female voice transitions to a warmer, more humorous tone, accompanied by the sounds of a dog eating and genuine laughter from two people.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '好市多最新出的' (Latest from Costco) and '紫心地瓜 199元一大袋' (Purple Heart Sweet Potato 199 Yuan a big bag) in bright, stylized fonts. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the narration about price comparisons ('平時的地瓜是175元') and health benefits ('滿滿的花青素'). perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a title card featuring the Costco Wholesale logo, an illustration of Wreck-it-Ralph, and text indicating a weekly special report. (2) A rapid series of cuts follows, showing various products in a warehouse environment: Kleenex toilet paper stacks, vacuum-sealed beef, boxes of MamyPoko diapers, Orange House detergent, and shelves of snacks. Each shot is centered on the product packaging and price tag. (3) The sequence continues through rows of beverages, including juices, milk tea, and alcoholic bottles, interspersed with shots of refrigerated meats like salmon and chicken. (4) The final segment features household goods like Disney rugs, soy sauce, olive oil, and personal care items such as Biore wipes and mosquito repellent, ending with shelves of wine bottles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic background music with a steady, upbeat tempo starts immediately. (2) A male voice speaks rapidly and continuously, announcing the name of each product and its discounted price in Mandarin Chinese. The vocal delivery is energetic and promotional. (3) The audio remains consistent throughout, with the music maintaining the pace behind the dominant vocal track. (4) There is no detectable ambient store noise or sound effects, suggesting a post-produced studio voiceover.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional and Hook Text: 'Costco Wholesale Weekly Special Report 09/08-09/14' and 'Remember to follow us' in large, colorful fonts. (2) Functional Text: Each product shot is overlaid with large yellow and white text including product names like 'Kleenex Three-layer Toilet Paper', 'US Choice NY Strip Steak', and 'MamyPoko Night Pants'. (3) Functional Text: Below product names, price information is listed as 'Original Price', 'Discount Amount', and 'Special Price' in a consistent vertical layout for every item.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Continuous rapid sequence of product deals -> Outro (implicitly ends on final product)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle recommendation and endorsement for 'Yumei Farm' Golden Sweet Corn at Costco. It aims to persuade viewers to purchase the product by highlighting its convenience (ready to eat/microwaveable), low price (46.5 TWD per cob), health benefits (good carbs for fitness), and immediate availability/scarcity (showing empty shelves).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a clear product focus, price breakdown, and specific brand mentions in both visual overlays and audio narration.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show text overlays and 'food find' vlog style common in East Asian social media.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'scarcity marketing' by showing the nearly empty shelf is a key visual hook to increase the perceived value of the product for the audience.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a black-and-white patterned bucket hat and a white lace top is at a warehouse-style supermarket, looking at shelves stocked with yellow boxes. (2) She excitedly picks up a box labeled 'Inari Mochi' and shows the packaging, which features fried tofu skins and rice cakes. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen or living room area where she unpacks three individual bags onto a table. (4) Close-up shots show her hands opening a fried tofu skin and stuffing a rectangular mochi piece inside. (5) She adds a slice of cheese to one of the stuffed tofu skins. (6) After heating, the food is shown on a plate; the mochi has softened and is oozing out slightly. (7) Two women sit at a table, eat the mochi, and demonstrate its stretchiness with their chopsticks, nodding and smiling with approval.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals open the video with an enthusiastic tone, expressing joy at finding a long-sought product. Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music starts simultaneously. (2) The vocal remains fast-paced and friendly, explaining the preparation steps and brand details. (3) Light sound effects (dinging sounds) are used to punctuate text appearances. (4) As the tasting begins, satisfied vocalizations and shorter, high-pitched exclamations of 'Good!' are heard alongside the music. (5) The music stays consistent until the end, where the vocals reach a peak of recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '稻荷豆皮麻糬' (Inari Tofu Skin Mochi) serves as the main title hook. (2) Narrative Text: '終於找到你' (Finally found you) expresses the creator's excitement. (3) Functional Text: '100% 日本米' (100% Japanese Rice) and brand logos like 'IRIS OHYAMA' appear for product info. (4) Decorative Text: '加熱後的樣子' (Appearance after heating) labels the transformation stage. (5) Emotional Hook: '親子同玩都開心' (Happy for parents and kids to play/cook together) suggests a target audience. (6) Strong Hook: '可以買' (Can buy/Must buy) appears at the end as a final recommendation.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Discovery -> Unboxing/Prep -> Cooking Hack -> Tasting -> Final Verdict

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a brown off-the-shoulder top stands in a warehouse-style store (Costco), holding a long packaged baguette and speaking enthusiastically to the camera. (2) The camera zooms in on the baguette inside its packaging, showing various grains and seeds like quinoa and pumpkin seeds on the crust. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen or dining area where the woman and another female friend (wearing a patterned bucket hat) are seated at a counter. They hold slices of the bread and the original packaging. (4) Close-up shots show the bread being taken out of the bag, its texture when sliced, and a container of cheese spread. (5) The two women taste the bread with the spread, reacting with positive facial expressions, thumbs-up gestures, and excited movements.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks in a friendly, high-pitched tone, accompanied by the muffled ambient noise of a busy retail store. (2) A male narrator's voice (off-screen) joins in, speaking with high energy and a 'variety show' style of delivery, describing the product's benefits. (3) Occasional cartoonish sound effects (SFX) like dings and sparkles occur alongside text appearances. (4) The audio transitions to a cleaner indoor acoustic environment where the two female voices talk and laugh, while the upbeat BGM continues at a consistent volume.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '必買減肥神器 (歐式高纖穀粒長棍)' (Must-buy weight loss holy grail - European high-fiber grain baguette) in bright yellow/red colors with a flame emoji. (3) Functional Text: Standard traditional Chinese subtitles translating the dialogue throughout the video. (4) Decorative/Hook Text: '選比較健康' (Choose healthier) with a thumbs-up emoji. (5) Functional Text: '丹麥 輕打發起司醬' (Denmark Light Whipped Cheese Spread) labels the pairing product. (6) Decorative/Hook Text: '嚇死人的好吃' (Scary good) and '太厲害了' (Too amazing) emphasize the taste quality.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store Intro -> Close-up Product Specs -> Home Tasting & Pairing -> Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a kitchen holds a large bag of Costco frozen headless white shrimp, picking one out and comparing its size to her palm. (2) She moves to prepare the shrimp, rinsing them in a bowl and adding salt and pepper. (3) She pours oil into a stainless steel pan and starts pan-frying the shrimp, which begin to steam and turn pink. (4) She holds a bottle of Bacardi rum, jokingly pours some into the pan while gesturing dramatically. (5) The scene shifts to a living room where she and another woman sit at a table, peeling the cooked shrimp and eating them with enthusiastic, satisfied facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Cheerful and upbeat electronic background music begins. An energetic female voice introduces the Costco shrimp. (2) Sounds of water running and the rhythmic clinking of a bowl as shrimp are seasoned. (3) A loud sizzling sound occurs as the shrimp are placed in the hot pan. (4) A deep, comedic male voice-over interjects, shouting playfully 'You idiot!' as the rum is added, followed by more sizzling. (5) Sounds of shrimp shells being peeled (crunching) and slurping noises while eating, ending with loud verbal affirmations like 'Mmm!' and 'So good!' in Mandarin.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Cooking frozen headless white shrimp' and 'Teaching everyone now' appear in colorful bubbles. (2) Decorative Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is at the top. 'Good Chef Atou serves dishes' appears as a variety-show style title. (3) Functional Text: 'Each one is almost as big as a palm', 'No need to defrost', and 'Flip when it turns red' provide cooking instructions. (4) Effect Text: 'Choke! You idiot' and 'Very juicy and fragrant!' appear with stickers to emphasize the humor and the taste review.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Preparation -> Cooking Demo -> Tasting and Review

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a black beret and a sheer black top stands in a warehouse aisle holding a large clear container of beef wraps, speaking energetically to the camera. (2) The scene cuts to extreme close-ups of the wraps inside the container, highlighting the layers of beef, tomatoes, cheese, and greens. (3) The setting shifts to a home kitchen where the same woman and another woman in a patterned bucket hat are seated at a table with the wraps, gesturing enthusiastically while talking. (4) A hand is shown placing a wrap into a white Philips air fryer, adjusting the temperature dial to 180 degrees and the timer to 3 minutes. (5) The two women taste the heated wraps, displaying exaggerated facial expressions of delight and giving thumbs-up gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin Chinese. (2) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'sparkle' chimes are interspersed to highlight specific text overlays. (3) The vocals transition to a more resonant environment (indoor kitchen) as two female voices engage in an excited dialogue. (4) Mechanical clicking and a low hum are heard as the air fryer is operated. (5) Audible sounds of chewing and 'Mmm' vocalizations follow the tasting segment, accompanied by continued fast-paced narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the creators' speech. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '最後一盒' (Last box) in bright pink/yellow colors with a shocked tone. (3) Hook Text: '不浪費年費！鮮蔬牛肉捲' (Don't waste the membership fee! Fresh Veggie Beef Wraps) appearing as a large title. (4) Effect Text: '肉多菜也多' (Lots of meat and veggies) and '世界好吃' (World's delicious) accompanied by heart symbols to emphasize excitement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene is live-action. Two young women stand in a warehouse aisle; the woman on the left wears a patterned bucket hat and a white top, and the woman on the right wears a black beret and a brown top. They are holding three large animal-shaped plush pillows (a white bear, a pink hippo, and a green crocodile) and smiling at the camera. (2) They move the pillows closer to the camera, showcasing the quilted texture and patterns. They gesture towards the items as if explaining their features. (3) The woman on the right takes the crocodile pillow and playfully hits the woman on the left with it; they both laugh and continue to pose with the products against the background of high storage shelves.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female voice narrating enthusiastically over upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop background music. (2) As the narration continues, faint ambient warehouse noise and the rustling of fabric can be heard. (3) During the playful interaction, cartoonish sound effects (SFX) such as 'boing' and comic hitting sounds are layered over the voices, which become more laughing and informal. The music maintains a constant volume throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. Decorative Text: '鱷魚 超好看' (Crocodile looks great) and '最便宜的動物涼感抱枕' (Cheapest animal cooling pillows) serve as hooks. (2) Functional Text: '最新出的動物造型 好可愛唷' (New animal shapes, so cute) and '這個只要439元' (This only costs 439 yuan). (3) Functional Text: Specific labels for '河馬' (Hippo), '熊' (Bear), and '鱷魚' (Crocodile) appear. (4) Decorative Text: '高度60公分' (Height 60 cm) and '價格划算' (Good price), ending with a humorous caption '還可以拿來毆打你' (Can also be used to hit you).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Demonstration -> Humorous Interaction

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a title card overlaying a blurred shot of a busy retail store with shopping carts; an animated character is visible on the left. (3) The products are shown statically or with slight pans, each accompanied by a prominent text overlay displaying pricing information. (4) The sequence concludes after cycling through dozens of items, maintaining a consistent editing style throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male narrator speaks with an energetic and rhythmic tone, announcing the product names and their discounted prices in sync with the visual transitions. (3) Occasional ambient sounds of a retail environment, like distant chatter or cart movements, are faintly audible under the music and vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 秋季大特價 好市多 每週特價速報 09/15-09/21 記得追蹤我們' - Informative hook setting the context and dates. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Multiple overlays for every product shown, such as '美國特選 無骨牛小排烤片 原價1399/KG -150 特價1249/KG', listing original prices, discounts, and final prices in a variety-show style layout. (3) Functional Text: Specific end dates for certain sales, like '特價至 9/18', appear on individual items.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are standing inside a large warehouse-style store, holding a large blue box featuring various Disney Toy Story characters. The woman on the right, wearing a patterned bucket hat and a white frilly top, gestures towards the box and points at specific sections while smiling and talking. The woman on the left, in a black top and hat, holds the other side of the box and nods. (2) The camera zooms in on the box, which contains 20 smaller individual puzzle tins. One of the women's hands points to different character illustrations like Woody, Buzz Lightyear, and Slinky Dog. (3) The shot cuts back to the two women standing next to a pallet stacked high with these puzzle boxes. They continue to speak enthusiastically, with the woman on the right giving a thumbs-up gesture and the woman on the left holding one of the small metal tins.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts playing immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins speaking in Mandarin, mentioning 'Costco' and 'Disney' and highlighting the 'cheapest and cutest puzzles.' (2) The same voice continues, explaining the product details, including the price of 635 dollars and the count of 20 boxes. The pace of speech is fast and energetic. (3) A second female voice is heard briefly, agreeing and adding comments about the small size and gifting potential. Ambient noise of a large retail environment is subtly audible in the background. (4) The main speaker concludes with a final recommendation as the music maintains its energetic tone until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Costco Wholesale' logo appears at the top. (2) '迪士尼有史以來' (Disney's ever...) appears as a hook to grab attention. (3) '最便宜又可愛的拼圖' (Cheapest and cutest puzzle) emphasizes value and aesthetics. (4) '$ 635' indicates the price point clearly. (5) '鐵盒' (Metal box) highlights the material quality. (6) Various variety-show style captions like '好划算' (Great value) and '好推薦' (Highly recommended) emphasize the positive sentiment.

(2) Occasional interjections from a female voice are heard, saying phrases like 'let's try it' in an enthusiastic tone. (3) Sound effects including a 'crunching' sound are audible when the egg roll is shown being broken and eaten. (4) The audio remains consistent in its high energy, with the music and voice-over maintaining a fast pace until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top center. (2) '肉鬆蛋捲' (Pork Floss Egg Roll) appears as a large decorative title in the middle. (3) '童話故事書' (Fairytale storybook) is used as descriptive text for the packaging. (4) '好市多 9月超級黑馬' (Costco September's super dark horse) appears as a hook to grab attention. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two women and two small dogs playing in an outdoor infinity pool at dusk. (2) Scenes transition to show a modern, multi-story building exterior followed by the women exploring a spacious balcony with panoramic views of green fields. (3) The interior tour begins, showing one woman in a bathtub and then sitting in a designer armchair in a room with large glass windows. (4) Close-up shots feature high-end amenities: a Marshall speaker and a ghd hairdryer. (5) The duo is seen in a large communal living space with their dogs, pointing towards a massive projector screen. (6) They are then shown singing enthusiastically in a private KTV room equipped with professional gear. (7) The women ride bicycles in front of the villa building. (8) The video concludes with the two women sitting by the pool edge, talking directly to the camera as the sky darkens.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately. Two high-pitched, excited female voices introduce a pet-friendly location. (2) The soundscape remains dominated by the energetic BGM and continuous narration detailing the villa's features like the pool and Guishan Island view. (3) Occasional sound effects like camera shutter clicks and water splashing are heard. (4) During the KTV segment, muffled singing and reverb effects are audible. (5) The final phase features a conversational tone between the two women with the music volume lowering slightly before ending.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '可以跟狗狗一起游泳的地方' (A place where you can swim with dogs) - Informative and inviting tone. (2) Hook Text: '怎麼能不來！' (How can you not come!) - High-energy, emotional hook. (3) Functional Text: '自己的無邊際泳池' (Your own infinity pool), '整棟陽台都是我們的' (The whole balcony is ours), '直接透視龜山島' (Direct view of Guishan Island) - Highlighting specific selling points. (4) Decorative Text: 'I Love 宜蘭' with heart emojis. (5) Product labels: 'Marshall', 'ghd', 'Netflix'. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a graphic overlay featuring the Costco Wholesale logo, a cartoon character, and the title '好市多 每週特價速報' (Costco Weekly Special Report) for the dates 06/02-06/08. (2) A rapid sequence of shots follows, each showcasing a different product inside a Costco warehouse. Items include fresh blueberry panna cotta, ORA2 ME toothpaste, Melano CC facial cleanser, strawberry layer cake, tiramisu, Mayflower kitchen towels, Pringles, Starbucks coffee beans, and various other snacks and household goods. (3) Each shot highlights the product on a shelf or in a refrigerator, with price tags and discount information overlaid on the screen. (4) Hands are occasionally seen reaching for or pointing at the products, and shoppers are visible as blurred figures in the background aisles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male narrator speaks with an enthusiastic, promotional tone, rapidly announcing the name of each product and its discounted price in Mandarin. (3) Subtle sound effects like 'dings' or 'pops' occur periodically as new text overlays appear. (4) Faint ambient noise from the warehouse environment, including distant chatter, is audible beneath the music and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '好市多 每週特價速報 06/02-06/08' and '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us) appears in the intro. (2) Functional text for each item includes product names such as '新鮮藍莓奶酪', 'ORA2 ME 亮白香氣牙膏', and 'MELANO CC 酵素深層清潔洗面乳'. (3) Pricing info is consistently shown as '原價' (Original Price), the discount amount (e.g., '-50'), and '特價' (Special Price). (4) Status text like '售完為止' (While supplies last) appears for specific items.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire showcase of discounted products -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a white off-the-shoulder top and a black and white bucket hat stands in the freezer section of a Costco, pointing to and then holding up a large bag of chicken strips. (2) The scene transitions to a home dining setting where the same woman and another woman in a black beret sit behind a table with the chicken product and plates of cooked chicken. (3) The women use forks to hold up pieces of fried chicken to the camera, showing the crispy texture, and then eat them with enthusiastic expressions. (4) Close-up shots of the cooked chicken on a black plate are interspersed with their commentary.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop background music plays continuously. A high-pitched, excited female voice introduces the 'Dachan' chicken strips at Costco. (2) The audio shifts to a dialogue between two females discussing the product's price, weight (1.7kg), and the ease of preparation using an air fryer. (3) Vocal tones remain friendly and persuasive throughout the tasting phase, with clear enunciation of the brand name and positive descriptors of the taste.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' and '大成香辣炸雞柳' (Dachan Spicy Chicken Strips) appear as persistent headers. (2) Functional text: '$499' and '1.7公斤' (1.7kg) indicate product details. (3) Decorative/Hook text: '非常簡單' (Very simple), '地瓜粉' (Sweet potato starch), and '值得推薦' (Worth recommending) emphasize product benefits in an enthusiastic tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a sheer grey off-the-shoulder top over a black camisole, stands in a Costco warehouse. She is holding a large gold and white box of 'Drip Chicken Essence Scallop Porridge' while pointing at the price tag of $999. She expresses shock and talks to an off-screen person whose hand enters the frame to point at her. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen or dining area. The same woman and another woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat are seated behind a table. They are holding a packet of the porridge and a bowl, showing the contents to the camera. (3) The woman in the bucket hat uses a spoon to lift the porridge, showing its consistency and small scallops. Both women react with varying expressions, from serious evaluation to laughter, as they discuss the taste and whether it's worth the price. (4) The video ends with them joking and pointing at the product box.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a female voice speaking in Mandarin with an excited and high-pitched tone, discussing the expensive price of the product at Costco. Background warehouse noise is faint. (2) An upbeat and fast-tempo BGM enters as a second female voice joins in. They engage in a humorous, rapid-fire dialogue with frequent laughter. (3) The audio environment transitions to a cleaner indoor acoustic space. The two women describe the taste of the porridge, mentioning 'chicken essence' (滴雞精) and 'scallops' (干貝). (4) The BGM continues throughout, punctuating their jokes and reactions. The speech density is high, with overlapping voices and enthusiastic tones.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. Subtitles translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue. (2) Functional Text: Price tag shows '$999'. (3) Decorative Text: '羊毛出在羊身上' (The wool comes from the sheep) appears with a humorous tone as they discuss costs. (4) Decorative Text: '非常淡雅' (Very elegant/light) and '錢包就不補' (The wallet is not nourished) appear as variety-show style captions to emphasize their points.
