perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a brown mesh top is inside a Costco store, holding a large plastic container of 'Fruitist' brand blueberries. She points at the label and talks to the camera. (2) The camera shows a close-up of the blueberries inside the container, highlighting their large size. There are quick cuts showing other boxes of blueberries and grapes on the store shelves. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting where the same woman and another woman in a patterned bucket hat are sitting at a table. They are holding up individual blueberries to the camera to demonstrate their size. (4) Both women are seen eating the blueberries, gesturing with their hands, giving thumbs-up, and expressing positive reactions through facial expressions.

Background ambient noise of a busy retail store is audible, including distant voices and cart movements. (2) The audio transitions as the scene changes to a quieter home environment, though the BGM continues. Two female voices interact, discussing the product. Sounds of the plastic container opening and the crunching/chewing of the fruit are heard clearly. (3) The music maintains a consistent tempo throughout the video, ending with a final enthusiastic statement from the speakers.

(3) Hook Text: '便宜大家都在買 最巨大的藍莓' (Cheap, everyone is buying, the biggest blueberries) shown with yellow lightning bolt stickers. (4) Functional Text: '510克 半公斤只要269' (510g, half a kilo for only 269) indicating price and weight. (5) Decorative Text: '完全咬得到' (Completely chewable) with blue stylized font. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a colorful graphic overlay featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and a cartoon character, with large text announcing a weekly special report. (2) A rapid montage follows, showing various products on warehouse shelves or in refrigerated sections. Each shot focuses on a specific item, such as Mayflower tissues, egg rolls, Coca-Cola bottles, packs of beef, pork, squid, and salads. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of household and food items, including snacks like Snickers and Doritos, clothing like Levi's jeans, and beverages like Pellegrino and UCC coffee, ending with a final shot of alcoholic beverages.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. An energetic male voiceover introduces the Costco weekly specials. (2) As the visuals cut rapidly between products, the male voice maintains a high-speed narration, calling out the name of each product and its discounted price in sync with the visual changes. Digital 'ping' sound effects accompany the appearance of price text. (3) The energetic narration and BGM continue consistently until the very end, concluding with a final price callout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Title text: 'COSTCO 每週特價速報 09/22-09/28 記得追蹤我們' (Costco Weekly Special Report, dates, 'remember to follow us'). (2) For each featured product, text overlays display the brand/item name, original price '原價', the discount amount (e.g., '-70'), and the final special price '特價'. (3) The text is large, bold, and uses high-contrast colors (yellow, red, and white) to emphasize the savings and urgency of the deals.

(3) The woman walks through the mall towards the camera, excitedly holding two shopping bags from the brand '米滋崎'. They sit at a table with the cakes open, slicing them and showing the internal texture to the camera while eating and gesturing with thumbs up.

Ambient mall noise is low. (2) Short, sharp sound effects (SFX) occur when text overlays pop up on screen. (3) During the tasting segment, two distinct female voices are heard. One is more energetic and descriptive, while the other provides agreement and supplementary comments. The sound of a knife cutting through cake and forks clinking on ceramic plates is clearly audible.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a title screen showing a person on a white scooter with a 'Wreck-It Ralph' animation overlay in front of a Costco Wholesale sign. Items include Kirin milk tea, Fuji apples, Pampers diapers, Mi Kuai Kuai snacks, jelly jars, Seattle coffee, Japanese biscuits, Ruffles chips, Pierre butter cookies, and bottled tea. (3) The sequence continues with apparel (PUMA), health supplements (Weider), candy (Chupa Chups), almond tofu, GUM toothpaste, OxiClean, Downy softener, and Tide pods. (4) The final segment displays fresh and frozen goods: seafood, sausages, ginseng, pastries, almond milk, pet food, cheese, Perrier water, shrimp cakes, Listerine, electric toothbrushes, Mackie's ice cream, KitKat cereal, skincare, and alcoholic beverages.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice introduces the 'Costco Weekly Special Report' over upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music. (2) As the products flash on screen, the same male voice rapidly recites the product name and its discounted price for every single item shown. (3) The background music remains consistent in its high energy, and the speaker's tone is consistently excited and promotional throughout the entire duration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text at the start: 'COSTCO 每週特價速報 06/30~07/06 記得追蹤我們' (Costco Weekly Special Report, June 30 - July 6, Remember to follow us). (2) Functional text throughout: Each product shot is overlaid with its brand name, item description, 'Original Price' (原價), 'Discount' (-), and 'Special Price' (特價) in large, colorful font. (3) Functional text at the end: Repeated call to action to follow the account.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women standing in front of a Costco Wholesale entrance sign, holding an apple box and waving; they appear joyful and energetic. Each product is shown briefly, usually held by a hand or on a shelf, with a clear focus on the item and its price tag. Products include decorative bear statues, raw meats (chicken breast, beef), alcoholic beverages (wine, whiskey), snacks (biscuits, chips, chocolate), produce (apples), and prepared foods (pork knuckles, seafood soup). (3) The shots are characterized by quick cuts and minimal camera movement, focusing entirely on presenting as many discounted items as possible before ending.

(2) Two female voices are heard briefly at the very beginning shouting a greeting in Mandarin. (3) A male narrator's voice enters quickly, speaking in an energetic and fast-paced tone. He systematically lists the names of the products shown on screen and their discounted prices. The narration is tightly edited to match the rapid visual cuts. (4) No significant ambient store noise or sound effects are audible over the loud BGM and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Massive red and yellow title '好市多 新年特價速報' (Costco New Year Special Report) with the date range '01/27-02/02'. (2) Functional Text: For every item shown, a structured text block appears detailing the brand, product name, original price, discount amount, and the final 'Special Price' (特價). (3) Decorative Text: Phrases like '新年快樂' (Happy New Year) and '什麼都好買' (Everything is a good buy) appear to create a festive and urgent shopping atmosphere. (4) Functional Text: Specific store availability notes like '桃園南崁店售完為止' (Available at Taoyuan Nankan store until sold out).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top and a brown skirt, stands on a sunny street in Tainan, smiling and gesturing towards a corner shop behind her. (2) The scene cuts to a food stall where a worker in a red shirt and mask is ladling ingredients into bowls of steaming porridge. (3) A series of close-up shots showcase different dishes: a bowl of mixed seafood porridge, a large piece of fish belly served in broth, two salted duck eggs in a small dish, and several pieces of braised tofu. (4) Two young women are seen sitting inside the shop at a metal table, each holding a spoon and eating the porridge; they nod in approval and use hand gestures to express satisfaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful female voice speaks with an enthusiastic tone while upbeat, mid-tempo electronic background music plays; ambient sounds of a busy street with motorcycles can be heard. (2) A clear male voice-over enters, narrating the names and prices of the food items as they are shown on screen, synchronized with the transitions. (3) Short 'pop' and 'ting' sound effects occur during scene transitions and when text overlays appear. (4) Indistinct background chatter from other diners is audible while the female voices make appreciative 'mmm' sounds and talk softly between bites.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '每個人在台南都有自己喜歡的鹹粥' (Everyone in Tainan has their favorite savory porridge) - Hook, friendly and conversational. (2) '在地人都愛吃 台南私藏No1 無名鹹粥' (Locals love to eat, Tainan's hidden No.1, nameless savory porridge) - Title/Hook, energetic and enticing. (3) '綜合鹹粥 75塊', '110元的魚肚粥', '鹹鴨蛋一顆15塊', '滷到超入味的嫩豆腐' (Mixed savory porridge 75 NTD, 110 NTD Fish belly porridge, Salted duck egg 15 NTD each, Tender braised tofu) - Functional, informative and descriptive. (4) '開動', '傳統美好 純真', '蚵仔 超新鮮', '我的愛店' (Let's eat, Traditional beauty, Pure, Oysters super fresh, My favorite shop) - Decorative/Effect text, emotional and appreciative.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Food Preparation/Presentation -> Tasting and Reaction

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a leopard-print bucket hat and a white lace top standing in a Costco warehouse, holding two packs of embroidered dish towels. A large Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) She alternates between showing different packs of towels, featuring various embroidered designs: blue birds with flowers, green lavender/flowers, yellow citrus fruits, and brown mushrooms. She points specifically at the embroidery details on the front of the packaging. (3) The camera remains mostly at a medium shot, with occasional slight zooms on the product. The woman maintains a happy, expressive face with wide eyes and frequent smiles while presenting the items against the backdrop of store shelves and other customers in the distance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music with a strong rhythm begins immediately. A woman's high-pitched, energetic voice starts speaking in Mandarin, expressing excitement about the products. (2) The vocal track remains continuous and enthusiastic throughout, describing the price, the number of towels in a pack, and the specific designs being shown. (3) There are no significant ambient noises from the store, suggesting the audio was recorded with a close-mic or potentially dubbed over, as the focus is entirely on the speech and the BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '好事多新出的' (New from Costco), '355元有4條' (355 yuan for 4 pieces), '88塊' (88 bucks). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '這是我看過最漂亮的抹布' (The most beautiful dishcloth I've seen), '細緻刺繡多用布' (Detailed embroidery multi-purpose cloth). (3) Content labels: '藍色的小鳥' (Blue birds), '綠色的花朵' (Green flowers), '黃色的水果' (Yellow fruits), '褐色的香菇' (Brown mushrooms). All text is presented in a colorful, variety-show style with emotional emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Individual Product Showcase -> Detailed Embroidery Close-up -> Price Summary

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a warehouse-style retail environment with high ceilings and industrial shelving. A woman wearing a black beret and a purple off-the-shoulder top is holding a large, plush Judy Hopps head cushion. A second woman stands slightly behind her holding a Nick Wilde cushion. They are smiling and gesturing towards the items. (2) The camera moves closer to the plushies as the main character points to the facial features, including the large purple eyes and pink nose, demonstrating the texture and 3D construction. Price tags are visible on the shelves in the background. (3) The women demonstrate a functional feature where they can slide their hands into the back or ears of the cushions. Finally, the main woman stacks both cushions and then holds the Judy Hopps cushion over her head, obscuring her face momentarily before the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat pop-style background music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin, sounding very excited and enthusiastic. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the primary speaker describes the product details, mentioning prices and comparing them to Disney store prices. A second female voice is heard briefly in the background, sounding supportive and equally excited. (3) The audio remains consistent with the upbeat BGM and the main speaker's rapid, friendly narration until the end, concluding with a lighthearted suggestion for Halloween usage.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top of the screen. Decorative yellow and red text appears: '超巨大' (Super Huge) and a hook '你的行李箱裝得下這麽大的嗎？' (Can your suitcase fit something this big?). (2) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom translating the spoken dialogue into Traditional Chinese. High-contrast hook text says '好市多超便宜' (Costco is super cheap) and '動物方城市抱枕' (Zootopia pillows). (3) A decorative text box with a star icon appears saying '我可以幫它掏耳朵' (I can clean its ears) to highlight a specific feature. The overall tone is energetic and promotional.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Detail Showcase -> Feature Demonstration -> Outro/Usage Suggestion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman wearing a dark purple off-shoulder top and a beret standing in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding a long Harry Potter-themed box. (2) Another woman in a light pink dress joins her, and they both hold the product while posing and pointing at it with excited expressions. (3) The scene cuts to close-up shots of the product on the shelves, showing the 'Harry Potter Hogwarts Express' branding and the chocolate biscuits inside. (4) The two women return to the frame, standing side-by-side to demonstrate the height of the product box relative to their bodies. (5) They continue talking and gesturing toward the product, ending with a call to action while pointing at the bottom of the screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, high-tempo pop music featuring synthesized melodies and a strong beat. (2) Two female voices speak in Mandarin with high-pitched, enthusiastic tones, discussing the product's features and price. (3) Occasional bright, cartoonish sound effects (swooshes and dings) are used to emphasize transitions and text overlays. (4) The background music remains constant and energetic throughout the video, ending with a final enthusiastic verbal sign-off from the speakers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear throughout the video, translating the spoken dialogue about the Harry Potter snacks at Costco. (2) Decorative Text: Large, colorful captions such as 'Harry Potter', '哈利波特車票' (Harry Potter Ticket), '超巨大巧克力餅乾' (Super Giant Chocolate Biscuit), and '649元' (the price) appear with various animations. (3) Call-to-Action: A text prompt at the end asks viewers to '留言' (comment) if they want to see an unboxing video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Price/Value Discussion -> Call to Action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a bright title screen featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and large text "Haoshihui" overlaid on a busy warehouse store background. perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: "COSTCO WHOLESALE 連假完超殺特價 好市多 每週特價速報 10/13-10/19 記得追蹤我們" (Hook: Weekly special report). perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a crowded Costco warehouse where two women in stylish off-shoulder tops are excitedly holding large, long yellow boxes designed like Harry Potter train tickets. One woman wears a bucket hat. They gesture towards the product and the surroundings. (2) The scene cuts to close-ups of the product display on the warehouse floor, showing the price tags and rows of the 'London to Hogwarts' ticket boxes. (3) The setting shifts to an indoor room where the two women sit at a table. They unbox the large ticket to reveal dozens of smaller, individually wrapped chocolates styled as mini-tickets. (4) They proceed to unwrap and taste two different types: a white chocolate biscuit and a dark chocolate biscuit. They show the details of the '9 3/4' platform logo embossed on the chocolate and give enthusiastic reactions with thumbs-up gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop track serves as the background music. A male narrator's voice, energetic and high-pitched, introduces the product in Mandarin. Ambient warehouse chatter and the distant hum of a crowd are audible. (2) As the scene transitions home, the narration becomes more focused on descriptive details of the taste. Sound effects (SFX) like a 'ding' for emphasis and a crisp 'crunch' sound when the chocolate is bitten are added. (3) The music maintains its high tempo through the tasting and review phase, concluding with a final upbeat flourish as they recommend the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. Subtitles throughout the video translate the spoken Mandarin review. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Discussion is exploding', 'Harry Potter Giant Train Ticket Chocolate', 'Price: 649 Yuan/bag', '27 Yuan each', 'Delicious!', 'Higher than expected', 'Worth buying!' (3) Content & Tone: The text uses bright, colorful variety-show style fonts with emojis to create a sense of excitement and urgency.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in warehouse -> Detailed product display -> Unboxing at home -> Tasting and final verdict.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women, one in a brown top and the other in a purple ruffled top and grey hat, stand in front of a heated display case filled with rotisserie chicken at a Costco. They look directly at the camera with wide eyes and open mouths, gesturing excitedly. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of plastic-wrapped chicken legs on the shelf, with price tags showing $198 for 4 pieces. (3) The scene returns to the two women who continue talking enthusiastically, using hand gestures to count and give thumbs-up signs while pointing towards the chicken display behind them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately. Two female voices speak in high-pitched, excited Mandarin tones. (2) One woman's voice becomes more prominent as she explains price points, while the background music maintains a consistent, energetic beat. (3) The voices overlap slightly with expressions of excitement and agreement, ending with an enthusiastic call to action as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "你知道嗎？好市多" - Hook text in white with a yellow border, curious tone. (2) "有小家庭份量了" - Functional text in white on a purple background, informative tone. (3) "烤雞腿終於砍半賣" - Informative text highlighting the core news, urgent tone. (4) "一大福音啊！" - Decorative emotional text with stars, celebratory tone. (5) Price breakdowns like "4入一隻只要49.5元" appear as floating captions to support the narration.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Product Close-up/Price Proof -> Benefit Analysis/CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing in a warehouse store aisle, each holding a rolled-up Snoopy-themed double blanket—one white and one yellow. (2) The woman on the right, wearing a beret, gestures towards the Snoopy illustrations on the white blanket while the woman on the left holds the yellow version. (3) They continue to present the product's features, pointing at the dimensions and labels on the packaging. (4) The camera pans to show a large cardboard display box on the floor, overflowing with stacks of these blankets in both colors. (5) The shot returns to the two women holding the blankets together in a friendly, enthusiastic pose.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An enthusiastic female voice speaking Mandarin begins immediately, accompanied by upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music. (2) The narration remains fast-paced and high-energy as it describes the product's price, size, and washability. (3) Subtle ambient noise typical of a large warehouse retail space can be heard under the music and vocals. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic call to action as the music continues until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "努比努比" (Nubi Nubi) in large colorful font. (2) Title text: "史努比雙人毯" (Snoopy Double Blanket). (3) Functional text: "359元 送禮不傷荷包" (359 TWD, a gift that doesn't hurt your wallet) and "152*177CM", "可以機洗" (Machine washable). (4) Descriptive text: "很有質感" (High quality texture) and "難怪" (No wonder). (5) Standard subtitles translating the spoken Mandarin dialogue.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are seen in a Costco warehouse aisle; one wears a brown off-the-shoulder top and a black beret, the other wears a light pink top. They gesture excitedly towards the camera. (2) They move to a ZWILLING product display stand, picking up and showcasing a 4-piece manicure/pedicure set box. (3) The scene shifts to a home interior where the women demonstrate the individual tools: a foot rasp, a nail file, a 360-degree rotating nail clipper, and a magnetic magnifying glass. Close-ups focus on the stainless steel texture and the functional use on feet and fingernails. (4) The video concludes back in the Costco aisle, showing a shopping cart filled with several units of the product as the women give a thumbs-up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays continuously. A male voiceover in Mandarin begins with an energetic and fast-paced delivery, posing a question about choosing a lifelong nail clipper. (2) The narration shifts to describing the product's features (durability, precision) and the Costco price (699 TWD). (3) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'shimmer' are used to highlight key text and product features. The sound of the nail clipper 'clicking' and the rasp 'scraping' are briefly audible during the demo. (4) The male narrator's voice maintains high energy through the end, accompanied by the women's enthusiastic exclamations.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo, '德國雙人 美甲手足護理 4件組' (German Twin Manicure/Pedicure 4-piece set). (2) Hook Text: '一刀傳三代' (One tool lasts three generations), '一輩子只買一個指甲剪 你會選甚麼?' (If you only buy one nail clipper in your life, what would you choose?). (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '超級划算!' (Super deal!), '精密工藝' (Precision craftsmanship), '送禮自用兩相宜' (Good for gifts or personal use). (4) Tool Names: '足部銼刀', '指甲銼刀', '指甲剪', '磁吸放大鏡'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Introduction at Store -> Detailed Feature Demonstration at Home -> Purchase Incentive and CTA

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcase, pricing information, specific retailer mention (Costco), and heavy emphasis on purchase benefits.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a graphic-heavy intro showing the Costco logo, a cartoon character, and text indicating a weekly special report for 10/20-10/26. (2) It then transitions into a rapid-fire sequence of shots featuring various household products, snacks, and food items inside a warehouse store. (3) Each shot highlights a specific product on a shelf or in a refrigerator, with large text bubbles appearing to show the original price, the discount, and the final promotional price. (4) Products include tissues, laundry detergent, candy, biscuits, frozen meats, and seafood. (5) The camera moves quickly between aisles, sometimes showing hands reaching for products or other shoppers in the background. (6) The video ends after showcasing dozens of items in a consistent format.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout the entire video. (2) A male voiceover speaks very rapidly in Mandarin Chinese, announcing the name of each product as it appears on screen, along with its discounted price. (3) The tone of the voiceover is high-pitched, excited, and rhythmic, matching the fast cuts of the visual. (4) Subtle ambient noise from the warehouse environment, such as the low hum of refrigeration units, can be heard in the background behind the music and vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Intro text: "COSTCO 好市多 每週特價速報 10/20-10/26 記得追蹤我們" (Costco Weekly Special Report 10/20-10/26, Remember to follow us). (2) Functional text appears for every item, for example: "舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙" (Kleenex 3-ply facial tissue), "原價419 -84 特價335" (Original price 419, minus 84, special price 335). (3) This pattern repeats for all products shown, providing clear, factual price information in a variety-show style bubble.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Rapid List of Discounted Products -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a bright Costco warehouse. A female presenter holds a large purple and white bag of Sanritsu Heike-Pie snacks, gesturing toward stacks of the product on warehouse shelves. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor living room. The presenter, now wearing a gray bucket hat, carefully opens the individual packaging of a pie, showing its layers and the dark raisins on top to the camera. (3) She takes a bite of the snack, smiles, and holds half of the pie up for a macro close-up, demonstrating its flaky texture. (4) The video concludes with her continuing to eat and display the snack's details.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music begins. A female voice excitedly introduces the snack and mentions its availability at Costco. (2) A male voice-over joins, providing a detailed description of the product's ingredients, such as raisins marinated in liquor, and the quality of the pastry. (3) Occasional 'crunching' sound effects are synced with the presenter's eating actions, and 'chime' SFX accompany the appearance of highlight text. (4) The music remains consistent in tempo as the female voice summarizes her positive experience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '不用去日本 在好市多也可以買到的' (Don't need to go to Japan, you can get it at Costco too) - Informative and inviting. (2) Decorative Text: '三立葡萄派家庭包' (Sanritsu Raisin Pie Family Pack) and '殿堂級的點心' (Palace-level snack) - Enthusiastic and promotional. (3) Functional Text: '一大包不用300元呢' (A large pack is less than 300 TWD) - Value-oriented. (4) Hook Text: '一口接一口' (One bite after another) - Persuasive and appetizing tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Location intro at warehouse -> Product unboxing at home -> Close-up tasting and sensory review

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a warehouse-style retail environment (Costco), holding large, plush pillows shaped like watermelon, strawberry, lemon, and avocado. They are smiling and gesturing towards the items. (2) Each pillow is featured in a close-up: first the watermelon, followed by the avocado, then the strawberry, and finally the lemon slice. The women rotate and squeeze the pillows to show their volume. (3) One woman points to and opens a hidden zipper on the back of the avocado pillow, revealing a small pocket. They continue to pose with the various pillows until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts. A high-pitched female voice speaks enthusiastically, followed by a deeper male voice providing narration. (2) The male narrator describes each fruit pillow as they are shown, maintaining a cheerful and informative tone. Some sound effects (dings/chimes) punctuate the mention of prices or features. (3) The dialogue continues with the female speakers expressing excitement about the '3D' nature and the hidden zipper feature of the pillows. The music remains consistent throughout until a final closing remark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '水果和你說再見' (Fruits say goodbye to you) - Decorative hook. (2) '459元 超划算' (459 yuan, super value) - Functional price information. (3) '超萌四季水果抱枕' (Super cute four-season fruit pillows) - Decorative title. (4) '西瓜' (Watermelon), '酪梨' (Avocado), '草莓' (Strawberry), '檸檬' (Lemon) - Functional labels for the products. (5) '拉鍊' (Zipper) - Functional highlight of a feature. (6) '非常有立體' (Very three-dimensional) - Decorative emphasis on quality.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Individual Product Showcase -> Feature Highlight (Zipper) -> Summary Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a brown off-the-shoulder top standing in a Costco freezer aisle, holding a box of 'Thai Volcano Ribs' and speaking to the camera with an expressive face. (2) The scene transitions to a kitchen setting where the woman holds a large bowl filled with cooked pork ribs, showing the size and texture to the camera. (3) The scene shifts to the woman and another female friend sitting at a table; they pour a green chili-based sauce from a blue bowl over the ribs and begin eating them using their hands.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing the product. (2) A male voice (off-screen) joins the conversation, providing details about the price and quantity of the ribs. (3) Sound effects like 'dings' and 'pops' punctuate the video during text overlays. The soundscape remains a mix of the two onscreen female voices, the off-screen male voice, and the continuous upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; '十月推薦 泰式火山排骨' (October Recommendation: Thai Volcano Ribs). (2) Hook Text: '超便宜好吃嗎?' (Is it super cheap and delicious?). (3) Functional Text: '469元 1700公克' (469 TWD 1700g). (4) Decorative/Effect Text: '美味至極' (Extremely delicious) with fire and thumb-up emojis.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco warehouse with two women standing in front of high shelves. One woman on the right wears a patterned bucket hat and a blue top, while the woman on the left has long black hair and a pink top. (2) They hold up a box of Lenor Aroma Jewel scent beads and point towards the product displayed on the warehouse shelves. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where they unbox the product, showing the bottle and refill pack. (4) They move to a laundry room where one of them pours the pink scent beads into the cap and then into a front-loading washing machine. (5) They are seen smelling a freshly laundered scarf and standing in front of a closet filled with clothes. (6) A transition shows the two women running and posing in a colorful outdoor flower field under a cloudy sky. (7) The final shot returns to the Costco warehouse with the women gesturing towards the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A female narrator speaks in an enthusiastic, high-pitched, and fast-paced Mandarin voice, introducing the product and its benefits. (3) Sound effects including a 'chinking' sound of beads being poured and a cartoonish 'bling' sound are heard during product demonstration. (4) The background music remains consistent in volume, while the narration becomes more persuasive toward the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: "就是這個！就是這個！" (It's this! It's this!) - Excited and urgent tone. (2) Hook: "日本女生身上淡香的秘密就是靠它！" (The secret to Japanese girls' light fragrance depends on it!) - Intriguing tone. (3) Functional: "不用再去日本扛！好事多就有賣！" (No need to haul it back from Japan! Costco has it!) - Informative. (4) Decorative: "10/27-11/9 限時折扣160元" (10/27-11/9 Limited time discount 160 yuan) - Promotional tone. (5) Functional: "蘭諾衣物芳香豆 晨曦玫瑰香" (Lenor Scent Beads Morning Rose Scent) - Descriptive. (6) Hook: "還不快去好事多買起來！" (Hurry to Costco and buy it!) - Persuasive tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white top and beige cardigan, stands in a warehouse retail store holding two National Geographic waterproof phone bag sets. She smiles and looks directly at the camera. (2) Another woman with a navy beret and brown off-the-shoulder top joins her; they both hold the product packages and point at the features. (3) The camera focuses on the product packaging, specifically the 'IPX8' rating and the back of the package showing wearing methods like an armband and neck strap. (4) Both women stand together in front of a shopping cart, gesturing enthusiastically towards the product and the store shelves. (5) They end the video laughing together, with the woman on the left giving a thumbs-up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins speaking excitedly in Mandarin. (2) A second female voice enters, and they engage in a rapid-fire dialogue about the product's price and value. (3) An off-screen male voice is heard making occasional humorous comments and reacting to the women's conversation. (4) Several cartoon-style 'ping' and 'wow' sound effects play when text overlays appear. The ambient sound of a busy retail warehouse is audible in the background throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top (Functional). (2) '國家地理 三用手機防水袋' (National Geographic 3-way mobile phone waterproof bag) - Functional text identifying the product. (3) '兩百多就有' (Available for just 200+) - Hook text emphasizing price. (4) '完全防水' (Completely waterproof) - Functional text highlighting feature. (5) '超級划算 太便宜了吧' (Super worth it, way too cheap) - Decorative text expressing excitement. (6) White subtitles with yellow outlines provide a verbatim transcription of the spoken Mandarin dialogue.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional recommendation for a National Geographic waterproof phone bag available at Costco. It uses energetic presenters and fast-paced editing to highlight the product's affordability (specifically mentioning it costs around 200 NTD per bag in a set) and its utility for outdoor activities like swimming or walking the dog. The content aims to trigger impulse purchases by emphasizing 'value for money'.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Directly showcasing the product packaging, stating the price, and location where it can be purchased.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast jump-cuts, high-density Traditional Chinese variety-show text overlays, and 'bargain hunting' shopping vlog format.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media short-video marketing template designed for high engagement through rapid information delivery and enthusiastic host personalities.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long black hair wearing a brown off-the-shoulder top stands in a Costco store, holding a large box of Ginseng Chicken Soup. She gestures enthusiastically and points to the price tag. (2) The scene transitions to a brightly lit home interior where the same woman and another woman in a purple top and grey hat sit at a table. They hold up a transparent plastic pouch filled with soup and chicken. (3) A close-up shows a hand lifting the lid of a yellow Staub-style ceramic pot, revealing a rich soup with chicken pieces, red dates, and herbs boiling inside. (4) The two women are shown tasting the soup from small bowls, using spoons to lift pieces of chicken, giving thumbs up and smiling to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music begins. A high-pitched, energetic female voice provides narration, speaking rapidly about a find at Costco. (2) The music continues as the narration explains the price breakdown and the weight of the product (1200g). (3) The sound of a heavy ceramic lid being lifted creates a distinct 'clink' and 'thud', followed by the sound of liquid simmering. (4) The narrator describes the flavor profile, mentioning it is savory and warm, while the background music maintains a constant high-energy tempo until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top of the frame. (2) Decorative Text: '一大鍋240元' (A big pot for 240 yuan) in red and yellow bubbles, conveying high value. (3) Content Text: '人蔘雞湯' (Ginseng Chicken Soup) in large, bold font to identify the product. (4) Hook Text: '便' (Cheap) appearing in a large pink bubble for emphasis. (5) Decorative Text: '料多又實在' (Lots of ingredients and solid quality) appearing as a caption. (6) Hook Text: '買爆' (Buy it all!) in vibrant colors to encourage purchase.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Home unboxing and preparation -> Close-up of cooking -> Tasting and final recommendation

She smiles and speaks directly to the camera. (2) She moves the heavy product pack around to show different sides, occasionally looking down at it while continuing her enthusiastic explanation. (3) She maintains her position in the aisle, surrounded by stacks of boxed goods, and continues the conversation with an off-camera person, gesturing towards the soup pack.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, light background music starts. An energetic female voice begins speaking with a friendly, excited tone about finding a product. (2) A male voice off-screen engages in a dialogue with the female, asking questions about the price and how the soup is eaten in Japan. (3) The conversation continues with the female providing specific pricing details and the male reacting, all over the constant, cheerful background music and minimal warehouse ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '不用去日本扛貨回來了' (No need to lug goods back from Japan) appears in red and white with a yellow star background. (2) Decorative text: '極品脆粒玉米濃湯' (Premium Crispy Corn Soup) appears. (3) Functional text: Subtitles appear at the bottom tracking the conversation, such as '一罐 26.6 元' (26.6 yuan per can) and '399 元' (399 yuan) representing the price and quantity information.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a brown off-shoulder top stands in front of a freezer at a Costco store, holding a large bag of Supreme Salmon Cauliflower Rice. She gestures toward the product and the price tag on the freezer door. (2) The scene transitions to a home kitchen setting where the woman and a friend are seated at a table. Close-up shots show the cauliflower rice being scooped from a Mickey Mouse-shaped glass bowl. (3) The two women taste the food, showing expressions of delight and satisfaction. Close-ups of the bowl reveal colorful ingredients like edamame, carrots, and bits of salmon. (4) The video concludes with the women continuing to eat and talk directly to the camera, emphasizing their recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music starts. A female voice enthusiastically introduces the salmon cauliflower rice at Costco, mentioning its price of 429 TWD. (2) A male narrator's voice joins the conversation, discussing how this product is popular among people trying to lose weight due to its healthy ingredients. (3) The female voices continue, describing the portion size (four bags per pack) and price per bag. The sound of utensils clinking against the glass bowl is audible. (4) The music remains consistent as the speakers explain the cooking methods (microwave or pan-fry) and describe the taste as being similar to moist salmon fried rice, but healthier. The audio ends with a cheerful recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. '減肥必吃！' (Must eat for weight loss!) in a yellow speech bubble. (2) '香蒜鮭魚花椰米' (Garlic Salmon Cauliflower Rice) and '美威 Supreme Salmon' in large, colorful banners. (3) '增加飽足感' (Increase satiety) and '太像炒飯了' (Looks so much like fried rice) appear as emotional captions. (4) Functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese consistently appear at the bottom, translating the dialogue.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store introduction -> Product details -> Home tasting -> Final verdict and recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown off-the-shoulder top, stands in the refrigerated aisle of a Costco warehouse. She holds a large, transparent plastic container of 'Northeast Sauerkraut White Meat Pot'. (2) The camera switches to close-ups of the ingredients: Iberico pork slices, clams, white meatballs, mushrooms, tofu, and a large bag of sauerkraut broth. (3) The setting shifts to a home dining area. A blue Staub pot is opened to reveal the steaming hot pot. The woman and another female friend wearing a hat sit at the table, using chopsticks to eat. They show expressions of delight, give thumbs up, and clap their hands.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice (onscreen) introduces the product with an excited, high-pitched tone. (2) An off-screen male voice provides additional commentary, discussing the value and the change in pork quality compared to previous years. (3) A sound effect of a pot lid opening followed by a subtle steam-hissing sound is heard as the food is revealed. (4) The audio concludes with both women exclaiming 'delicious' in Mandarin and making rhythmic clapping sounds to emphasize their satisfaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White and yellow subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, colorful captions appear, such as '員工必買商品之一' (One of the items employees must buy) in yellow/red, '真的好好吃' (Really delicious) with a comic-style border, and '彈到不行' (Extremely bouncy) pointing to the meatballs. (3) Price and quantity indicators like '1公斤只要255元' (1kg only 255 dollars) appear to highlight value.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in store -> Ingredient close-ups -> Cooking/Eating demonstration and review

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a Costco warehouse aisle; a woman in a brown off-the-shoulder top is bent over, repeatedly hitting her head against a metal shelf stocked with boxes, suggesting comedic exaggeration. (2) She stands up, smiles at the camera, and holds a box of 'Beef Potato Curry', pointing to the shelves and gesturing towards the product's price tag. (3) The scene transitions to a home dining setting where two women are seated at a table. One holds the product box and a silver retort pouch while the other eats the curry from a plate. (4) Close-up shots show the curry being scooped with a spoon, revealing large chunks of potato and beef mixed with thick brown sauce over white rice. (5) The two women continue to interact with the camera, displaying the pouches and reacting to the taste with various facial expressions and hand gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice shouts excitedly in Mandarin, synchronized with a 'thud' sound effect as she hits her head on the shelf. (2) The primary female speaker narrates in a fast-paced, high-pitched, and enthusiastic tone, providing price and quantity details. (3) A second female voice enters during the indoor scene; the two engage in a lively dialogue about the taste, texture, and spiciness of the curry. (4) The soundscape is dominated by these vocals and the consistent BGM, with occasional clinking sounds from the spoon against the plate.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative Hook: '好吃到頭撞到' (So good my head hit) in bright yellow bubble letters. (3) Product Highlights: '牛肉超大塊 料多又實在' (Huge beef chunks, solid ingredients) and '最好吃咖哩' (Best curry). (4) Information Text: Prices like '$339' and '$56' appear as they are mentioned. (5) Social Proof: '社團推薦最好吃的' (Community recommended best) and '真的是遍地都贏它' (Actually others beat it everywhere) appear during the final verdict.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Humorous Hook at Store) -> Product Presentation -> Detailed Review and Tasting (Home) -> Verdict

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a title card featuring the Costco logo and colorful text announcing weekly specials for 10/27-11/02. (2) The scene shifts to a rapid-fire sequence of shots within a Costco warehouse, each showing a different product on its shelf or in a refrigerated unit. (3) As each product is shown, large text overlays appear detailing the discount and final price. (4) The camera pans and zooms slightly across various aisles, capturing stacks of snacks, boxes of drinks, and packages of meat. (5) In the background, other shoppers can occasionally be seen moving through the aisles in a blurred or distant manner.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately and continues throughout the entire video. (2) A male narrator with a fast-paced, enthusiastic tone speaks throughout, reading the name of each product and its discounted price in synchronization with the visual cuts. (3) The recording is clean, with the voiceover being much louder than any possible ambient noise, suggesting a studio-recorded narration over field footage. (4) Subtle sound effects like 'pings' or 'whooshes' might accompany the text transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '好市多每週特價速報 10/27~11/02' (Costco Weekly Special Report 10/27-11/02). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us!) with a cartoon character graphic. (3) Content & Tone: Each product has a title like '台灣冷凍豬五花厚切燒烤' (Taiwan Frozen Pork Belly Thick Cut Yakiniku) followed by price math: '原價395 - 80 = 特價315' (Original 395 - 80 = Special 315). The tone is informative and promotional.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a dark blue off-shoulder top and a black Kangol beret speaking directly to the camera in what appears to be a bedroom or dressing area. (2) A second woman in a pink cardigan and ripped jeans joins her; the scene cuts to various shots of them eating large meals, including hotpot and Japanese cuisine. (3) A split-screen comparison shows 'before' and 'after' photos of both women, suggesting a physical transformation. (4) They demonstrate a specific eating order using graphics and real food: protein, then vegetables, then carbohydrates. (5) The focus shifts to various colored supplement packets labeled 'Cofit', showing the women carrying and consuming them in different settings like restaurants and outdoors while drinking bubble tea. (6) The video concludes with the two women standing together, presenting the full range of Cofit products and promotional materials.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched and energetic female vocals start immediately, discussing common questions from followers about their appearance. (2) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM enters and remains consistent throughout the video. (3) The speakers' voices are clear and enthusiastic as they explain their eating habits and the role of supplements. (4) Distinct sound effects (SFX) like 'bling' sounds and 'pops' are heard when text overlays or product highlights appear. (5) Ambient restaurant noise is briefly audible during eating segments but is heavily suppressed by the BGM and narration. (6) The video ends with a rapid-fire delivery of promotional offers and a call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我們最常收到的私訊跟留言就是' - Functional/Hook text. (2) '你們怎麼越來越漂亮!!' - Decorative text with an excited tone. (3) '學會正確的飲食順序' - Functional text explaining health tips. (4) 'Cofit 大餐包' - Product name hook. (5) '小祕訣' - 'Small secret' variety-show style caption. (6) '首次開團' - 'First time group buy' promotional hook. (7) '最低58折' - Functional text indicating discount level.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Personal Story/Secret -> Health Tip Demo -> Product Introduction -> Real-life Usage -> Promotional CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a woman in a grey hat and brown top eating spicy tteokbokki from a pink plate, expressing strong flavor through facial expressions. (2) A male narrator begins speaking in Mandarin with a clear, professional tone, describing the shopping experience. (3) Ambient sounds of a warehouse (clinking, movement) are audible behind the narration. (4) Sound effects such as beeps and pops are used to highlight text transitions. (5) Sizzling sounds are briefly heard during the cooking shot. (6) The audio ends with a lively dialogue between two women discussing the sweet and spicy taste profile and recommending the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE logo appears at the top. (2) Functional text: '好辣' (So spicy) variety-show stickers appear repeatedly. narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a consumer 'anti-recommendation' or 'landmine warning' review. It starts with the hook of discovering a new, visually appealing bakery item at Costco, but the core objective is to inform viewers that the product's taste and quality do not match its appearance or price, ultimately advising them not to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The reviewers explicitly state the product is 'super not delicious' and use negative body language to discourage purchase.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a purple ruffled top and a grey bucket hat is standing in a Costco warehouse, holding two plastic bags filled with small taro roots. She smiles broadly and points at the bags while looking at the camera. (2) The scene shifts between her holding the bags and close-ups of the 'Yaro Root' packaging. She gesticulates with her hands to emphasize the price and size. (3) The scene transitions to a home dining setting where she is seated at a table. Cooked taro roots are displayed on a red Le Creuset plate. (4) She peels a taro root with her fingers, showing the soft interior, and dips it into small dishes containing sugar and pepper. She eats a piece and reacts with an exaggerated 'delicious' expression, nodding and gesturing to her face.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks rapidly, introducing the new taro product at Costco. Ambient warehouse chatter and distant cart noises are heard faintly. (2) A deeper male voice enters the conversation off-camera, interacting with the woman and suggesting cooking methods like steaming. (3) The audio quality transitions to a clearer home recording as the woman describes the fragrance and texture of the cooked taro. Sound effects (SFX) like 'popping' or 'bling' sounds accompany the appearance of text overlays. (4) The woman's voice remains the dominant sound as she describes the 'betel nut taro' flavor and the綿密 (smooth/dense) texture until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE logo at the top. (2) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the spoken dialogue in Traditional Chinese. (3) Hook Text: '小朋友最愛 健康又美味' (Kids' favorite, healthy and delicious) in yellow/white variety-show style font. (4) Hook Text: '好事多 最新出的小香芋' (Costco's latest small fragrant taro). (5) Price info: '一公斤189元' (1kg for 189 NTD). (6) Decorative Text: '芋頭香氣', '味道非常的好', '非常的清香' (Taro aroma, very good taste, very fragrant) with decorative borders and graphics.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at warehouse -> Detailed product display -> Home cooking/tasting session -> Final review

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two women standing in a Costco warehouse, each holding a large, plush animal-themed triangular pillow (a pink rabbit and a grey cat). A large Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) One woman, wearing a navy beret, points to the cat pillow while the other holds the rabbit one, both smiling and speaking enthusiastically. (3) The camera stays static as they demonstrate the size of the pillow by holding it against their bodies and showing its triangular profile. (4) They pivot to show how the pillow can be used behind the back for support, with a playful 'Kao Yao' text appearing. (5) The video ends with a close-up of the cat pillow, highlighting its blue eyes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop-style background music plays throughout. (2) Two female voices are heard speaking in Mandarin with a high-pitched, excited, and promotional tone. They introduce the product and its price. (3) Ambient warehouse noise is minimal, largely masked by the music and clear studio-quality voiceovers. (4) The audio maintains a consistent tempo and volume until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' (Functional, top center). (2) '429元 小巧實用' (Functional, price and utility hook). (3) '最可愛的三角靠墊' (Decorative, emotional hook meaning 'Cutest triangle cushion'). (4) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom translating the spoken Mandarin. (5) '靠腰' (Decorative/Pun text appearing with a lightning effect for emphasis on back support).

Items include bottled drinks, packaged meats, seafood, snacks, clothing, and home appliances. (3) Hands are seen intermittently reaching for or pointing at items. (4) The editing is extremely fast-paced, with transitions occurring every few seconds to a new product display.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music with a fast tempo starts immediately and persists throughout the video. (2) A male narrator provides continuous, rapid-fire commentary in Mandarin, naming each product and its discounted price. (3) The audio is professionally mixed, with the narration clearly layered over the background track. (4) No significant ambient store noise or sound effects are present, maintaining a studio-like quality.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: "COSTCO WHOLESALE 好市多 每週特價速報 09/29~10/05 記得追蹤我們" (Costco Weekly Special Report, remember to follow us). (2) Functional text appears for every product, listing the item name, original price, discount amount, and final special price, e.g., "可可可樂寶特瓶 920ml*12 原價329 -66 特價263". (3) Emotional tone of the text is urgent and promotional, using bold colors and large fonts to emphasize savings.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a brightly lit supermarket environment. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, holds a plastic bag containing four roasted chicken legs. She points at the product, gestures with her hand to show the size of a single chicken leg compared to her palm, and looks directly at the camera with an excited expression. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor setting with a table. Two women are present; the main character from the first part and another woman wearing a blue hat. They are both wearing disposable plastic gloves and are eating the chicken legs. The main character takes a large bite out of a chicken leg while the other woman gestures and speaks. They hold up the chicken to the camera to show the texture and the juices.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop background music begins immediately. A young woman's voice speaks in an energetic and high-pitched tone, introducing a new 4-pack roasted chicken leg product at a store. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the dialogue shifts to a detailed review of the product's price, quantity, and taste. Occasional cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) like bells and sparkle sounds are heard coinciding with on-screen text highlights. (3) The audio remains consistent as the two women discuss the food while eating, with the music fading slightly under their dialogue.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "小家庭必買 4入新" (Hook: Recommendation for small families, indicating a new 4-pack product). (2) "4入正式來了" (Functional: Stating the product is officially available). (3) "不用200元" (Functional: Price highlight). (4) "它好香!" (Decorative: Expressing excitement about the smell). (5) "198元" (Functional: Specifying the price). (6) "兩個人剛剛好!" (Decorative: Suggesting the portion size is perfect for two). (7) "雞油給得滿滿" (Decorative: Describing the juiciness of the meat). (8) "太值得買了" (Hook: Strong purchase recommendation).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a graphic overlay on a POV shot of a shopping cart being pushed through a Costco warehouse parking lot and entrance. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of items, ending with stacks of Jack Daniel's whiskey boxes.

(2) The narrator continuously speaks at a high speed, announcing product names and price reductions in sync with the visual cuts. Occasional 'ding' or 'ping' sound effects emphasize the price drops. (3) The music and narration maintain high energy and volume until the video ends abruptly after the last product description.

(2) Functional text appears for every product: Brand and product name (e.g., '哈根達斯 抹茶莓果雪酥'), '原價' (Original Price), discount amount (e.g., '-200'), and '特價' (Special Price). (3) Decorative text includes variety-style fonts and colors to highlight the deals.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a vibrant graphic overlay featuring the Costco logo, a cartoon character, and text indicating a weekly special report. (2) It then transitions into a rapid sequence of shots within a Costco warehouse, showing products such as frozen meat, milk powder, strawberry cakes, rice potato crisps, egg rolls, snack packs, chocolates, and chewing gum. (3) The sequence continues with various other items including biscuits, crackers, granola bars, jelly, spicy snacks, chocolate balls, bottled tea, rice crackers, soda crackers, Milo drinks, yogurt, and household items like sponges, detergent, and shampoo. (4) Each shot focuses on the product packaging and its placement on the shelves or in refrigerators.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic and fast-paced background music begins immediately and maintains a consistent tempo throughout the video. (2) A male voice speaks rapidly and enthusiastically, announcing the names of the products and their discounted prices in Mandarin. (3) Subtle ambient noise from the warehouse environment, such as the hum of refrigerators or distant store sounds, is occasionally audible beneath the music and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional and Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 好市多 每週特價速報 11/10-11/16' appears as a hook to announce the weekly specials. (2) Functional Text: Each product showcased has specific text overlays including the product name (e.g., '台灣冷凍豬梅花火鍋片'), original price ('原價415/KG'), discount amount ('-86'), and special price ('特價329/KG'). (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us) appears at the bottom as a call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a rapid-fire product list format, showcasing a wide variety of discounted items one after another.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator whose hands are occasionally visible while filming
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An off-screen male narrator/shopper whose hands are seen interacting with or pointing towards products.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Systematic Product Display -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional shopping guide, aiming to inform Costco members in Taiwan about specific weekly discounts across a wide range of food, beverage, and household products to encourage store visits during the promotional period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing Costco products with their current promotional prices.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced narration style with consistent price tag graphic overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-intensity editing style common in 'deal-hunting' social media content, focusing on value and urgency.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white top and a silver handbag, stands in a crowded Costco warehouse holding a large plastic container of blueberries. (2) The camera cuts between the woman talking and close-up shots of the price labels and the blueberries, showing the brand 'Fruitist'. (3) The woman points at the fruit through the plastic packaging, showing their size and freshness. (4) The setting changes to an indoor domestic space where the first woman and another woman wearing a red Kangol hat sit at a table with a small plate of blueberries. (5) Both women pick up the fruit, show them to the camera for size comparison, eat them, and react with excited facial expressions and hand gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately and continues throughout. (2) A female voice speaks in an enthusiastic, high-pitched tone, introducing the product and comparing prices. (3) Short sound effects (pop/chime) occur when text overlays or price tags appear. (4) The audio transitions to two female voices during the taste test, expressing delight with 'Mmm' sounds and verbal praise. (5) Background ambient noise of a busy store is faintly heard in the first half.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and 'Super Cheap' in large, stylized Traditional Chinese characters. (2) Hook Text: 'Huge Blueberries' in purple text. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout translating the speech, including price details like '510g only 269 yuan'. (4) Decorative Text: 'Super Value' with a watermelon emoji and 'Even Sweeter!' inside a yellow explosion graphic bubble.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store discovery -> Price/Product comparison -> Home taste test -> Recommendation

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration, frequent use of variety-show style colorful text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popular 'Costco find' trend, using side-by-side price comparisons to establish a logical value proposition before moving to emotional/sensory satisfaction in the second half.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a shot of two women sitting behind a table filled with Care Bears and CASETiFY merchandise, they look excited and point at the items. (2) The woman on the right, wearing a white bucket hat, opens a large purple Care Bears box and takes out a plush bear, a smaller plush earphone case, a blind box, and stickers. (3) The woman on the left, with long dark hair, opens a blue Care Bears box and examines a phone strap with star and bear charms. (4) Both women show off their clear CASETiFY phone cases which contain photos of dogs. (5) They both open small blind box figures; the woman on the left is extremely surprised and happy when she reveals a rare pink glittery bear figure. (6) The video ends with them holding their phones close to the camera, showcasing small bear figures attached to the top corners of the phone cases.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic background music starts immediately with a fast tempo. Two female voices are heard speaking excitedly in Mandarin, with a third male voice providing a steady narrative overview. (2) Sound effects such as 'pops', 'dings', and 'sparkle' noises are layered over the voices during product reveals. (3) The sound of rustling paper and plastic as boxes are opened is audible. (4) The women's voices reach a peak of excitement and high pitch when the rare item is discovered. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume and pace until the video cuts off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '竟然抽到隱藏' (Actually drew a hidden one) in purple and yellow bubble font with a surprised tone. (2) Decorative: 'Care Bears 彩虹熊聯名 CASETiFY' (Care Bears collaboration CASETiFY) across the middle. (3) Functional: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese reflecting the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (4) Decorative: '貼爆妹妹的額頭' (Stick all over sister's forehead) during the sticker reveal section.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro hook -> Systematic unboxing of two sets -> Product demonstration -> Blind box surprise -> Final product showcase

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a pan-fried bun being cut by metal scissors, with a significant amount of juice squirting out. (2) A woman in a blue bucket hat and denim overalls is standing in a Costco warehouse in front of a freezer section, gesturing excitedly with her hands while talking. (3) Close-up shots of stacks of red 'Chen Pin' mini pan-fried bun boxes are shown. (4) The woman is seen frying several small buns in a grey non-stick pan, flipping them to reveal a golden-brown crust. (5) The woman, now wearing a red bucket hat and a yellow striped shirt, sits at a table with another woman in a maroon top. They both use chopsticks to hold up buns, bite into them, and react with exaggerated facial expressions of delight as juice squirts out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo pop background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice introduces the product, mentioning Costco and the price of 4 yuan per piece. (2) Sizzling sounds of food frying are heard clearly over the music. (3) The primary female vocal continues with a fast-paced narration, joined by a second female voice during the tasting phase. They discuss the ingredients like pork, onions, and ginger, and emphasize the 'juiciness' with vocal sound effects like 'Ooh' and 'Mmm'.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear throughout the video, translating the spoken dialogue about the product details and taste. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Large, colorful captions appear, including '噴汁' (Squirting juice) with orange motion lines, '一顆4元 還爆汁' (4 yuan each and bursting with juice), '最便宜的生煎包' (The cheapest pan-fried bun), '陳品冷凍迷你生煎包' (Chen Pin Frozen Mini Pan-fried Bun), and '80' to highlight the quantity in the box. '大爆汁' (Super bursting juice) appears in large blue and pink font during the tasting section.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Juice Squirting) -> Product Discovery (Costco Store) -> Preparation (Kitchen Frying) -> Consumption & Review (Dining Table)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit Costco warehouse; a woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, is browsing the bakery section. (2) She picks up a plastic container of large breads; a hand from an off-screen person appears to point at the product and then places a palm next to the bread to demonstrate its large size. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor apartment setting where two women are seated at a table; they hold up pieces of the bread, tearing them open to reveal the meat floss and cheese filling, and proceed to eat and react to the taste.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. An energetic male voice-over begins immediately, commenting on the woman looking at bread. (2) As the scene focuses on the product, the male narrator describes the combination of meat floss and cheese, mentioning the price and the size of the portion. (3) When the scene shifts indoors, the voices of two females are heard talking about the taste and texture (salty, fragrant), while the male narrator continues to provide a summarized commentary on their experience and the product's value.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "又在看麵包" (Looking at bread again) - Humorous observation. (2) Decorative Text: "肉鬆加起司" (Meat floss plus cheese) - Identification of ingredients. (3) Hook Text: "罪惡組合 肉鬆起司麵包 3入299" (Guilty combo, Meat floss cheese bread, 3 for 299) - Promoting the deal. (4) Effect Text: "鹹鹹香香" (Salty and fragrant) - Taste description. (5) Effect Text: "太大份了!" (Too big portion!) - Emphasis on the quantity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in store -> Product close-up and price check -> Indoor tasting and final review.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a blue hat and blue dress stands in a warehouse aisle with stacks of cake boxes. She gestures excitedly toward the camera. (2) She reaches for a box of Kenji brand chocolate Baumkuchen and picks it up. (3) The scene cuts to an indoor dining table where two women are seated. One woman wears a red hat and yellow shirt, the other has long black hair and a purple top. They have opened the box and are handling individual cake portions. (4) Close-up shots show a sliced ring of chocolate cake on a red decorative plate, followed by the women holding up small, individually wrapped rectangular portions of the cake. (5) They continue to show the packaging details and the cake's texture while interacting with each other at the table.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A woman's voice is heard speaking in an energetic and high-pitched tone. (2) Sound effects such as high-pitched pops and dings coincide with visual emphasis points. (3) The main female vocal continues a fast-paced monologue, with a second female voice occasionally providing shorter supportive comments and laughter. (4) The music remains consistent in the background while the dialogue becomes more descriptive and informative in tone, maintaining a friendly and enthusiastic atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Large decorative text: '跑兩趟才買到 巧克力年輪蛋糕' (Bought it after two trips, Chocolate Baumkuchen) appears in yellow and red. (3) Functional subtitles translate the dialogue into Traditional Chinese throughout the video. (4) Decorative text bubble: '最喜歡苦甜的' (Love bitter-sweet the most). (5) Functional text: '32入 329元' (32 pieces for 329 NTD) and '巧克力濃度最高' (Highest chocolate concentration).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, stands in the aisle of a warehouse-style supermarket. She picks up a large red and white snack bag from a display and smiles at the camera. (2) She points to the green 'Green Peppercorn' label on the bag and holds it closer to the lens. (3) She shows the back of the bag and then holds it against her body to demonstrate its large size. (4) Finally, she points to her mouth and cheek with a curious and questioning expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music starts with a high-pitched, energetic female voice singing a jingle 'Beihai, Beihai' repeatedly. (2) A female voice begins speaking clearly and enthusiastically about a new flavor, followed by a male voice providing specific price and weight details. (3) The music maintains a constant tempo with occasional 'ding' sound effects (SFX) as text appears. (4) The female voice asks a concluding question with a friendly tone as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative bubbly text '北海' and '海北' (Beihai/Haibei) appears in yellow and green. (2) Decorative text '新的口味 青花椒' (New flavor Green Peppercorn) emphasizes the product update. (3) Functional text '329元 600公克' (329 NTD, 600g) and '超大包' (Super large bag) provides purchasing information. (4) Hook text '想買嗎? 想吃嗎?' (Want to buy? Want to eat?) encourages audience engagement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a shopping cart at a checkout counter filled with food products, overlaid with large, colorful text titles. (2) It transitions into a rapid montage showing various Costco items: Japanese wagyu beef packs, ready-to-eat bento boxes, Gillette razor sets, an Electrolux dehumidifier, and a Sharp refrigerator. (3) The scene shifts to the warehouse interior featuring 'Black Friday' signage and various price tags marked with the number '5', including those for luxury jewelry, vacuum cleaners, and monitors. (4) Further shots show Puma boxers, mattresses, gaming chairs, Calvin Klein underwear, and large packs of feminine hygiene products. (5) It continues with kitchenware like non-stick pans, LG speakers, and Dyson fans. (6) High-volume household goods like Kleenex toilet paper and Ariel laundry pods are shown stacked in aisles. (7) Towards the end, there is a shot of the Costco store exterior from the road, followed by a fast-paced 'walk-through' POV of the warehouse aisles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy electronic background music begins. A male narrator's voice, energetic and high-pitched, starts speaking in Mandarin, introducing a guide to Costco's Black Friday deals. (2) The music maintains a constant upbeat rhythm. The narrator lists categories of discounted items, such as food and daily necessities, with each category corresponding to visual changes. (3) The narration transitions into 'Strategy' segments (1 through 5), explaining how to identify the best price tags and which limited items to secure. (4) Subtle ambient warehouse sounds and the rattle of a shopping cart are occasionally audible under the music and voiceover. (5) The video concludes with the narrator providing a final summary and a call to action, accompanied by a final musical crescendo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook: 'COSTCO 年度最殺 好市多 黑色星期五攻略' (Costco's best of the year, Costco Black Friday Strategy). (2) Functional: '我幫大家整理了 去年黑色星期五 大概300樣特價商品' (I've organized about 300 sale items from last year's Black Friday). (3) Decorative: '攻略 1: 看到黑標 = 全年最低價' (Strategy 1: Black label equals the lowest price of the year). (4) Functional: Various price tags showing original vs. discounted prices, e.g., '$35,599', '-12,000'. (5) Decorative: '想補貨 想省錢 趕這七天去好市多' (Want to restock, want to save money, hurry to Costco these seven days).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Montage -> Strategic Advice -> Call to Action

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequential Strategies 1-5 -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a strategic shopping guide for the Costco Black Friday event. It aims to inform viewers about specific discount patterns (the 'black label' tip) and high-value items (electronics and luxury goods) while creating a sense of urgency. The intent is to drive store traffic by providing actionable 'insider' advice combined with visual proof of significant price reductions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides a specific roadmap for shopping at a single retailer (Costco) and highlights multiple brand-name products available there to encourage store visits.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density text overlays and rapid-fire Mandarin narration typical of 'Life Hack' or 'Shopping Consultant' social media accounts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'Fear of Missing Out' (FOMO) by emphasizing the once-a-year nature of the sale and the speed at which items sell out.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A girl in a black top enters a room carrying a small white dog, followed by a close-up of several miniature figurines held in a hand. (2) Two girls, one in a black dress and another in a blue ruffled dress with a zebra-print bucket hat, stand outside a shop titled '3D Shots' and gesture toward the camera before entering. (3) Inside the shop, they dance excitedly in front of shelves filled with various 3D figurines. (4) One girl poses in a 3D scanning booth with the dog while the other watches; the dog is then scanned alone on a circular platform surrounded by numerous cameras. (5) The scanned 3D models are shown on a computer screen for review. (6) The girls sit at a table and unbox the final 3D printed figurines, which are miniature versions of themselves and the dog. (7) Close-up shots show the figurines rotating on a display stand, highlighting details like clothing and hair texture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately with sparkly sound effects and a high-pitched ding. (2) A female voice speaks in an enthusiastic and rapid tone, inviting the audience. (3) The background music remains continuous while a male voice enters, sounding like a professional photographer giving instructions. (4) Periodic 'click' sound effects simulate a camera shutter during the scanning phase, accompanied by short 'swish' transitions. (5) The female vocals become more expressive during the unboxing, featuring gasps and high-pitched exclamations of delight. (6) The music maintains a steady, bouncy rhythm until the very end, where it fades out after a final celebratory chime.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '想要客製化自己的專屬盲盒嗎?' (Do you want to customize your own exclusive blind box?) - Hook text, excited tone. (2) '跟我來!' (Follow me!) - Call to action. (3) '3D Shots' - Brand identification. (4) '每個時段都只有一組 所以空間很自在' (Only one group per time slot, so the space is very comfortable) - Functional information. (5) '買那麼多扭蛋公仔 最想要的還是你' (Bought so many capsule toys, the one I want most is still you) - Emotional hook. (6) '我們的專屬盲盒完成了' (Our exclusive blind box is finished) - Informative. (7) '獨一無二 當下寫真公仔喔' (One-of-a-kind portrait figurine) - Decorative/Hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> In-store experience -> Scanning process -> Unboxing/Reveal -> Recommendation.
