perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a blue bucket hat and fuzzy blue dress stands in a Costco refrigerated section. (4) The woman in the hat gives a thumbs up and a wave while holding the packaging.

(2) The soundscape transitions to a multi-voice conversation between two females on screen and an occasional male voice off-screen. The tone is casual and analytical. (3) Sound effects like a 'pop' and 'cartoon chime' accentuate specific movements or text reveals. (4) The upbeat music continues to play as the speakers conclude their discussion and sign off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text includes the Costco Wholesale logo at the top and a price tag of '$ 299'. (2) Decorative hook text in large, colorful fonts reads: 'Open and eat', 'Dachan Sous-vide method', and 'Original Tender Chicken Breast'. (3) Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom to translate all spoken dialogue. (4) A large graphical stamp with '可以路過' (Can pass by) appears near the end to indicate the final verdict.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand inside a Costco warehouse store, holding a large yellow box of UCC Oat Latte coffee. They gesture excitedly towards the product while the Costco logo is prominently displayed above them. (2) The scene cuts to a shopping cart being filled with multiple boxes of the same coffee, followed by a transition to a domestic indoor setting where many individual coffee packets are spread out on a marble-top table. (3) The women demonstrate preparing the coffee; one woman is seen sipping a hot cup while wrapped in a blue blanket on a couch, expressing a cozy feeling. The other woman is seen at a desk with a laptop, drinking an iced version of the coffee through a straw. (4) Close-ups show the powder being poured into a teacup and stirred with a golden spoon. (5) The final sequence returns to the two women holding handfuls of the coffee packets, smiling and recommending the product directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A high-energy, professional male voiceover narrates the entire video in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects such as 'swish' and 'pop' are synced with the appearance of text overlays. (3) The narrator's tone remains consistently excited as he describes the price and quantity. (4) Subtle ambient sounds of liquid pouring and ice clinking are audible during the preparation scenes. (5) The music continues at a steady, high BPM until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '好多人都在買' (Many people are buying) - Hook text, excited tone. (2) 'UCC 香醇燕麥 三合一咖啡' (UCC Mellow Oat 3-in-1 Coffee) - Functional product title. (3) '50入大包裝' (50-pack large package) and '每包只要8.5元' (Only 8.5 yuan per packet) - Functional price/value text. (4) '暖身體及心情' (Warm body and mood) - Emotional descriptive text. (5) '必買清單 不能沒有它' (Must-buy list, can't be without it) - Strong promotional hook.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a brown jacket stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, pointing at a large display of blue Febreze product boxes with an excited expression. (3) The scene transitions to a modern bathroom where the first woman, now in a grey dress, explains the product's features while pointing at a shower area and floor tiles. (4) Close-up shots show the packaging and a hand pressing the activation button on the back of the air freshener unit. (5) The two women are seen sitting by a bathtub, discussing the product's benefits in a humid climate. (6) The video ends with an outdoor shot in front of a Costco building, where both women hold the product and encourage viewers to buy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat pop background music starts immediately. An enthusiastic female voice begins a high-energy sales pitch about Black Friday deals. (2) A second female voice joins in, expressing surprise and excitement with 'What? Is this really good?'. (3) The primary narrator provides a detailed explanation of the product's mold-prevention technology, maintaining a friendly and persuasive tone. (4) A distinct 'click' or 'pop' sound effect (SFX) is heard when the product button is pressed on-screen. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume as the two women conclude with a synchronized call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '去年黑五賣到缺貨的' (Sold out last Black Friday) - Hook text used to create urgency. (2) '好事多黑五必買 風倍清浴廁專用蛋' (Costco Black Friday Must-Buy: Febreze Bathroom Egg) - Identifying the product and event. (3) '11/24-11/30 折了150元' (Dates and 150 TWD discount) - Functional information. (4) '只需輕壓按放' (Just press and place) - Instructional text with a helpful tone. (5) '不僅防霉味還防臭' (Not only prevents mold but also deodorizes) - Highlighting key benefits. (6) '趕快手刀去買' (Hurry up and buy) - High-energy call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white top and black skirt stands in front of a refrigerated shelf at Costco, holding a black tray of sliced salmon. Hand gestures point out specific details of the packaging and surrounding salmon products. (3) Scene transitions to a home dining setting. Two women are seated at a table; one is wearing a purple dress and the other is wearing a yellow shirt with a red bucket hat. They use chopsticks to pick up slices of salmon from a blue fish-shaped plate, dipping them into a small bowl of sauce. The woman in the red hat holds up the original packaging and a piece of salmon close to the lens.

Subtle ambient noise from a busy supermarket is present. (2) A male voice-over enters, providing descriptive details about the product's weight and price in a professional yet friendly tone. Short sound effects like 'pings' are used to highlight key points. (3) The audio shifts to a mix of two female voices reacting to the food with sounds of enjoyment and rhythmic chatting. The male voice-over continues to provide commentary on the quality and origin of the salmon. The music remains consistent in tempo throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo. Decorative Text: '竟然有鮭魚生魚片' (Actually has salmon sashimi) and '生食級的生魚片' (Sashimi-grade sliced fish) in large yellow and white fonts. (2) Functional Text: '一盒450克' (One box 450g) and '599元' (599 dollars) appearing as informational overlays. (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '太值得買了' (So worth buying), '非常的厚' (Very thick), '味道很鮮甜' (Very fresh and sweet), and '無與倫比的美麗' (Incomparably beautiful) appearing with vibrant colors and stylized fonts to emphasize the review's positivity.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two young women wearing hats and casual clothing dancing and gesturing enthusiastically in front of a giant wholesale warehouse entrance. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, showcasing various products on store shelves or in boxes: plush toys, motorcycle helmets, car cleaning kits, cutting boards, shoe racks, ceiling lights, desk lamps, wall clocks, and food processors. (3) The sequence continues with household goods, car accessories, and tools including window screens, folding carts, power adapters, car fragrances, motor oil, and handheld vacuums. (4) The final segment features kitchenware, home office furniture, detergents, and an extensive collection of toys and Christmas decorations such as Nerf guns, play kitchens, toy cars, wreaths, and artificial Christmas trees. Each product shot is brief and static.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic dance music with a consistent fast tempo plays throughout the entire duration. (2) A male narrator with a clear, energetic, and professional tone speaks continuously, announcing product names and specific price discounts. (3) Subtle ambient store noise and occasional sound effects like 'pings' or 'dings' coincide with the appearance of price tags, but the music and narration remain the dominant layers. (4) The audio maintains a high-energy level with no significant pauses or shifts in volume until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '好市多 500件超殺特價 11/24~11/30 黑五特報第三彈' (Costco 500 items mega sale 11/24-11/30 Black Friday Report #3) appears as a large title. (2) Functional Text: For each item shown, the screen displays the brand name, product description, original price, discount amount (e.g., -560), and the final sale price (e.g., 特價999). (3) Decorative Text: Brightly colored borders and fiery graphics surround the title text to emphasize the 'hot' nature of the deals. The tone is urgent and promotional.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco warehouse aisle where a woman wearing a white bucket hat and a white long-sleeved top stands in front of stacks of Sofy brand feminine hygiene products. She gestures enthusiastically towards the camera. (2) She points specifically at boxes of Sofy overnight pants, holding her fingers up to indicate numbers. (5) The video ends with her smiling and holding the products, encouraging the viewers.

A cheerful young female voice begins speaking about stocking up on Sofy products at Costco. (2) As she discusses the overnight pants, a male voice is heard off-camera providing a price comparison with convenience stores. (3) The female speaker continues, explaining the specific discounts for tampons (e.g., 200 TWD off). (4) The off-camera male voice chimes in again near the end, commenting on the Japanese packaging. (5) The audio remains clear with minimal ambient warehouse noise, suggesting the use of a close-range microphone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 大家搶著買' (Everyone is rushing to buy) - Hook text in red and blue. (2) '黑五好康' (Black Friday deals) - Decorative text in black. (4) Various price points like '15元/片' (15 TWD/piece) and '折200元' (200 TWD off) appear throughout as functional text explaining the deal. (5) Emoji of a sparkling heart appears when she mentions the organic tampons.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a fast-paced live-action compilation. It begins with two young women standing in front of a Costco Wholesale storefront, holding a large stack of cash and looking extremely excited with wide eyes and bright smiles. (2) The scene transitions into a rapid-fire sequence of product displays inside the warehouse. Objects include an LG air purifier, PlayStation 5 consoles, Philips and Samsung televisions, ASUS laptops, Electrolux washing machines, and Daikin air conditioners. (3) Further segments showcase household goods like Kirkland golf clubs, ZAU electric bikes, TCL and Sharp refrigerators, Bosch dishwashers, and various pieces of furniture like armchairs and mattresses. (4) The final shots feature seasonal and decor items including a 137cm LED Christmas tree, LED reindeer, and Disney-branded printed rugs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic dance music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voiceover enters, speaking in Mandarin at an extremely fast, rhythmic pace, almost like a rapid-fire auctioneer or rapper, announcing the product names and their discounted prices. (3) The audio environment is a 'Field' style recording where the music and narration are layered over the faint, muffled hum of a warehouse environment. (4) Sharp sound effects (SFX) such as 'ding' or 'swoosh' sounds are heard during price transitions, emphasizing the discounts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the rapid-fire narration of product models and prices, such as 'LG AIR PURIFIER 360度空氣清淨機'. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: The intro features a large, colorful hook: '折扣金額破百萬! 好市多 千元折扣商品 11/24-11/30 黑五特報第五彈' (Discount amount exceeds one million! Costco thousand-dollar discount products Nov 24-30 Black Friday Report #5) in a variety-show style with glowing effects. (3) Content & Tone: Throughout the video, each product is accompanied by a breakdown of 'Original Price' (原價), 'Discount' (-xxxx), and 'Special Price' (特價) in bold, colorful fonts to evoke excitement and urgency.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy promotional shopping guide for Costco's Black Friday sale in Taiwan. It aims to overwhelm the viewer with a sense of value and variety by rapidly listing significant discounts on high-ticket items like electronics and home appliances, encouraging immediate visits to the store during the specified dates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the Costco storefront, extensive listing of products available at the store, and clear promotional dates and pricing for the 'Black Friday' event.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The 'speed-read' narration style combined with beat-synced product transitions is a common signature for viral retail promotion vlogs.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a beige coat standing in a Costco warehouse, gesturing towards empty display boxes. Large text overlays introduce the Crest toothpaste brand. (2) The camera pans across multiple empty cardboard displays on a pallet, emphasizing that the stock has been depleted. (3) The woman holds up a 5-pack of Crest 3D White toothpaste, pointing at the packaging details while speaking. (4) The camera shifts to a close-up of a price tag on a shelf, showing a Black Friday discount from 549 to 429. (5) The woman holds the product again, smiling and engaging with the camera, while other shoppers and staff move in the background. (6) Final shot shows her holding the pack prominently with a bright expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop-style BGM begins immediately. A female voice speaks excitedly about the empty shelves at Costco. (2) A male voice (off-camera) joins the conversation, explaining that the 'Crest' toothpaste is the reason for the empty boxes. (3) The male voice provides a detailed price breakdown, mentioning the original price, the 120 NTD discount, and the final sale price. (4) The female voice interjects, calculating that each tube costs only 86 NTD. (5) Ambient sounds of a busy warehouse (distant chatter, movement) are audible but suppressed by the clear, high-pitched, and energetic dialogue of the two speakers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '搬空好幾箱 Crest 速效亮白牙膏' (Emptied several boxes of Crest fast whitening toothpaste) - Functional hook text, excited tone. (2) '黑五好康' (Black Friday Good Deals) - Decorative sticker text. (3) '5入組' (5-pack) - Functional product info. (4) '一條只要86塊' (Only 86 dollars per tube) - Functional price highlight. (5) '好扯喔' (So ridiculous/crazy) - Emotional reaction caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Empty shelves) -> Evidence (Product/Price) -> Enthusiastic Recommendation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue wrap-style top and black skirt, stands in front of a Costco entrance. She gestures with her hands as she speaks to the camera. (2) The camera pans to a sign on the wall detailing the opening hours for Black Friday 2025 (Nov 24 - Nov 30). (3) The shot changes to the woman inside the warehouse-style store, now joined by another young woman wearing a white knit hat and a white sweater. They stand side-by-side, gesturing enthusiastically. (4) A close-up shot shows a price tag for 'Glico Bisco Biscuits' with a Black Friday discount, reducing the price from $399 to $299. (5) The two women appear together again, pointing at the camera and waving, encouraging the audience to follow for more updates.

(2) The vocal continues explaining the new store hours while ambient sounds of a crowded store environment are faintly heard in the background. (3) A second female voice joins in occasionally, adding emphasis and excitement to the conversation. (4) The music remains consistent in volume and tempo, maintaining a lively atmosphere. (5) The voices finish with a call to action as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '好事多黑五攻略 營業時間改8點' (Costco Black Friday Strategy: Opening hours changed to 8 AM). (2) Functional Text: 'ENTRANCE COSTCO WHOLESALE' on the store facade. (3) Functional Text: '2025 11.24 - 11.30 8:00 - 21:30' on a posters detailing store hours. (4) Decorative Text: 'BLACK FRIDAY' and '$299' on a large yellow price tag. (5) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese reflecting the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

They sound very enthusiastic, using many exclamations and 'wow' sounds. (3) The audio consists of continuous dialogue between the two, with the female voice remaining dominant. (4) Subtle ambient warehouse sounds like distant chatter and cart movements are occasionally audible under the music and main vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE - Functional text/Logo. (2) 太便宜不買可惜 (Too cheap, it's a pity not to buy) - Hook text. (3) 黑五好康 (Black Friday Great Deal) - Hook text. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two young women standing in front of a Costco Wholesale entrance, smiling and gesturing with microphones as they introduce the content. (2) The video then transitions into a very rapid montage of over 50 different products inside the warehouse. Each product is shown in its packaging or on the shelf. (3) Core objects featured include A4 Wagyu beef, household cleaners, diapers, snacks like Doritos and chocolates, bottled water, alcoholic beverages, and personal care items. (4) The camera work alternates between static shots of products and slight pans across shelves, with each shot lasting less than two seconds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music with a steady, driving beat starts immediately. (2) A male narrator begins a rapid-fire delivery, announcing each product name and its specific discount price in Mandarin. The tone is high-energy and urgent. (3) The narration is continuous throughout the entire video, perfectly synced with the visual appearance of each product. (4) No significant ambient noise or sound effects are detected; the audio focus is purely on the narration and the background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) The opening hook text reads '今年最殺就在這週 好市多 黑五特價速報 11/24~11/30 記得追蹤我們' (The biggest deals of the year are this week, Costco Black Friday Price Report 11/24-11/30, remember to follow us). (2) For every product shown, there is a large, colorful text overlay detailing the brand, product name, original price, discount amount (e.g., -550), and the final sale price (e.g., 特價 2049). (3) The text is stylized with bold outlines and bright colors like pink, yellow, and green to emphasize the savings.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a warehouse-style supermarket (Costco). A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white shirt and blue vest, stands in front of stacks of 'Pyrex x Moomin' boxes, gesturing towards the product. (2) The camera zooms into the price tag on the shelf, highlighting the 'Black Friday' discount from $599 to $479. (3) Multiple close-up shots show the host and a male hand holding individual glass bowls. They rotate the bowls to display different Moomin character designs (Moomin, Little My, Snufkin) and lid colors (pink, green, red, purple). (4) The host demonstrates the thickness of the glass by tapping on it and shows the inside of the bowls. (5) The host and the off-camera person interact, laughing and pointing at specific characters on the glassware. (6) The video concludes with the host holding up one of the bowls with a shocked expression, emphasizing the low price.

Fast-paced, upbeat, and playful BGM plays in the background. (2) A friendly male voice chimes in, interacting with the female speaker; they discuss the price and the specific characters visible on the glass. (3) The acoustic environment includes the subtle rustle of plastic lids being removed and the slight 'tink' of glass being handled. (4) Occasional ambient warehouse noise, such as distant cart movements and faint chatter from other shoppers, is audible under the main dialogue. (5) The music remains consistent in tempo throughout the video, maintaining a high-energy shopping atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE 大家搶著買 (Everyone is rushing to buy) - Hook text, high energy. (2) 黑五好康 (Black Friday good deals) - Hook text, promotional. (3) 超可愛嚕嚕米玻璃保鮮盒 (Super cute Moomin glass fresh-keeping boxes) - Descriptive functional text. (4) PYREX X MOOMIN STORAGE 圓形玻璃保鮮盒 8件組 $479 - Functional price tag information. (5) Functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue between the host and the camera operator.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman wearing a blue bucket hat and a blue fuzzy dress standing in a Costco warehouse aisle. She is holding a large yellow box of Pokémon-themed toothpaste and smiling brightly at the camera. Large, colorful text overlays appear around her. (2) She brings the box closer to the camera to show the two pumping-style toothpaste containers inside, which are shaped like Pokéballs (one red, one blue). She turns the box around to show the back, pointing at the diagrams explaining the pumping mechanism and the fluoride content. (3) She then moves to the side to pick up another large package, this one containing a set of seven Pokémon-themed toothbrushes. She shows the individual toothbrush designs featuring Pikachu, Squirtle, Bulbasaur, Charmander, and Eevee. The camera zooms in on the toothbrushes. (4) Finally, she poses with both the toothpaste and the toothbrush set, giving a thumbs up and smiling as the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop music plays in the background throughout the video. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice greets the audience and introduces the 'Pokémon' products found at 'Costco'. (2) As she shows the toothpaste box, a friendly male voice is heard off-screen, reacting with excitement ('Wow!', 'So cute!') and engaging in a brief dialogue about the 'pumping' feature. The female voice explains the benefits for kids, such as the fun factor and correct fluoride levels. (3) When the toothbrushes are shown, both voices continue to comment on the different characters and the suction cup feature of the brushes. There are subtle sound effects like 'ting' sounds when certain text overlays appear. (4) The audio ends with a cheerful sign-off from both voices over the fading music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video, such as '讓你刷牙更有趣' (Make brushing your teeth more fun) and '專門給小孩子使用的' (Specially for kids to use). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: At the start, large titles read 'Costco WHOLESALE', '小孩子的最愛' (Kids' favorite), and '寶可夢 精靈球牙膏' (Pokémon Pokéball Toothpaste) in bold, colorful characters. (3) Content & Tone: The text is highly enthusiastic and promotional, highlighting features like '按壓式' (Pumping type), '250g大容量' (250g large capacity), and '有效預防蛀牙' (Effectively prevent cavities).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Feature Demo (Toothpaste) -> Product Feature Demo (Toothbrush) -> Summary/Pose

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a white top and black skirt stands in a warehouse store aisle filled with stacks of large red snack boxes. (2) She picks up a Doritos Christmas-themed box, showcasing the front graphic which includes a Christmas tree and a bell made of chips. A male hand occasionally enters the frame to point out specific details on the box. (3) She rotates the box to reveal its sides, showing images of the internal snack bags and the price tag. The camera uses frequent close-ups on the product packaging and her facial expressions, which remain cheerful throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with an upbeat, synthesized version of 'We Wish You a Merry Christmas' that continues as background music. (2) A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin about the product, joined by a male voice off-screen commenting on the box design. (3) The conversation remains high-energy with consistent background music and some ambient warehouse store echo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Costco Wholesale' logo appears at the top throughout. (2) Functional text: 'wish you a Merry Christmas' and Traditional Chinese translations of the dialogue. (3) Decorative/Hook text: '多力多滋 299元 超大箱' (Doritos 299 NTD huge box), '聖誕大餐 派對包' (Christmas Feast Party Pack) in bright yellow and red fonts.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at stack -> Picking up product -> Close-up details of packaging -> Summary and outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a large warehouse store (Costco). A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white top and black dress, stands in front of a freezer chest. She picks up a box of Hershey's Choco Lava Bao Buns and displays it to the camera while speaking. (2) The camera zooms in on the product box and the freezer, which shows the stock is low. (3) Transition to an indoor home setting. Two women are seated at a gray marble-patterned table. One is the woman from the store, and the other wears a yellow striped shirt and a red bucket hat. They are holding and tearing open the dark brown bao buns to inspect the chocolate filling. (4) Close-up shots show them tasting the buns and expressing reactions through facial expressions and hand gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks with high energy and excitement, narrating the shopping experience. (2) Short, bright sound effects (SFX) like 'ding' and 'pop' occur when prices and key text appear on screen. (3) The scene shifts to a dialogue between two females. Their voices are clear and conversational, discussing the texture and the amount of filling in the food. The ambient noise is quiet, suggesting an indoor recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. 'hershey's 巧克力熔岩包 真實心得是' (Hershey's Choco Lava Bao Bun - Real Honest Review) in yellow and white. (3) '爆漿可可' (Exploding Cocoa) appears with a red impact graphic. (4) '1顆是11元' (11 dollars per piece) appears during the price breakdown. (5) '麵皮Q彈' (Chewy dough) and '加料 加料' (Add more/Extra filling) appear as emotional emphasis captions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping discovery at a warehouse store -> Product unboxing and tasting review at home.

(4) The woman rotates the tins to show the 360-degree graphics while standing in front of stacked pallets of seasonal merchandise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic, and high-tempo BGM plays continuously. A female voice begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic greeting and product introduction. (2) A male voice (off-screen) joins the conversation in a friendly and humorous tone, creating a duo-commentary style. (3) Occasional 'pop' or 'twinkle' SFX are heard coinciding with text overlays. perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '義大利製造 459元!' (Made in Italy 459 NTD!) - Functional text highlighting price and origin. (2) As the visuals shift to product details, the vocal narration continues describing the features like capacity (430ml) and character names. (4) A second female voice enters briefly in a conversational, friendly manner, discussing the colors 'Ice Moon Blue' and 'Matcha Green'. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding several different colored Snoopy-themed blankets (Blue, Green, White, and Yellow). A large Costco Wholesale logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) A close-up shot transitions to show the yellow blankets stacked high on warehouse shelving units. (3) The camera returns to the two women as they hold up the blue and green blankets specifically, gesturing to the patterns and talking with animated facial expressions. (4) One woman holds a green blanket while the other holds a yellow one, showcasing the individual designs. (5) They both hold multiple blankets again, looking directly at the camera with smiles and encouraging gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music starts and continues throughout the video. A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin, announcing that the Snoopy blankets are back in stock. (2) The voice continues listing colors: yellow, white, green, and blue. Background warehouse ambient noise is very low. (3) The speaker's tone remains enthusiastic as she highlights the green and blue versions as rare finds. (4) The vocal speed remains fast as she mentions the price and gives a call to action to buy quickly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Standard Mandarin subtitles appear at the bottom center of the screen, providing a literal transcription of the dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. Bold, variety-show style captions appear in the center: '終於補貨了' (Finally back in stock), '賣到缺貨的史努比毯毯' (The sold-out Snoopy blankets), '四色都有' (All four colors available), '推薦綠色' (Recommend green), and '非常推薦入手' (Highly recommended to buy). The tone is urgent and promotional.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand outside a Costco warehouse at night; one is holding a small white dog. They gesture towards the camera. (2) Scene shifts indoors to a living room where one woman presents a bottle of Lysol laundry sanitizer, looking surprised by its weight. She is seen pouring blue liquid into a washing machine tray. (3) The second woman presents a carton of Koh coconut water and a jar of Moccona coffee. She pours the coconut water into a glass, adds coffee, and stirs it with a straw while smiling. (4) Both women sit at a table presenting boxes of Weider Ocular Lutein. They show individual sachets and pour pink powder onto a plate. (5) One woman is seen working at a computer and then reading a book while wearing glasses. (6) The video ends with a montage of the women making heart and glasses gestures against a colorful, festive temple and fireworks background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic female vocals begin immediately with a cheerful tone, accompanied by upbeat, fast-paced background music. (2) Sound effects (SFX) like 'popping' and 'dinging' occur as text overlays appear. (3) The vocals transition between on-screen speech and enthusiastic narration, maintaining a high pitch. (4) Ambient indoor quietness is maintained under the music. (5) The music reaches a crescendo with festive sounds during the final scene.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你們知道嗎？' (Did you know?) - Hook text. (2) '不出門也能買到好市多' (Can buy Costco without going out) - Decorative/Hook text. (3) '好市多網購你曾買什麼？' (What have you bought from Costco online?) - Functional text. (4) 'Lysol 來舒 衣物抗菌液' - Functional product name. (5) 'Koh 純椰子汁', 'Moccona 中烘焙即溶咖啡粉' - Functional product names. (6) '威德適立佳葉黃素' - Functional product name. (7) '全美最多醫師推薦的專利葉黃素' - Decorative/Endorsement text.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged male character with a mustache and glasses standing inside a Costco warehouse. He gestures energetically towards the camera while a large, multi-colored title card about Costco's weekly sales and Black Friday pre-deals appears on screen. (2) The scene shifts into a rapid-fire sequence of product shots within the warehouse. Each shot focuses on a specific item—such as frozen pork slices, milk powder, stewed beef soup, tiramisu, and various snacks—stacked on shelves or in refrigerated units. Large text overlays dominate the center of each frame, showing price reductions. (3) The fast-paced montage continues through dozens of items, including beverages, detergents, and household goods, before concluding with shots of wine and skincare products.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks very rapidly and enthusiastically, introducing the 'Costco Weekly Sale Report' and telling viewers to follow for updates. (2) The male narrator continues to announce the names of various products and their discounted prices in a high-pitched, rhythmic tone that matches the speed of the visual cuts. There is minimal ambient noise, as the voice and music are the primary focus. (3) The narration and upbeat BGM maintain a consistent, fast tempo throughout the entire duration, creating a sense of urgency and excitement for the deals described.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', '黑五前哨大特價' (Black Friday Pre-sale), '好市多 每週特價速報' (Costco Weekly Special Report), and '11/17-11/23 記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us). (2) Functional Text: For each product shown, text provides the product name and price details, e.g., '台灣冷凍豬梅花火鍋片' (Taiwan Frozen Pork Collar Hot Pot Slices), '原價415/KG' (Original price), '-86' (Discount), '特價329/KG' (Special price). (3) This pattern repeats for over 40 products including '豐力富奶粉', '提拉米蘇', 'Airwaves', and 'Quaker' oats, using clear, bold characters to emphasize the savings.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Rapid-fire Product Price Showcase -> Fast Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are standing in a Costco warehouse aisle with the Costco logo at the top; they are smiling and talking to the camera. (2) They point towards a large stack of product boxes. (3) Close-ups of 'Viva Roasted Trail Mix' packaging are shown. (4) One woman is seen carrying a tall stack of the product boxes in the warehouse. (5) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen/dining setting where the women display the boxes on a countertop. (6) A close-up of a Costco price tag shows a discount price of $439. (7) They open the individual small packets and pour the contents onto a blue plate, showing various nuts and dried fruits. (8) One woman is seen lying on an orange sofa with a small white dog while the other hands her a snack packet. (9) They demonstrate a 'hidden eating method' by pouring the trail mix into a bowl of white yogurt and eating it with a spoon. (10) The video ends with them holding the boxes and giving a thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays throughout. Two female voices are heard narrating in a high-pitched, energetic, and fast-paced tone. (2) Frequent sound effects like 'dings', 'pops', and 'cha-chings' accompany text appearances and scene transitions. (3) The sound of nuts clattering onto a ceramic plate is audible during the product display. (4) The narration remains continuous and enthusiastic, describing the benefits and the current sale price of the product. (5) The music fades out as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' (Functional: Logo). (2) '不浪費年費 好市多必買推薦' (Hook: 'Don't waste the annual fee, Costco must-buy recommendation', Tone: Persuasive). (3) '內行的人都知道買這個' (Hook: 'Insiders all know to buy this', Tone: Exclusive). (4) '萬歲牌 總匯點心包' (Functional: Product name - Viva Roasted Trail Mix). (5) '現在折110元', '12/8-12/21', '限時特價439元' (Functional: Discount information, Tone: Urgent/Value). (6) '每包只要22元' (Functional: Unit price emphasis, Tone: Bargain). (7) '蔓越莓', '榛果', '綠葡萄乾', '南瓜籽仁' (Functional: Ingredient names). (8) '滿滿能量及幸福感' (Effect: 'Full of energy and happiness', Tone: Emotional). (9) '我的隱藏吃法是' (Hook: 'My hidden eating method is', Tone: Informative).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook in warehouse -> Value/Discount details -> Product feature demonstration -> Usage scenario at home -> Call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women walking through an airport terminal pulling large suitcases, smiling at the camera. (2) Transitions to the women outside standing in front of a white Mitsubishi Delica D-5 van with rental company branding; a male staff member is seen loading their pink and blue suitcases into the trunk. (3) A sequence shows one woman in front of the 'Car Rental Hokkaido' office, followed by screen recordings of the rental website and a shot of a hand holding a paper with QR codes for LINE and WhatsApp. (4) The women are then shown inside the office signing rental agreements with a female staff member. (5) A fast-paced montage follows, showing the women in various locations across Hokkaido: viewing fireworks at a lake, walking through flower fields, standing by the coastline, running through grassy plains, and visiting a mountain top with volcanic smoke. (6) The video concludes back at the airport area with one woman waving goodbye and a final static screen displaying several discount coupons for the rental service.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop-style background music plays immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice provides narration in Mandarin Chinese. (2) The sound of a car trunk closing and short greetings from the staff are heard amidst the continuous narration. (3) The music maintains its energetic pace during the travel montage, with occasional sound effects like 'whooshes' or 'dings' synced with text transitions. (4) A brief clip of a dog barking is heard during a field scene. (5) The narration becomes more direct and persuasive towards the end, concluding with a friendly sign-off as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '私心推薦 北海道 最便宜的租車' (Personal recommendation: Hokkaido's cheapest car rental) appears as a large hook title. (2) Functional text appears: '一下飛機 就有專車接送' (Private shuttle right off the plane) and '中文LINE客服' (Chinese LINE customer service). (3) Sequential labels identify travel spots: '洞爺湖 The Lake Suit', '北海道 Poroto 湖畔', '函館山百萬夜景' (Hakodate Night View), '小樽天狗山夜景', '亞斗夢之丘'. (4) Ending screen features several '優惠券' (Discount coupons) ranging from 2,000 to 8,000 Yen with corresponding URLs.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Service Benefits & Booking Demo -> Multi-location Travel Montage -> Promotional CTA with Coupons

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a colorful title card showing the exterior of a Costco warehouse with large text overlays. (2) It transitions into a rapid-fire sequence of shots within the Costco store, each focusing on a specific product on a shelf or in a cooler. (3) Products shown include household goods like Kleenex, various meats, trail mixes, chips like Cheetos and Calbee, chocolates like Lindt and Maltesers, snacks like seaweed and rice crackers, pantry items like coffee, ramen, and sauces, and alcoholic beverages like Yebisu beer and Johnnie Walker whiskey. (4) The camera is mostly static or uses subtle handheld movements for each shot, with very fast cuts between products. (5) The video concludes with more products and price tags.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, extremely energetic male voice speaking in rapid-fire Mandarin Chinese, introducing the 'Costco Weekly Special'. (2) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic background track with a strong drum beat plays continuously throughout the video. (3) The narrator's voice maintains its high energy and speed, announcing the name of each product and its sale price in sync with the visual transitions. (4) There is a low level of ambient warehouse background noise, but the narration and music are the primary audio elements.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '12月大特價' (December Mega Sale), '每週特價速報' (Weekly Special Report), '12/08~12/14'. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us), '好市多' (Costco). (3) Content & Tone: For each product, text displays the brand, item name, original price (e.g., '原價419'), the discount amount (e.g., '-84'), and the special price (e.g., '特價335'). The tone is urgent and promotional.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two young women standing in front of a hotel entrance with animated text overlays. (4) The scene shifts to a buffet lounge where beer is being poured automatically and various snacks like croissants and donuts are displayed. (5) A tour of the hotel room follows, showing luggage storage, clothes racks, a private bathroom with a tub, a small seating area, and twin beds. (6) Close-ups of food being prepared, specifically night-time ramen and a breakfast buffet with salmon and salad. (7) The video concludes with one of the women smiling and waving while sitting on a bicycle in front of the hotel.

(2) Ambient sounds of liquid being poured (beer) and the mechanical sound of the dispenser are heard. (3) A male voice joins the narration, alternating with the female voice to describe the room's features. (4) Sound effects such as chimes and 'pop' sounds coincide with the appearance of text overlays. (5) The music continues at a steady pace until a final melodic chime ends the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '札幌市中心的' (In Sapporo city center) - Functional. (2) '超級方便的' (Super convenient) - Hook. (3) '天然溫泉大浴場' (Natural hot spring public bath) - Functional. (4) '豪華休息室 讓你吃到飽' (Luxurious lounge, eat all you want) - Hook. (5) '免費的' (Free) - Hook. (6) '非常溫馨舒適的飯店唷' (A very warm and comfortable hotel) - Hook/Emotional.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a non-live-action graphic overlay featuring the 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and a cartoon sticker of the character Wreck-It Ralph. (3) Each shot is centered on a specific product—ranging from household items like toilet paper and cat litter to groceries like meat, snacks, and beverages—while bright text overlays appear to show price reductions. (4) The camera remains mostly static for each product shot, though there is slight handheld movement in some frames.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately and maintains a consistent tempo throughout. (2) An energetic male voice provides rapid-fire narration, reading out the names of the products and their discounted prices in Traditional Chinese. (3) Frequent sound effects (SFX) like 'pops' or 'chimes' are heard, synchronized with the appearance of text overlays on the screen. (4) The audio remains continuous with no ambient warehouse noise or background chatter audible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 2025最後特價 好市多 每週特價速報 12/15~12/21 記得追蹤我們' - Intro text setting the context and period of the sale. (2) Functional text appears on every frame identifying products such as '舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙', '台灣去骨清雞腿真空包', 'VIVA 萬歲牌', '義美 鳳凰蛋捲', etc. (3) Quantitative data is provided for each item: '原價' (Original Price), a negative number indicating the discount, and '特價' (Sale Price). (4) Some text uses emotional 'hooks' like '最後特價' (Final Sale) to create urgency.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts indoors with a woman in a white sweater expressing dramatic frustration, while a second woman in a blue sweater and white bucket hat enters holding several cardboard boxes. (2) They move to a table setting where the woman in the hat unboxes various monster-themed phone cases, showing their colorful and textured designs to the camera. (3) A sequence follows demonstrating the phone's durability; a woman drops her phone while falling on the floor to show it remains intact. (4) Close-up shots highlight functional accessories like a magnetic water bottle used as a tripod and a round phone grip. (5) The video concludes with both women holding a variety of products, gesturing towards a discount code displayed on screen.

A female voice speaks in an exaggeratedly angry and frustrated tone, followed by a second, more cheerful female voice explaining the product launch. (2) During the unboxing, high-pitched sound effects (SFX) like 'ding' and 'sparkle' accompany the reveal of each new phone case. (3) A deep-voiced male narrator enters to provide technical specifications about 'AirX' technology and impact resistance while the music continues in the background. (4) Ambient noise is minimal, with sound effects highlighting the 'click' of the magnetic attachment. (5) The audio ends with both female voices and the male narrator enthusiastically reciting a promotional discount code.

(3) '你好牙! 經典系列' and '牙扁扁 實驗室異類系列' - Product series names. (4) 'AirX 極致氣墊緩衝手機殼' - Functional feature highlights. (5) '牙寶可可酒精' - Promotional discount code with an energetic tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two female hosts sitting at a restaurant table, smiling and gesturing towards bowls of beef soup and rice. (2) There is a brief cut to the restaurant interior, showing staff in yellow uniforms and simple dining tables. (3) The camera returns to the hosts; the woman on the left speaks excitedly with exaggerated hand gestures while the woman on the right prepares to eat. (4) Close-up shots show steam rising from a large metal bowl of beef soup as a spoon lifts thin slices of pinkish-brown meat. (5) Another close-up features two bowls of rice topped with a generous amount of braised beef. (6) The hosts are shown tasting the soup and rice, displaying expressions of intense satisfaction and delight, such as wide eyes and nodding. (7) Detailed close-ups of specific beef textures and the broth's clarity are interspersed with the hosts' reactions. (8) The video concludes with the hosts continuing their meal and speaking to the camera.

(2) The narration remains continuous, with the primary speaker's tone staying excited and friendly. Occasional background laughter and short affirmative responses from a second female voice are heard. (3) Subtle ambient sounds of a busy restaurant, including the clinking of metal spoons against bowls and distant chatter, are layered under the voices and music. (4) Short, sharp sound effects (SFX) like a 'ding' or 'pop' occur in synchronization with the appearance of colorful text overlays. (5) The music continues at a steady volume until the end, providing a cheerful backdrop to the food descriptions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '台南私藏' (Tainan Private Collection) - Hook text with a bold, decorative style indicating a secret or favorite spot. (2) '心中第一牛肉湯' (Number one beef soup in my heart) - Emotional hook expressing a personal ranking. (3) '500塊特選牛肉湯' (500 yuan special beef soup) - Functional text identifying a specific menu item and its price. (4) '滿滿肉的肉燥飯' (Braised meat rice full of meat) - Descriptive text emphasizing portion size with a hungry or excited tone. (5) '牛肉燥飯' (Beef braised meat rice) - Functional text labeling the dish. (6) Subtitles follow the speech, such as '我在台南最近很喜歡的旗哥牛肉湯' (The Qige Beef Soup I've liked recently in Tainan) and '肉超級嫩的' (The meat is super tender).

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'Hidden item' (隱藏款) as a hook is a common social media strategy to drive engagement by implying exclusive knowledge.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic title card featuring the Costco logo and stylized text announcing a weekly discount report for the period of May 5th to May 11th. (2) A rapid-fire montage begins, showing a POV perspective of various goods on shelves within a warehouse retail environment. Each shot is extremely brief, showcasing items like bulk toilet paper, laundry detergent, and electric shavers. (3) The visual flow continues through diverse product categories including frozen fish, packaged chocolates, cordless vacuum cleaners, bottled supplements, and various snacks. (4) The final segment cycles through pet supplies, red wine, health drinks, and instant food products, all presented in their warehouse packaging.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic male voiceover starts immediately, announcing the Costco weekly specials in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. Fast-tempo electronic background music with a steady beat accompanies the speech. (2) The narrator speaks continuously and at a high speed, listing the names of products and their discounted prices. The rhythm of the speech is tightly synchronized with the rapid visual cuts. (3) The acoustic environment remains consistent throughout the entire duration, with the music providing a constant high-energy layer beneath the dense vocal delivery. (4) No significant ambient noise or sound effects are audible, as the studio-quality voiceover and music dominate the mix.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "好市多 每週特價速報 05/05~05/11 記得追蹤我們" (Costco Weekly Special Report 05/05-05/11, remember to follow us). (2) Functional text appears for every item, such as: "科克蘭 三層抽取式衛生紙 原價369 -24 特價345" (Kirkland 3-ply toilet paper, original price 369, -24, special price 345). (3) Subsequent functional text for dozens of items follows the same format, including "Dyson V11 SV15 手提無線吸塵器" and "STARBUCKS 中度烘焙即溶咖啡". (4) All text is presented in Traditional Chinese with high-contrast colors for clarity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> High-speed product catalog montage -> Outro

By using rapid-fire editing and a high-speed vocal delivery, it conveys a large amount of pricing data in a short period to drive store traffic.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing Costco products and their specific promotional prices, functioning as a direct marketing piece.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a live-action shot of a crowded Costco warehouse interior, showing people with shopping carts near the entrance/exit. (2) A series of rapid cuts follow, showcasing various consumer products stacked on pallets or shelves: purple tissue boxes, jars of mixed nuts, boxes of cream puffs, pink snack boxes, sliced meats in a refrigerated display, and various bags of chips and snacks. (3) Further cuts show stacks of canned drinks, boxes of oat milk, gummy candies, crackers, frozen shrimp patties, hand soap, and chocolate bars. (4) The sequence continues with boxes of apples, butterfly pastries, kombucha, lemon green tea, chicken breast, bread, and noodles. (5) The final segments display coffee, soda cans, instant noodles, sauces, tea, wine, and beer cases.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music with a fast tempo starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voice speaks enthusiastically and rapidly, announcing product names and specific discount prices in Mandarin, synchronized with each visual cut. (3) Faint ambient warehouse noise is heard in the background, including the low hum of a large space and muffled sounds of movement, though mostly masked by the music and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'COSTCO 比角便宜超人 好市多 每週特價速報 07/28 - 08/03 記得追蹤我們' (Costco Super Cheap Hero, Costco Weekly Special Report, 07/28-08/03, Remember to follow us) in a bold, variety-show style. (2) Functional text appears for each item, such as '舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙 原價419 -84 特價335' (Kleenex 3-ply toilet paper, Original 419 -84 Special 335), '科克蘭綜合堅果 原價559 -60 特價499' (Kirkland Mixed Nuts), and so on for approximately 40 different products. (3) All text is in Traditional Chinese and uses a consistent layout to emphasize the savings amount and final price.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are seen indoors holding green product boxes, smiling and gesturing towards the camera. (2) Scene transitions to the exterior of a bakery called 'Hong Ding Pastry' as a person enters through glass doors. (3) Close-up shots show a round pastry being sliced to reveal a thick jam filling, followed by a cross-section of a layered cake. (4) The two women taste the pastries, exhibiting happy expressions and nodding, with digital confetti overlays appearing on screen. (5) Various shots showcase the product packaging, loose pastries on a board, and one woman feeding a small white dog. (6) The video concludes with both women holding the products and looking at a smartphone together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop music starts immediately. An excited, high-pitched female voice introduces the topic. (2) A clear, steady male voice-over joins, providing a descriptive narration of the product's taste and awards. (3) Background music maintains a constant, fast tempo with light percussion. (4) Subtle sound effects like 'ding' or 'pop' coincide with the appearance of text overlays and scene transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '台中最新 必買伴手禮' (Taichung's latest must-buy souvenir) - Hook, enthusiastic tone. (2) '鴻鼎菓子' (Hong Ding Pastry) - Functional, brand identification. (3) '熟成檸檬酥' (Ripe Lemon Pastry) - Functional, product name. (4) '七分酸 三分甜' (7 parts sour, 3 parts sweet) - Descriptive, highlighting flavor profile. (5) '2025年台中十大伴手禮首獎' (2025 Taichung Top 10 Souvenirs Gold Award) - Promotional/Authority hook. (6) '也可以網購喔!' (Can also be bought online!) - Functional, call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a grey translucent top stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding a large packaged smoked salmon salad. She examines the salad closely and speaks to the camera. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor dining area where the woman is joined by another woman wearing a black-and-white patterned bucket hat. They sit at a table with the salad open. (3) Detailed close-ups show the salad ingredients, specifically the salmon slices rolled into rose shapes, mozzarella cheese balls, and cherry tomatoes. The women use tongs to lift a piece of salmon to show its thickness and texture while reacting enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic music begins. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone, describing the visual appeal of the smoked salmon roses in the salad. Background warehouse noise is faint. (2) Two female voices engage in a lively conversation as the music continues. They discuss the salad's contents, the specific wasabi-flavored dressing, and the price point. Sounds of plastic packaging and metal tongs clicking are heard. (3) The commentary becomes more enthusiastic, with both women praising the taste and value. The background music remains consistent in its high-energy tempo until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo; '不浪費年費' (Don't waste the annual fee); '燻鮭魚乳酪沙拉' (Smoked Salmon Cheese Salad). Decorative/Hook: '哇好漂亮' (Wow, so beautiful!) in a bright pink font. (2) Functional Text: '372元' (indicating the price); '山葵沙拉醬' (Wasabi salad dressing). (3) Decorative/Hook: '燻鮭魚沙拉' in large red characters; '有夠好吃' (So delicious!) with a fiery background effect; '超讚' (Super great!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook in store -> Detailed tasting and review at home -> Final recommendation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a parking lot in front of a white building with a Costco logo, gesturing toward the camera with energetic expressions. (2) The scene shifts indoors where they sit at a table, holding a pink Philips epilator box and pointing to graphics showing price drops. (3) A series of close-ups show the epilator device, its rotating tweezer head, and various plastic attachments spread on a table. (4) The device is shown being used on different body parts: an arm, a leg being rinsed under a faucet, and a male cheek. (5) A split-screen comparison shows a person's legs, one side visibly smoother than the other with 'before/after' style text. (6) Both women reappear at the table, holding the device and giving a thumbs up to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop/electronic background music starts immediately. Two high-pitched female voices speak excitedly in Mandarin. (2) A clear, professional male voice-over enters, narrating product features while the original female voices are heard as faint background chatter and reactions. (3) Sharp sound effects (SFX) such as 'ding', 'pop', and 'camera shutter' clicks punctuate transitions and the appearance of text on screen. (4) The audio maintains a high-energy mix of narration and music, concluding with the music fading out after a final enthusiastic exclamation from the female hosts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Costco Wholesale' logo at the top. (2) Hook Text: '夏天快到了 姐妹們 不要錯過' (Summer is coming, sisters, don't miss out!) in vibrant colors. (3) Functional Text: '好市多獨家販售' (Costco exclusive) and '限時特價 -800元' (Limited time offer -$800). (4) Decorative Text: '完全不會痛' (Doesn't hurt at all) and '省時又輕鬆' (Save time and easy) with emoji decorations to emphasize ease of use.

(4) Sounds of plastic packaging crinkling and the muffled sound of eating are layered with the continuous background music.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman wearing a blue off-shoulder top, jeans, and a dark blue beret dancing and walking enthusiastically down a wide warehouse aisle in a Costco. She points excitedly at stacks of blue and green snack boxes. (2) She stands in front of the snack display, gesturing towards the 'Kuai Kuai' (乖乖) branded boxes, specifically highlighting a peanut-flavored variety. She picks up a box and shows it to the camera, her facial expressions are very animated and joyful. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where she is joined by another woman. They are seated at a table covered with bags of 'Kuai Kuai' snacks. (4) Both women are seen opening the bags, taking out the corn snacks, and eating them while looking at the camera and discussing the taste. Close-up shots of the peanut snacks are shown as they hold them up to the lens.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop music begins immediately and plays throughout the video. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice narrates the experience. (2) The sound of the warehouse environment is faint, dominated by the voiceover. (3) As the setting changes to the home, the audio includes the crisp sound of plastic snack bags being opened and the audible crunch of eating snacks. (4) Two female voices are heard interacting; one is the primary narrator, and the second voice provides occasional agreement and commentary, maintaining a cheerful and casual tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears prominently at the top. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '好事花生了' (A pun in Mandarin meaning 'Good things have happened/peanut-ed') appears in yellow and red bubbles. (3) Hook Text: '隔了10年' (After 10 years) highlighting the rarity of the product. (4) Functional Text: '$ 289' appears on screen next to the price tag. (5) Effect Text: '絕版十年' (Out of print for ten years) and '非常地濃' (Very thick/flavorful) emphasized in large, colorful fonts. (6) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout the video translate the spoken dialogue into Mandarin.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short dark hair in a white tiered dress waves excitedly to the camera in a modern room. (2) She runs towards a massive floor-to-ceiling corner window overlooking a river and mountains, raising her arms in a celebratory gesture. (3) The camera pans across a spacious hotel suite featuring a large bed, a wooden ceiling fan, and a freestanding white bathtub. (4) Close-up shots of bathroom amenities: Hunter Lab bottles, a GHD hair dryer, and a Marshall speaker. (5) The woman is seen relaxing in the bathtub, then sitting on the bed. (6) A montage of breakfast dishes including eggs, sliced meat, and fresh fruit on a marble counter. (7) The woman runs through a bright, glass-walled lobby or dining area followed by two small white dogs. (8) Finally, she and another woman sit in modern lounge chairs by the window as evening falls, looking out at the city lights across the water.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music begins. (2) A female voice speaks in a cheerful, energetic tone, describing the room in Yilan. (3) The narration continues with a steady pace, specifically mentioning the furniture, the view, and the high-end brands provided. (4) Subtle sound effects like a 'ding' or 'sparkle' sound accompany text transitions. (5) The music remains constant throughout the video, maintaining a positive and relaxing atmosphere until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '這是一間' (This is a) - Functional text. (2) '讓我渴望再去宜蘭的房間' (A room that makes me long to go to Yilan again) - Hook text, emotional tone. (3) '廣闊的空間' (Spacious space) - Descriptive. (4) '高質感的家具與設備' (High-quality furniture and equipment) - Descriptive. (5) '一面看河一面看海' (One side looking at the river, one side looking at the sea) - Descriptive. (6) 'Hunter', 'ghd', 'Marshall' - Brand labels. (7) '暖薑泡澡用' (Warm ginger for bathing) - Informative. (8) '能帶上毛孩子' (Can bring furry kids/pets) - Key selling point. (9) '環境乾淨舒服' (Clean and comfortable environment) - Summary text.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional vlog intended to showcase the luxury and pet-friendly features of a specific homestay or hotel in Yilan. By highlighting high-end brands (GHD, Marshall) and the unique 'river and sea' view, it targets travelers looking for high-quality, comfortable accommodations where they can also bring their pets.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of room features, specific brand mentions for amenities, and a call to share with loved ones.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy waving opening, beat-synced editing with bright text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content leverages the 'pet-friendly' niche, which is a significant trend in modern domestic travel content, combined with luxury lifestyle markers.
